english: Combat Options panel . The tooltip for each attack style shows the style name, type of damage and the skill XP attacking with that style gives. Melee Attack Styles deal either Stab, Slash or Crush damage as shown in the tooltip. Enemies have different defence stats for each of these damage types, so attack with a style the enemy has low defence in to increase your chance to hit them. Enemy stats can be viewed using the Monster Inspect spell or looked up on the Wiki.
translation: 战斗选项面板。每种攻击风格的工具提示会显示风格名称、伤害类型以及使用该风格攻击获得的技能经验值。近战攻击风格会造成刺击、劈砍或钝击伤害，具体如工具提示所示。敌人对这些伤害类型的防御属性各不相同，因此使用敌人防御较低的攻击风格可以提高命中率。可以通过怪物检视法术查看敌人的属性，或在维基上查询。

english: Did you know? Boat repair kits can be used to fix up a damaged boat. You can make boat repair kits at a shipwrights' workbench, which are found near all shipwrights.
translation: 你知道吗？船修理包可以用来修复受损的船只。你可以在造船匠的工作台上制作船修理包，这些工作台通常位于所有造船匠附近。

english: Did you know? Boats have an escape option on their helm, allowing you return to dry land if you're ever in trouble.
translation: 你知道吗？船舵上有一个逃生选项，如果你遇到麻烦可以返回陆地。

english: Did you know? If you stand on the same tile as your box trap, it will fail to catch 100% of the time.

english: Did you know? Kebabs are one of the items you can use on a compost bin to make regular compost.

english: Did you know? Not all snelms give the same damage protection against snail acid attacks. Red snelms and pointed blue snelms are the most effective.
translation: 你知道吗？并非所有斯皮尔姆草都能提供相同的伤害防护，抵御蜗牛酸攻击。红色斯皮尔姆草和尖顶蓝色斯皮尔姆草最有效。

english: Did you know? The Twinflame staff from Royal Titans will automatically cast the correct elemental spell for a foe's weakness.
translation: 你知道吗？来自皇家泰坦的双生火焰法杖会自动对敌人的弱点施放正确的元素法术。

english: Did you know? You can attempt to catch most Hunter creatures you don't have the Hunter level to catch. You will just fail 100% of the time.

english: A station that can be used to spread all types of fish offcuts into the sea while deep sea trawling.
translation: 深海拖网时用来将各种鱼类边角料撒入海中的装置。

english: A station that can be used to spread all types of fish offcuts into the sea while deep sea trawling. When doing so, it can take offcuts directly from the cargo hold.
translation: 深海拖网捕鱼时可使用的装置，能将各类鱼碎屑撒入海中。操作时可直接从船舱中提取碎屑。

english: A station that can be used to spread basic fish offcuts into the sea while deep sea trawling.
translation: 深海拖网捕鱼时可用来将基本鱼碎撒入海中的装置。

english: A station to sort through salvage collected at sea.
translation: 海上战利品分类站。

english: A stone capable of peering into the depths of the ocean. Useful for detecting the rough locations of nearby shoals at sea.
translation: 一块能窥探深海之处的石头。可用于探测附近海域鱼群的大致方位。

english: A superior foe has appeared...
translation: 一个强大的敌人出现了...

english: A victory to be won.
translation: 待赢取的胜利。

english: A vyrewatch sentinel summons a magical blood orb!
translation: 维拉哨卫召唤出一个魔法血球！

english: A warrior? Is that what you tell yourself? You killed him like he was a mere animal! A mere beast!
translation: 战士？你是这么对自己说的吗？你杀了他，就像他不过是一头畜生！一头野兽！

english: A wind tunnel - I have fitted all the cogs on to the pins. The wind tunnel should now work as long as it's powered.
translation: 风洞——我已将所有齿轮安装到销钉上。只要动力充足，风洞现在应该能正常运转。

english: A: Trollheim - Eadgar's Ruse
translation: A: 巨魔之地 - 埃德加的诡计

english: A: Warriors' Guild
translation: A: 战士公会

english: AHAHAHAHA, I've gone totally mad! AHAHAHAHA!
translation: 啊哈哈哈，我彻底疯了！啊哈哈哈！

english: Ability to make throwing darts.
translation: 制作投掷镖的能力。

english: Abracadabra! Hocus pocus!
translation: 急急如律令！变！

english: Accept that your boat will be lost at sea?
translation: 确认您的船将在海上失踪？

english: Access to Vampyrium
translation: 进入维普瑞姆

english: Access to desert mining camp mithril and adamantite rocks.
translation: 允许进入沙漠采矿营地的秘银和精金矿点。

english: Across the kingdom I did stare,
translation: 我放眼望向整个王国，

english: Adventurer's Outfit (tier 3)
translation: 冒险者套装（3级）

english: Advisor Ghrim made a better version.
translation: 顾问格里姆做了一个更好的版本。

english: After a bit of ingenious deduction on my part I was able to find a large ornate key hidden in a painting. I used the key on the statue and it unlocked the door. I was able to get down into the underground laboratory and found a book about something called Haemalchemy. I'm not sure what it's about, but Safalaan seemed pretty pleased about it. He gave me a sealed envelope to give to Veliaf. Little did I know but it was a commendation from the highest-ranking member of the Myreque! Veliaf was incredibly pleased and made me a full member of the Myreque.
translation: 经过我一番巧妙的推理，在一幅画中发现了一把华丽的大钥匙。我用钥匙打开了雕像，解锁了门。随后进入地下实验室，找到一本关于“血炼术”的书。虽然不太明白具体内容，但萨法兰对此显得很高兴。他交给我一封密封的信要转交给维利亚夫。我没想到的是，这竟是米瑞克最高层成员的嘉奖信！维利亚夫喜出望外，正式册封我为米瑞克的正式成员。

english: After a fierce battle I defeated the warlord who'd stolen the orbs, and reclaimed them for the gnome people.
translation: 经过一场激战，我击败了偷走宝珠的军阀，为侏儒人民夺回了它们。

english: After a moment, a slot opens with a chemical vial in it.
translation: 片刻后，一个槽口打开，里面有一支化学药剂瓶。

english: After a short while I had sailed near to the Sanguinesti region.
translation: 不久之后，我便航行到了桑圭内斯蒂地区附近。

english: After a tough battle, we managed to defeat the Jormungand.
translation: 经过一场激战，我们终于击败了耶梦加得。

english: After all these years, I have found that life has become so... monotonous.
translation: 这么多年过去，我发现生活变得如此……单调。

english: After fixing up the old workshop machinery, collecting ore and smelting it I was able to create an Elemental Shield.
translation: 修理好旧车间机器、采集矿石并冶炼后，我成功制作出了一面元素盾牌。

english: After helping the Bedabin people get a new weapon, they gave me a pineapple which I used to bribe the mine guard into allowing me further access into the mines.
translation: 帮贝达宾族人获得新武器后，他们给了我一个菠萝，我用来贿赂矿场守卫，得以进入矿洞更深处。

english: After purchasing two camels from 'Ali's Discount Camel Store', I gave one to each group.
translation: 从阿里骆驼折扣店买了两头骆驼后，我给每队各分了一头。

english: After puzzling through the strangely elaborate security system, and defeating a very strange monster, I returned the child's ball to him, and he thanked me for my help.
translation: 我破解了那套异常复杂的安保系统，击败了一个非常奇怪的怪物，把孩子的球还给了他，他感谢我的帮助。

english: After repairing the torn page I have discovered that each one contains instructions on how to modify earth, air, fire, water and mind runes to repair the doorway.
translation: 修复残页后，我发现每页都记载着如何改造土、气、火、水、心符文来修复门扉的方法。

english: After slaying five shades and helping to rebuild a sacred temple, I was able to put the shades spirits to rest. The town has pretty much returned to normal, except for all the shade activity, but now I have a way to put the shades spirits to rest and gain access to their treasure filled lairs!
translation: 消灭了五只鬼影并协助重建圣殿后，我终于能让鬼影之灵安息。小镇基本恢复了正常，除了一直有鬼影出没——但现在我有了让鬼影之灵安息的办法，还能进入它们藏满宝藏的巢穴！

english: After some searching, the barman let slip some information about the 'Four Diamonds of Azzanadra'.
translation: 一番搜寻后，酒保透露了些关于‘阿赞德拉四钻石’的信息。

english: After speaking to Bailey, I found out that Sea Slugs are afraid of heat.
translation: 跟贝利交谈后，我发现海蛞蝓怕热。

english: After speaking to Hopespear in the Goblin Temple Crypt, I obtained the remains of the five former Goblin High Priests and buried them in Yu'biusk for him.
translation: 在哥布林神殿墓穴与希望之矛交谈后，我获得了五位前哥布林大祭司的遗骸，并将其埋葬在尤比斯克为他安息。

english: After speaking to all these people I now need to report back to Col. O'Niall.
translation: 跟所有这些人都谈过之后，我现在要回去向奥尼尔上校报告。

english: After speaking to the Mayor and others, I have concluded something is very wrong in Witchaven.
translation: 与镇长和其他人交谈后，我断定薇丝文镇确实出了问题。

english: After the Apothecary made me the potion, I delivered it to Juliet. She asked me to tell Romeo the plan.
translation: 药剂师帮我做好药后，我把它送给了朱丽叶。她要我把计划告诉罗密欧。

english: Ah, <osrscn-name-0>. Come to gloat?
translation: 啊，<osrscn-name-0>。来看笑话吗？

english: Ah, but anyway, please let me see these relics.
translation: 啊，不过还是让我看看这些遗物吧。

english: Ah, it's you two. I was hoping to spare you this...
translation: 啊，是你们俩。我本想让你们免于此事的……

english: Ah, you mean the Imcando city of Camdozaal. We'd heard the ruin was recently rediscovered, though the specifics of how that happened were unusually vague...
translation: 啊，你是说伊姆坎多城卡姆多扎尔。我们听说那座废墟最近被重新发现了，不过具体怎么发现的却异常含糊……

english: Alan offered me some food and asked me to keep an eye on the Egg while he went out to gather some ingredients.
translation: 艾伦给了些食物让我照看蛋，他出去收集材料了。

english: All in all lots of big favours and a lot more than I'd bargained for.
translation: 总之，帮了大忙，而且远远超出了我的预料。

english: All roles have been cleared.
translation: 所有角色已清除。

english: Allow pets to roam
translation: 允许宠物自由活动

english: Allows access to the mining camp.
translation: 允许进入采矿营地。

english: Allows you to both teleport the boat to the dock or mooring point you are at as well as letting you teleport to where the boat is docked.
translation: 允许你将船传送至当前所在的码头或停泊点，也能让你传送到船只停靠的位置。

english: Allows you to teleport the boat to the dock or mooring point you are at.
translation: 允许你将船传送到你所在的码头或停泊点。

english: Almost finished! I must combine the pattern which Ava gave to me with some polished buttons and a bit of hard leather.
translation: 快完成了！我得把艾娃给我的那个图案，配上几颗抛光纽扣和一块硬皮革。

english: Almost there...
translation: 快了...

english: Along the way I helped rescue 'Jimmy the chisel' from a bunch of fanatics. I helped an ill metal smith get over his cold. I fought a rock monster in a goblin cavern and I fixed a mad Seer's weather vane to get a weather report.
translation: 一路上，我帮忙从一群狂徒手中救出了‘凿子吉米’，帮一位生病的铁匠治好了感冒，在哥布林洞穴里跟岩石怪打了一架，还修好了疯先知的测风仪来获取天气预报。

english: Along with Ennius and Furia, I confronted the Knight implicated in the Letter. However, before I could question him, Ennius executed him.
translation: 我和恩尼乌斯、弗里亚一起，当面质问信中提及的那位骑士。但还没等我问话，恩尼乌斯就将他处决了。

english: Along with my Cat, I spoke to the Sphinx, a strange cat-like creature living in Sophanem. She told me that the Pyramid was the resting place for Klenter, a former High Priest of Icthlarin, and that it was his ghost which was angry with me. She also suggested that the Burial Jar I woke up with was likely the thing I stole from within.
translation: 我随我的猫一同拜访了斯芬克斯，那个住在索法尼姆的怪异猫形生物。她告诉我，金字塔是伊克塔拉林前任大祭司克伦特的安息之地，正是他的鬼魂在对我发怒。她还指出，我醒来时携带的陪葬瓮很可能就是我从金字塔中偷走的东西。

english: Already gathering their sacrifices for Drakan's festival!
translation: 已经在为德拉肯的庆典收集祭品了！

english: Alrena has given me a Gas Mask to protect me from the Plague while in West Ardougne. She's made me a spare one and left it in her cupboard for if I lose this one.
translation: 阿莱娜给了我一个防毒面具，让我在西阿尔道恩时免受瘟疫侵害。她多做了一个备用的，放在她的橱柜里，以备我丢失这个时使用。

english: Alright, I'll meet you there.
translation: 好，我在那里等你。

english: Alternatively, you may end this run now and claim the loot you've earned so far.
translation: 或者，你现在就可以结束本轮挑战，领取已获得的战利品。

english: Although Flaygian was killed in the Abomination's attack, Vertida beleived that we could still finish his work.
translation: 尽管弗莱吉安在憎恶的攻击中丧生，但维尔蒂达相信我们仍能完成他的工作。

english: Although I've now partially deciphered the Tablets I found, and discovered the fate of the Old Ones in the process, there might still be more to discover. Perhaps I should return to the Ancient Ruins and see if I can fully translate the Tablets.
translation: 虽然我已经部分破译了找到的石板，并在此过程中发现了远古者的命运，但可能还有更多有待发现。也许我应该回到远古遗迹，看看能否完全翻译这些石板。

english: Although fear stabs at your heart...
translation: 尽管恐惧刺痛着你的心…

english: Although the Jormungand's Generals were defeated, they managed to awaken the Jormungand himself.
translation: 尽管约尔姆加德的将军们被击败了，但他们成功唤醒了约尔姆加德本尊。

english: Amazing Farming Equipment Store
translation: 神奇的农场装备店

english: Amoxliatl disables your prayers and launches an icicle attack!
translation: 阿莫克斯利亚特封印了你的祈祷，并发射冰锥攻击！

english: Amoxliatl forms some unstable ice blocks around you.
translation: 阿莫克斯利亚特在你周围凝结出几块不稳定的冰块。

english: An anchor fit for smaller vessels.
translation: 适合小型船只的锚。

english: Ancient magic teleports you to a place within the wilderness!
translation: 远古魔法将你传送至荒野中的一处地点！

english: And I haven't! I'm not Veliaf! I'm still here! I'm still helping! But I'm not you, <osrscn-name-0>! I can't just go back there... I won't go back there...
translation: 我没有！我不是维利亚夫！我还在这里！我还在帮忙！但我不是你，<osrscn-name-0>！我不能就这么回去……我不回去……

english: And Safalaan is the cost?! What about her over there? You mean to tell me she gets to live and he doesn't?!
translation: 萨法拉恩就是代价？！那她呢？你的意思是她能活，他就不行？！

english: And does the farmer quarrel with the cattle?
translation: 那农夫会跟牛吵架吗？

english: And for all those years, with each and every day, he tormented me with false hope. He told me my daughter was alive. He told me my husband was alive. It was only after I escaped that I discovered the truth.
translation: 这么多年，日复一日，他用虚假的希望折磨我。他告诉我女儿还活着，告诉我丈夫还活着。直到我逃出来，才发现了真相。

english: And for as long as I have friends like you, <osrscn-name-0>, I hope I never will. Thank you... truly.
translation: 只要有像你这样的朋友，<osrscn-name-0>，我就希望永远不会迷失。谢谢你...真的。

english: And how long will you last if you remain? The humans here are spent. There is no longer enough of them to feed you.
translation: 你若留下，又能撑多久？此处人类已尽数耗尽，不足以供你果腹。

english: And so the time has finally arrived. I see some of you have come prepared. I trust you understand that your ability to round up starving humans will not be enough for you to survive this night.
translation: 时候终于到了。看得出有些人已经准备好了。但我要提醒你们，仅凭集结饥饿人类的本事，可不足以熬过今晚。

english: And so we properly meet at last. Greetings, my child. I'm glad to see you are safe.
translation: 我们终于正式见面了。你好，我的孩子。很高兴看到你安然无恙。

english: And through all those years, I've stared death in the face more times than I can count, only to defy her each and every time.
translation: 这些年来，我与死亡面对面无数次，却次次逆天改命。

english: And we're running out of time. Look at the sky...
translation: 没时间了。快看天上……

english: And what is yours? Vanescula? What do you think she would have done had her plan to kill me succeeded? What would her answer have been to the blood shortages?
translation: 那你的答案呢？凡妮丝库拉？你觉得如果她杀我的计划得逞了，她会怎么做？她会如何应对血液短缺？

english: And who is to blame for that, Drakan? If we disgust you so, surely it is you, our leader, who is responsible?
translation: 那该怪谁呢，德拉坎？如果我们让你如此厌恶，那肯定是你这位领袖的责任吧？

english: And who was it who changed all that, brother?
translation: 那又是谁改变了这一切，兄弟？

english: And you think this friend might have been here? Well, could you describe them?
translation: 你觉得那个朋友可能来过这儿？嗯，你能形容一下他们吗？

english: And you. So where do we start?
translation: 那你呢？我们从哪里开始？

english: Anna Sinclair asked me to defend her in court in exchange for showing me a secret passage into Camelot. I accepted the deal.
translation: Anna Sinclair 让我在法庭上为她辩护，作为交换，她会告诉我一条通往卡美洛的秘密通道。我接受了这个交易。

english: Anna Sinclair told me how to get into Camelot.
translation: 安娜·辛克莱告诉了我如何进入卡美洛。

english: Answer three out of six questions correctly to succeed.
translation: 正确回答六道题中的三道即为成功。

english: Any ideas so far?
translation: 有什么线索吗？

english: Any sapling you can plant
translation: 你可以种下的任何树苗

english: Any seed that can be planted directly
translation: 可直接种植的种子

english: Any thoughts on what I should do now?
translation: 你觉得我现在该做什么？

english: Any thoughts on what to do next?
translation: 接下来有什么打算吗？

english: Anything you can do...
translation: 你能做到的一切...

english: Anyway, the reason I brought up that spear is because of the other component used to make it.
translation: 总之，我提起那支矛是因为制作它的另一种材料。

english: Apparently he had never seen a troll. Of course, that was about to change...
translation: 看来他从没见过巨魔。当然，这马上要变了……

english: Apparently the Brewing Equipment has become possessed.
translation: 看来酿造设备被鬼附身了。

english: Apparently this squire hid Ivandis' writings within Paterdomus itself. Any idea what that might mean, Drezel?
translation: 看来那个侍从把伊凡迪斯的作品藏在了帕特多穆斯里面。你有什么想法吗，德雷泽尔？

english: Apparently, the attack is meant to be a distraction so the Basilisks can free their king, the Jormungand.
translation: 显然，这次攻击旨在分散注意力，以便蛇怪们能解救它们的国王——约尔蒙甘德。

english: Araxxor covers you in venom. It slowly drips off you and covers the floor.
translation: 阿拉克索将毒液浇遍你全身。毒液缓缓滴落，流淌到地面上。

english: Ardougne, Varrock, Keldagrim and Port Sarim
translation: 阿杜因、维洛克、凯尔达格林与沙林港

english: Are you doing okay, Ivan?
translation: 你还好吗，伊凡？

english: Are you okay, Ivan?
translation: 你还好吗，伊凡？

english: Are you ready to go in, my child?
translation: 准备好了吗，我的孩子？

english: Are you ready to leave the shrine?
translation: 你准备好离开神龛了吗？

english: Are you sure you want to claim your loot?
translation: 确定要领取你的战利品吗？

english: Are you sure you want to exit?
translation: 确定要退出吗？

english: Are you sure you want to make this trade?
translation: 你确定要交易吗？

english: Aren't you afraid?
translation: 你不害怕吗？

english: Arianwyn asked me to infiltrate the Mourners to discover their plans. He told me about large numbers of Mourners that had been seen crossing the mountain pass through Arandar. I killed one of these Mourners and took their uniform to use as a disguise.
translation: Arianwyn让我潜入哀悼者组织，探查他们的计划。他提到曾有大量哀悼者穿越Arandar的山隘。我杀了一名哀悼者，取走其制服作为伪装。

english: Arianwyn called a meeting to discuss the recent events.
translation: Arianwyn召集了一次会议讨论近期事件。

english: Arianwyn summoned Eluned so that she could create a Replacement Crystal.
translation: Arianwyn召唤了Eluned，以便她能制作一颗替代水晶。

english: As I say, I was looking for you.
translation: 如我所说，我一直在找你。

english: As I wasn't allowed through the main entrance of Weiss, I snuck in through a gap in the fence, hoping the sentries would not catch me.
translation: 由于无法通过韦斯的主入口，我便透过栅栏的缝隙偷偷潜入，希望哨兵们不会发现我。

english: As Rennard knew that Zamorak was not fully trusted by the god, he suspected that Kharrim might have betrayed him by taking the message to Zamorak instead of to the god.
translation: 雷纳德知道萨莫拉克并未完全获得主神的信任，于是他怀疑卡里姆可能背叛了他，将消息送给了萨莫拉克而非主神。

english: As a White Knight I can buy Armour and weaponry from Sir Vyvin in Falador Castle.
translation: 作为白骑士，我可以在法多雷城堡的维文爵士处购买盔甲和武器。

english: As a reward I was given an Initiate Helm, and the option to change my respawn point between Falador and Lumbridge.
translation: 作为奖励，我获得了一顶见习头盔，并且可以选择将重生点设在法尔多或伦布里奇。

english: As a reward for getting the Fishing Competition Trophy the Dwarves will let me use their tunnel to travel quickly and safely under White Wolf Mountain anytime I wish.
translation: 作为获得钓鱼大赛奖杯的奖励，矮人会允许我随时使用他们的隧道，快速安全地穿越白狼山。

english: As a reward he showed me some herblore techniques.
translation: 作为奖励，他教了我一些草药学技巧。

english: As proclaimed by the Census
translation: 根据人口普查

english: As ready as I'll ever be. What about you?
translation: 我已准备妥当。你呢？

english: As soon as you're ready.
translation: 随时可以开始。

english: As the Great Olm collapses, the crystal blocking your exit has been shattered.
translation: 巨大奥姆倒塌之际，挡在出口的水晶已被震碎。

english: As the last light turns on, you hear the latch release.
translation: 最后一盏灯亮起时，你听到门闩松开的声响。

english: As you didn't damage the Hueycoatl's body enough, you will receive fewer rewards.
translation: 由于你对休尤科特尔身体造成的伤害不足，你将获得较少的奖励。

english: As you pass the barrier, it saps your health.
translation: 穿过屏障时，你的生命被汲取。

english: As you pass through the barrier, a sense of dread washes over you.
translation: 穿过屏障时，一股恐惧感涌遍全身。

english: Asgarnia: Mudskipper Point
translation: 阿司盖尼亚：泥跳鱼角

english: At Gordon's request, I mounted the Fake Head inside his home. Gordon seemed very happy with the result and rewarded me.
translation: 遵高登之请，我将假头颅装在了他家中。高登对此很是满意，并给了我酬劳。

english: At Hazeel's suggestion, I return to the Carnillean Mansion to question the family and staff about the murder. Claus, the family chef, mentioned feeling a strange cold sensation down in the Kitchen at the time of the murder. I then found a passage leading to a Hidden Room while exploring the Kitchen.
translation: 根据哈泽尔的建议，我回到卡尼尔庄园询问家人和佣人关于谋杀案的情况。家族厨师克劳斯提到，案发时他在厨房中感到一股奇怪的寒意。随后，我在探索厨房时发现了一条通往隐藏房间的通道。

english: At Steve's suggestion, I spoke with Ribs, the previous owner of the Map and a regular at The Pandemonium. He believed the Medallion taken by Will and Anne to be cursed, and suggested I might want to try and hunt them down.
translation: 按史蒂夫的建议，我跟地图的前主人、潘德蒙尼姆的老主顾里布斯聊了聊。他认为威尔和安妮拿走的勋章是被诅咒的，并建议我或许该去追捕他们。

english: At the Forthos Ruin, I found an odd Panel with another Riddle behind it.
translation: 在福索斯遗迹，我发现了一个奇怪的石板，后面藏着另一个谜题。

english: At the end of his tale, Viggora mused that the only way for the curse to be broken would be for the Empty Lord to return to the world and lift the curse himself, though Viggora preferred to remain as a ghost than to return to the service of that god. He gave me a ghostly cape in thanks for telling him about the other ghosts I had met.
translation: 故事结尾，维戈拉沉吟着说，破除诅咒的唯一方法就是空之主重返世间并亲手解除它——不过比起重新侍奉那位神明，维戈拉宁愿保持幽灵之身。他赠给我一件幽灵披风，感谢我向他讲述遇见的其他幽灵。

english: At the heart of the pyramid I found a strange being, who gave me some powerful new magic spells.
translation: 在金字塔的中心，我发现了一个奇怪的存在，它给了我一些强大的新魔法咒语。

english: At the suggestion of Prince Itzla and Servius, I spoke to Metzli about the Final Dawn. She explained that in Varlamore, it is often believed that the world will one day end, with it then being recreated by Ralos and Ranul. She told me that those who believe in the Final Dawn think it is their destiny to bring about this end of the world.
translation: 遵照伊茨拉王子和塞维乌斯的建议，我与梅茨莉谈论了终焉黎明。她解释道，在瓦拉莫雷，世人常信世界终有一日终结，随后由拉洛斯与拉努尔重塑新生。她告诉我，信奉终焉黎明者认为，他们的宿命便是推动这场世界末日降临。

english: At this proximity, a nearby maxilla beast becomes aware of your presence...
translation: 如此靠近，附近一只颚骨兽察觉到了你的存在……

english: Attack potion (2)
translation: 攻击药水(2)

english: Attacker level up complete
translation: 攻击者等级提升完成。

english: Auburn Valley.
translation: 赤谷。

english: Auguste thinks if he pumps hot air into a sack it will rise and take us along with it. But we're going to run some tests first.
translation: 奥古斯特觉得，如果往袋子里充热气，袋子就会飞起来，还能带着我们升空。不过，我们得先做几个试验。

english: Authorised members of the clan may assign titles to the ranks within the clan hierarchy.
translation: 家族授权的成员可为家族层级中的等级分配头衔。

english: Ava has asked me for undead chickens. One will go towards making her bed more comfortable, the other will be used in some unexplained reward for me.
translation: 艾娃让我找些不死鸡。一只用来让她的床更舒适，另一只则作为她给我的神秘奖励。

english: Ava's reward for me is an arrow attracting and creating backpack.
translation: 艾娃给我的奖励是一个能吸引和制造箭矢的背包。

english: Avan gave me his crest piece in return for a ruby ring and ruby necklace made of high quality 'perfect gold'.
translation: 阿凡给了我他的徽章碎片，作为用高品质“纯金”制作的红宝石戒指和红宝石项链的回报。

english: Avan, Caleb and Jonathon didn't need anything done for them despite my greatest endeavours to help them out.
translation: 尽管我竭尽全力想帮忙，阿凡、卡莱布和乔纳森却什么都不需要我为他们做。

english: Awusah asked me to look around Nardah for clues as to why the town's water source had dried up.
translation: 阿乌萨让我去纳尔达赫附近调查镇子水源干涸的原因。

english: B: Champions' Guild
translation: B: 勇士公会

english: Baba Yaga told me to make a potion from Guam leaf, Marrentill leaf and a Suqah Tooth. I can then give this to the Oneiromancer I have given the potion to Oneiromancer to look after for me, she has told me to make a Lunar Staff. This I can do by using a Dramen staff on: the Air Altar then the Fire Altar then the Water Altar then the Earth Altar.
translation: 芭芭雅嘎让我用瓜姆叶、马兰蒂尔叶和一只苏卡赫之牙制作药水。之后我能把药水交给解梦者保管，她让我制作一根月之法杖。我只需将德拉门法杖依次注入：风之祭坛、火之祭坛、水之祭坛、地之祭坛即可。

english: Back at the Myreque Hideout, Flaygian looked over the Old Notes to see if they contained any information about the vampyre weakness. However, the notes turned out to be bait planted by Vanstrom. With an attack potentially imminent, we decided to evacuate immediately.
translation: 回到麦尔奎特藏身处，弗莱吉安翻阅了旧笔记，想从中找到关于吸血鬼弱点的线索。但那些笔记是凡斯特罗姆设下的诱饵。迫在眉睫的威胁使我们必须立刻撤离。

english: Back at the Myreque Hideout, Veliaf declared the Myreque dead and left in defeat. Ivan however, chose to remain in Meiyerditch.
translation: 回到密使的藏身处，维利夫宣布密使已死并沮丧离开。然而伊凡选择留在梅耶迪奇。

english: Back to where they died? Back to where we lost?
translation: 回到他们丧命的地方？回到我们战败的地方？

english: Bailey has cooked up a dead sea slug into a clear paste. I should use this to repair the page fragments.
translation: 贝利已将一只死海蛞蝓熬制成透明糊状物。我该用它来修复那些书页碎片。

english: Bank depositing is available in Vampyrium, but withdrawing is not. As such, you should make sure you're well equipped before your journey begins. That said, grit and perseverance will matter far more than your weapons and armour.
translation: 在吸血鬼之地（Vampyrium）可以存入银行，但无法取出。因此，出发前务必确保装备齐全。话虽如此，坚韧与毅力远比你的武器和盔甲更重要。

english: Because no matter what, someone will always choose to keep fighting. Because the thing that we fight for will never die.
translation: 因为无论如何，总会有人选择继续战斗。我们为之奋战的东西，永远不会消亡。

english: Because you seem to think this is me beaten, but you're mistaken. My brother would tell you that he alone united us, but were it not for me, we might still be dining at the behest of Lord Jovkai.
translation: 你似乎觉得我输了，但你错了。我兄弟会告诉你他独自统一了我们，但若非有我，我们或许还在乔夫凯大人的命令下用餐。

english: Before I could attack him though, he jumped into a magic portal and escaped!
translation: 我还没来得及攻击他，他就跳进一个魔法传送门逃走了！

english: Before he died, Ivandis Seergaze set out on one final attempt to kill Drakan. It seems he was aware of a tunnel leading directly into Castle Drakan.
translation: 伊凡迪斯·西尔盖兹在临终前最后一次试图刺杀德拉肯。他似乎知道一条直通德拉肯城堡的地道。

english: Before we could do anything else, Safalaan attacked us, injuring both Veliaf and Vanescula.
translation: 我们还没来得及做别的，萨法拉恩就袭击了我们，打伤了维利亚夫和瓦内斯库拉。

english: Before we could evacuate, the Myreque Hideout was attacked by the Abomination. It killed multiple members of the Myreque, including Flaygian. However, we managed to defeat it.
translation: 我们还没能撤离，梅里奎藏身处就遭到了憎恶的袭击。它杀害了包括法拉吉安在内的多名梅里奎成员。不过，我们最终击败了它。

english: Before we head through, it's probably worth us having a quick look around here. Those weird shrines look interesting...
translation: 进去之前，我们最好先快速查看一下周围。那些奇怪的祭坛看起来很有趣……

english: Begin the raid.
translation: 开始突袭。

english: Believe what you want, <osrscn-name-0>. It won't matter soon anyway.
translation: 随你怎么想吧，<osrscn-name-0>。反正很快就无关紧要了。

english: Besides, I think it's safe to say that given the impending festival, they'll have... more important matters to worry about.
translation: 再说了，眼看节庆将至，他们肯定有...更重要的事要操心。

english: Best we keep moving, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 我们最好继续前进，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: Best you get to it, <osrscn-name-0>. I'll keep an eye on things here.
translation: 快去忙吧，<osrscn-name-0>。这儿我盯着。

english: Bill has asked me to hole the enemy ship, preventing them from following us and learnin' them to mess with us. I will need to add gunpowder to the cannon, tamp the charge with a ramrod, add a cannonball, then use fuse on the cannon and fire it. Afterwards I will need to use the ramrod on the cannon to clean it, mostly to stop it from exploding.
translation: 比尔让我给敌舰打个洞，让他们没法追我们，也给他们个教训。得先往火炮里装火药，用推弹杆压实，再塞炮弹，接着拿引信点炮开火。完事后还得用推弹杆清理炮管，主要怕它炸膛。

english: Bill wants me to fire the cannon at the enemy ship, but did not tell me how. Having fixed the cannon I should go and ask him how to do it.
translation: 比尔要我对敌船开炮，却没告诉我怎么操作。修好大炮后，我得去问问他方法。

english: Bill wants me to take ten loads of Plunder from the enemy hold and put them into the chest in our hold.
translation: 比尔让我从敌方货舱运送十批掠夺品，放入我方货舱的箱子中。

english: Blasphemy (II)
translation: 亵渎（II）

english: Blasphemy! That's what it means! This journal clearly can't be trusted!
translation: 亵渎！就是这个意思！这本日志显然不可信！

english: Blood moon set to rise over Morytania!
translation: 血月即将笼罩莫里塔尼亚！

english: Board friend's boat
translation: 搭乘朋友的船

english: Boat Size: Medium (3x10)
translation: 船只尺寸：中型（3x10）

english: Boat Size: Small (2x5)
translation: 船只尺寸：小型（2x5）

english: Bob & Neite seem very happy, they had a wonderful time away together!
translation: Bob & Neite 看起来很开心，他们一起外出度过了美好的时光！

english: Bob went home to see Unferth. I've decided I agree with my cat, I don't like Unferth very much.
translation: 鲍勃回家去看安弗斯了。我决定同意我的猫的看法，我不太喜欢安弗斯。

english: Bonafido says I can go into the tower if I dress up like a builder. I should be able to find some clothing around the tower.
translation: Bonafido说如果我打扮成建筑工就可以进塔。我应该能在塔附近找到些衣服。

english: Bottled storm x 1
translation: 瓶装风暴 × 1

english: Bravek, the City Warder, gave me a Warrant to enter the Plague House in return for a Hangover Cure.
translation: 城市守卫布拉维克给了我一张进入瘟疫屋的搜查令，作为醒酒药的回报。

english: Brimstail asked me to visit Hazelmere and ask him about Oaknock's machine and gnomish history.
translation: 布里姆斯泰尔让我去拜访哈泽米尔，向他询问奥克诺克的机器和侏儒的历史。

english: Brimstail has shown me a strange machine built by a famous gnomish hero - Oaknock.
translation: Brimstail向我展示了一台由著名侏儒英雄Oaknock制造的奇异机器。

english: Brimstail has told me about his researches into old gnomish magic.
translation: Brimstail告诉我，他正在研究古老的侏儒魔法。

english: Brutus enters. The cows scatter.
translation: 布鲁图斯入场。奶牛四散奔逃。

english: Burgher of Neitiznot has asked me to get 8 split arctic pine logs.
translation: 我要给Neitiznot居民弄8根裂开的北极松原木。

english: Buried beneath the ground, who knows where it's found.
translation: 深埋地底，踪迹难觅。

english: Burntmeat introduced me to Wolfbone, a visiting troll from a town called Weiss. The trolls wanted to arrange a knowledge exchange, whereby the Stronghold trolls would teach the Weiss trolls their inventions, and in return the Weiss trolls would teach the Stronghold trolls about theirs.
translation: Burntmeat介绍我认识了Wolfbone，一个来自Weiss镇的访客巨魔。这些巨魔想安排一次知识交流，让要塞巨魔教Weiss巨魔他们的发明，作为交换，Weiss巨魔也教要塞巨魔他们的发明。

english: Burntmeat told me about a man he'd recently cooked. He said the man was carrying some goutweed that he claimed to have grown himself. Burntmeat didn't know humans could grow goutweed.
translation: Burntmeat 告诉我他最近烹饪了一个人。他说那人带着一些自称自种的痛风草。Burntmeat 不知道人类也能种痛风草。

english: Bury it anyway.
translation: 埋了吧。

english: But I'm not! I gave it to you!
translation: 可我不是！我把钱给你了！

english: But Ivan's still alive! This isn't over yet!
translation: 但是伊万还活着！这还没完！

english: But Safalaan... Icyene blood runs through his veins... He has the potential to be unstoppable!
translation: 但萨法拉安...他身上流淌着冰霜血族的血脉...他有着无可阻挡的潜力！

english: But even if you succeed here... Even if it is you who will rise and I who will fall... it does not matter, for I am right where I need to be...
translation: 但即便你在此处成功……即便胜者是你、败者是我……那也无所谓，因为我已身处该在之处……

english: But it could be anywhere!
translation: 但它可能在任何一个地方！

english: But maybe she was lying, or maybe there are ways in even she didn't know about.
translation: 但也许她在撒谎，或者有些连她都不知道的通道。

english: But now we've revealed ourselves, meaning Drakan will come for us. We need to leave.
translation: 但如今我们已暴露身份，德拉坎会来找我们。我们得走了。

english: But now, standing here before you, I realise I haven't. Even after all that's happened! Even after all that you've done! I still believe in you!
translation: 但此刻，站在你面前，我意识到我从未放弃。哪怕经历了这一切！哪怕你做了那些事！我依然相信你！

english: But the son chose to stay.
translation: 但儿子选择了留下。

english: But when he arrived, he sat himself at the head of our table. He presented us with a banquet that he had brought himself.
translation: 但他到来时，却坐在了我们的主位上，还自己带来了宴席款待我们。

english: But who are they? The ones in the hoods... I've seen people like that before, back in Morytania.
translation: 可他们是谁呢？那些穿兜帽的家伙……我在莫里塔尼亚见过这样的人。

english: But would that even work? The whole point of this festival is to gather the blood needed to use it.
translation: 但这能行得通吗？这个庆典的核心目的就是收集所需的鲜血来使用它。

english: But, I must confess, you speak the truth, for you are all indeed my failing. A failing that today, I will finally begin to set right.
translation: 但，我不得不承认，你说得对，你们都是我的失败之作。那是个今天我终于要开始纠正的失误。

english: But, even after all that, I still had to complete a physical! It was an agility course, but I had to do it in my penguin suit. I saw a regiment doing drills. They look quite dangerous.
translation: 但就算这样，我还得通过体能测试！那是个敏捷训练场，但我得穿着企鹅装完成。我看见一队士兵在操练，看起来相当危险。

english: Buying: Aether rune
translation: 收购：以太符文

english: By following the code on the note I was able to find a key.
translation: 按着纸条上的代码，我找到了一把钥匙。

english: By igniting the driftwood under Ithoi's hut, I made him run out, proving he'd faked his illness. I also saw him cast a magic spell, showing he has some magical combat ability.
translation: 我点燃了伊索伊小屋下的浮木，逼他跑了出来，证明他装病。还见他施了魔法，显露出一定的魔法战斗能力。

english: By setting a trap on the Gate to the Cattle enclosure, I was able to cover the Beast in Flour and track it back to its Lair.
translation: 通过在牛圈大门上设下陷阱，我用面粉覆盖了野兽的身躯，循迹找到了它的巢穴。

english: By using the third Treasure Scroll, I managed to find an Ancient Casket.
translation: 使用第三张宝藏卷轴，我找到了一个古老的宝箱。

english: C : Watchtower
translation: C：瞭望塔

english: C: Your house (Rimmington)
translation: C: 你的房屋（里明顿）

english: Call it insurance.
translation: 就当作是保险吧。

english: Can be given advanced permissions
translation: 可以被授予高级权限。

english: Can you hear many other people around here?
translation: 你能听到这附近有很多其他人吗？

english: Can you not wait a bit longer? I sent a letter to the King!
translation: 你就不能多等一会儿吗？我给国王送了封信！

english: Cancel the alchemy spell.
translation: 取消炼金术咒语。

english: Cannot have advanced permissions
translation: 无法拥有高级权限

english: Captain Tock mentioned that the curse had begun straight after the crew's dinner, although Ithoi wasn't there to eat that meal.
translation: 托克船长提到，诅咒是在船员晚餐结束后立即开始的，尽管伊索伊当时并没有一起用餐。

english: Captain Tock thanked me for all my help.
translation: 托克船长感谢了我所有的帮助。

english: Cassius has offered me the chance to share the profits of his upcoming milk business, in exchange for a bit of help setting it up.
translation: 卡修斯想让我帮忙筹建他的新牛奶生意,作为回报,他答应让我分享未来的利润。

english: Cast High Level Alchemy?
translation: 施放高级炼金术？

english: Castle Drakan?! You have no hope of getting in there!
translation: 德拉肯城堡？！你休想进入那里！

english: Census of King Rada III
translation: 拉达三世国王人口普查

english: Change the time on the clock?
translation: 调整时钟的时间？

english: Chapter I I have shown King Narnode evidence suggesting that Glough may have fled to Ape Atoll with the assistance of the hot air balloon pilot, Le Smith.
translation: 第一章 我向纳尔诺德国王出示了证据，表明格劳可能已在热气球驾驶员勒·史密斯的协助下逃往猿猴岛。

english: Chapter II I have returned to Ape Atoll by order of King Narnode.
translation: 第二章 我奉纳尔诺德国王之命回到猿猴岛。

english: Chapter III I have defeated the leaders of the trolls and ogres, and they have agreed to back down from their proposed alliance with the monkeys.
translation: 第三章 我已击败巨魔和食人魔的首领，他们同意退出与猴子结盟的提议。

english: Chapter IV Nieve and I fought off some of the creatures which breached the Stronghold.
translation: 第四章 尼夫与我击退了攻入要塞的部分怪物。

english: Chapter V I have defeated Glough, Nieve sacrificed herself in the process.
translation: 第五章 我已击败格劳，涅芙在过程中牺牲了自己。

english: Charge the scythe
translation: 为镰刀充能

english: Chieftain Brundt and I managed to defeat the Jormungand's Generals within the prison.
translation: 我和酋长布伦特成功在监狱中击败了耶梦加得的将军们。

english: Chisel.
translation: 凿子。

english: Choose a character
translation: 选择角色

english: Chop, chop, chop away!
translation: 砍，砍，砍个不停！

english: Claim & Leave
translation: 认领并离开

english: Claiming your loot early will forfeit your run, not allowing you to proceed any further.
translation: 提前领取奖励将导致挑战失败，无法继续前进。

english: Click an item to begin.
translation: 点击一个物品开始。

english: Climbing down through the hatch I found a new area in the workshop; there are 4 machines on this level to fix:
translation: 从舱口爬下来后，我在工作室里发现了一个新区域；这一层有4台机器需要修理：

english: Col. O'Niall has explained that some of the people in Witchaven are acting very strangely. The mayor has been buying large quantities of items that Witchaven shouldn't need. He recommends I speak to the following people: Holgart.
translation: 奥尼尔上校解释说，维奇镇有些居民行为古怪。镇长一直在大量购买维奇镇本不需要的物品。他建议我去找以下这些人谈谈：霍尔加特。

english: Collector level up complete
translation: 收集者等级提升完成

english: Combat Facilities:
translation: 战斗设施：

english: Combat Facilities: None
translation: 战斗设施：无

english: Combat Task Completed!
translation: 战斗任务完成！

english: Come on, <osrscn-name-0>, look at me. Even other vampyres consider me an abomination... At least let me find some humour in all of this.
translation: 来嘛，<osrscn-name-0>，看着我。连其他吸血鬼都觉得我是异类……至少让我在这件事里找点乐子吧。

english: Come on. Best we keep moving.
translation: 走吧。我们最好继续赶路。

english: Come with me! Now!
translation: 跟我来！快点！

english: Comes with a pre-built basic cargo hold.
translation: 自带预建的基础货舱。

english: Communicating in numbers.
translation: 用数字交流。

english: Completely remove it.
translation: 彻底移除它。

english: Congratulations! You caught the evil twin.
translation: 恭喜！你抓住了邪恶的双胞胎。

english: Congratulations, you've completed a quest: The Blood Moon Rises
translation: 恭喜你，完成了一个任务：血月升起

english: Convenience fee: 2%
translation: 便利费：2%

english: Cor blimey, mate! What are ye doing in me pockets?
translation: 天呐，伙计！你在掏我口袋干嘛？

english: Cosmic entity's plane
translation: 宇宙实体的层面

english: Could I have those supplies you found?
translation: 能把找到的补给给我吗？

english: Could you remind me who the Seven Priestly Warriors were?
translation: 你能提醒我一下七祭司战士是谁吗？

english: Craft a diamond sickle?
translation: 打造钻石镰刀？

english: Craft an enhanced blisterwood sickle?
translation: 制作一把增强型水疱木镰刀？

english: Crafters must be teleported
translation: 必须传送工匠

english: Creating the elemental mind helm was easy with the book for instruction.
translation: 有了这本书作指导，制作元素精神头盔真是轻而易举。

english: Creation Date:
translation: 创建日期：

english: Crew capacity: 2/2
translation: 船员容量：2/2

english: Crystal mine key
translation: 水晶矿洞钥匙

english: Crystal mine key.
translation: 水晶矿钥匙。

english: Cyrisus is coming along well. I should talk to him to make sure.
translation: Cyrisus进展得不错。我得去问问他确认一下。

english: D: Poison Waste
translation: D: 剧毒废土

english: Dallas and I went to the House on the Hill on Fossil Island.
translation: 达拉斯和我去了化石岛的山顶小屋。

english: Darkness begins to surround Nex.
translation: 黑暗开始笼罩Nex。

english: Deeper into the forest! Quick!
translation: 快往森林深处去！

english: Defence.
translation: 防御。

english: Defender level up complete
translation: 防御者等级提升完成。

english: Demonic Pacts Relichunter (tier 3)
translation: 恶魔契约圣物猎人（3级）

english: Denulth gave me some Steel claws and trained me in attack.
translation: Denulth给了我一些钢爪，并训练了我的攻击技能。

english: Deposit some items.
translation: 存入一些物品。

english: Despite being dead, I was still able to talk to Snothead inside the Goblin Crypt by standing over his Grave and saying his name.
translation: 即便已经死去，我仍能站在哥布林地窟中斯诺特海德的坟墓上，念出他的名字与他交谈。

english: Despite being injured, Metzli was able to flee deeper into the Ruins. Itzla and I followed her and found her in an Empty Chamber. Having completely searched the Ruins, Metzli came to the conclusion they were empty and accepted defeat.
translation: 尽管梅茨利受了伤，但她仍成功逃进了废墟深处。伊茨拉和我紧随其后，在一间空荡的密室中找到了她。彻底搜查废墟后，梅茨利认定此处空无一物，只得认输。

english: Despite having only just been rescued, Itzla volunteered to join me in following the two down into the Caverns.
translation: 虽然刚刚获救，伊茨拉仍主动与我一同追踪那两人深入洞穴。

english: Despite my attempt to stop him, Sliske was able to escape with it. Although I failed to stop Sliske, Azzanadra still thanked me for my efforts. He then warned me to prepare for the battles to come.
translation: 尽管我试图阻止他，斯利斯基仍带着它逃走了。虽然我没能成功阻止斯利斯基，但阿赞德拉仍然感谢我的努力。他随后警告我为接下来的战斗做好准备。

english: Despite this loss, they vowed to continue the fight against Lucien and promised they'd contact me again once they had a plan.
translation: 尽管遭受了这次失败，他们誓言要继续对抗Lucien，并承诺一旦有了计划就会再次与我联系。

english: Devilish Oxen Roll!
translation: 恶魔蛮牛翻滚！

english: Dezzick told me to make a bronze dagger with the bronze bar I had smelted. To that end, he handed me a hammer and pointed me to the anvils.
translation: Dezzick让我用熔炼好的铜条制作一把铜匕首。为此，他给了我一把锤子并指向铁砧。

english: Dhalak did not know exactly what happened when Zamorak attacked his god with the Staff of Armadyl, but was sure that a swordsman called Viggora would know. Viggora had been a mighty warrior in the army of Zamorak, and would have therefore fought alongside Zamorak in the attack. He gave me a ghostly hat and told me to find Viggora.
translation: Dhalak并不确切知晓Zamorak用Staff of Armadyl袭击其神时发生了什么，但他确信一位名叫Viggora的剑士定会知晓。Viggora曾是Zamorak军中一位强大的战士，因此在袭击中与Zamorak并肩作战。他给了我一顶幽灵帽子，并让我去寻找Viggora。

english: Dhalak knew that Zamorak's god would be able to sense the power of the staff, so he would be forewarned if Zamorak attempted to use the staff against him. Without telling Saradomin of the situation, Dhalak cast a spell of concealment on the Staff of Armadyl, making it possible for Zamorak to use the staff against his god without the god realising the danger. Zamorak never knew of Dhalak's interference.
translation: 达拉克深知，萨拉多明的神祇能够感知权杖的力量，一旦萨拉多明试图用权杖对抗神祇，神祇便会提前警觉。于是，他瞒着萨拉多明，在阿玛迪尔权杖上施加了一道隐匿咒语，使萨拉多明得以在不惊动神祇的情况下反戈一击，而神祇全然不知危险将至。萨拉多明对达拉克的暗中介入始终蒙在鼓里。

english: Did something go wrong? This room looks very similar to the one we just left...
translation: 出了什么问题吗？这个房间和刚才那个几乎一模一样……

english: Did you know? Eating a strange fruit cures poison and venom as well as restoring run energy.
translation: 你知道吗？吃一颗怪异的果实可以治疗中毒，还能恢复跑动能量。

english: Did you know? If you hold any anti-poison or anti-venom potions, clicking on the health orb while poisoned will cure you without cancelling your actions.
translation: 你知道吗？当你中毒时，持有解毒或抗毒药剂点击生命球即可治愈，且不会中断当前行动。

english: Did you know? Most bosses which are not instanced have a right-click 'peek' option on or near their entrance that lets you see how many people are currently fighting it.
translation: 你知道吗？大多数非副本的Boss，在入口处或附近右键点击“窥视”，就能看到当前有多少人在战斗。

english: Did you know? You can smash barrels in the Viyeldi caves for a chance at random treasure, including noted cooked sharks.
translation: 你知道吗？在维耶尔迪洞穴里敲碎木桶有机会获得随机宝藏，包括带注的熟鲨鱼。

english: Did you know? You can use the Humidify Lunar spell to water all of your saplings at once.
translation: 你知道吗？使用“潮涌”月之法术可以一次性浇灌所有树苗。

english: Die vampyre scum!
translation: 去死吧，吸血鬼杂碎！

english: Dig for treasure
translation: 挖掘宝藏

english: Dig up the Soul Bearer
translation: 挖掘灵魂承载者

english: Dimintheis informed me that he will contact his sons to inform them of my assistance. I can now receive additional pairs of gauntlets.
translation: 迪敏西斯告诉我，他会联系他的儿子们告知我的协助。我现在可以领取更多手套了。

english: Discard items to reduce a fee.
translation: 丢弃物品以减少费用。

english: Do I look like I need help?
translation: 你觉得我看起来需要帮助吗？

english: Do not mention it.
translation: 不用谢。

english: Do not take too long, my child.
translation: 别拖太久，孩子。

english: Do you have any better ideas?
translation: 你有更好的主意吗？

english: Do you mind if I ask about your family?
translation: 不介意我问问你的家人吧？

english: Do you really wish to go there?
translation: 你真想去那儿吗？

english: Do you remember this place, Vanescula?
translation: 你还记得这个地方吗，凡妮丝拉？

english: Do you think things will be okay between you and Ivan?
translation: 你觉得你和伊万之间会没事吗？

english: Document the Tomes
translation: 记录书卷

english: Dodging the sentries, I managed to reach the cave entrance, with the trolls in hot pursuit.
translation: 躲过哨兵，我成功到达洞穴入口，身后巨魔紧追不舍。

english: Don't begin the raid yet.
translation: 先别开始副本。

english: Don't happen to have any diamonds lying around, do you?
translation: 你身边不会正好有钻石吧？

english: Don't let these garments mess up your hairstyle.
translation: 别让这些衣服弄乱你的发型。

english: Don't misunderstand me human, for I agree with you. What we did to your kind... at the time it seemed so necessary...
translation: 别误会我，人类，我同意你的看法。我们对你族人做的那些事……当时看来是如此必要……

english: Don't worry, Drezel, we will.
translation: 别担心，德雷泽，我们会做到的。

english: Don't worry, Safalaan. We'll be out of here soon.
translation: 别担心，萨法拉恩。我们很快就能离开这里了。

english: Dondakan the dwarf wants me to help him break through a seemingly impenetrable rock.
translation: 矮人唐达肯想让我帮他凿开一块看似坚不可摧的岩石。

english: Doric rewarded me for all my hard work.
translation: 多里克奖励了我所有的辛勤工作。

english: Dr Oddenstein thanked me for helping fix his machine We turned Ernest back to normal and he rewarded me QUEST COMPLETE!
translation: 奥登斯坦医生感谢我帮他修好了机器。我们把厄内斯特变回了正常状态，他奖励了我。任务完成！

english: Drag stacks of items to this
translation: 将物品堆叠拖至此处

english: Drag the spinning beehive parts into the right slots, then select Confirm.
translation: 将旋转的蜂巢部件拖入正确槽位，然后选择确认。

english: Drakan arrived and started his attack on the Palace, but we were able to slow him down long enough for the Portal to be completed. However, during Drakan's attack, Vanescula was able to escape and capture Safalaan. In the commotion, the Portal was damaged, causing it to send all of us back to Morytania.
translation: 德莱坎抵达并开始进攻宫殿，但我们成功拖延了他足够长的时间，让传送门得以完成。然而，在德莱坎进攻期间，瓦内斯库拉趁机逃脱并俘虏了萨法拉恩。混乱中传送门受损，导致我们所有人被送回了摩里塔尼亚。

english: Drakan is powerful, it is true. Indeed, he is one of the most powerful beings I have ever encountered. And yet, he is not immortal.
translation: 德拉肯确实强大，他是我遇到过的最强大的存在之一。但他并非不死的。

english: Drakan. You take it.
translation: 德拉肯。你拿着吧。

english: Dramen or lunar staff
translation: 德拉门或月牙法杖

english: Due to our limited presence, we had to prioritise our efforts carefully. Our numbers were too low for direct action, so we were limited to either spying or recruiting locals to assist us.
translation: 由于我们存在感薄弱，我们不得不谨慎分配精力。人数过少无法直接行动，只能选择侦察或招募当地协助者。

english: Dungeons: Dorgesh-Kaan cave
translation: 地牢：多尔盖什-卡恩洞穴

english: Dungeons: Mor Ul Rek
translation: 地下城：莫·乌尔·雷克

english: Dungeons: Myreque hideout under The Hollows
translation: 地牢：霍洛威下的迈里奎藏身处

english: Dunt ignore your mate, <osrscn-name-0>!
translation: 别不理你的伙计，<osrscn-name-0>！

english: During the quest I found a quicker route between Mort'ton and Canifis, and I feel that I better understand the reason for the darkness of Morytania.
translation: 任务中我找到了一条摩顿与卡尼法斯之间的捷径，也更理解摩里塔尼亚黑暗的缘由了。

english: During the speech, Itzla was brought out from a Dungeon directly below the Temple.
translation: 演讲期间，伊茨拉从神庙正下方的地牢中被带出。

english: E: Fishing Guild
translation: 东：钓鱼公会

english: Eadgar wants to make a fake human to give the Troll Cook. I gave Eadgar everything he needed.
translation: 埃德加想做一个假人给巨魔厨师。我已经给了他所需的一切。

english: Edward hands you a puzzlebox!
translation: 爱德华递给你一个谜盒！

english: Efaritay Hallow? You're Safalaan's mother! But how are you here? How are you alive?
translation: 艾法里塔·哈洛？你是萨法兰的母亲！但你怎么会在这里？你怎么还活着？

english: Efaritay then took him back to Darkmeyer, but I chose to stay for a while and watch the sun rise over the ruins of Hallowvale.
translation: 艾法瑞泰便带他回了暗梅尔，但我选择多留一会儿，看着太阳在霍洛韦尔的废墟上升起。

english: Efaritay!
translation: 伊法里泰！

english: Ehem... Mistress <osrscn-name-0>?
translation: 咳咳...<osrscn-name-0>小姐？

english: Elemental workshop key.
translation: 元素工坊钥匙。

english: Elena asked me to take some items to Guidor in Varrock so that he could run his own tests on the Plague Sample.
translation: 埃琳娜让我带些物品给瓦洛克城的吉多尔，让他能用自己的方法检验那个瘟疫样本。

english: Elias and I climbed through the Trapdoor and found ourselves in a Mysterious Dungeon. While exploring, we saw Zemouregal, a Mahjarrat Necromancer. We spied on Zemouregal and saw him speaking to Arrav, a long-dead hero from the Fourth Age who had been reanimated by Zemouregal. Elias departed to warn Varrock about this.
translation: 我跟埃利亚斯爬下活板门，来到了一个神秘的地牢。探索时，我们看到了马哈拉特亡灵法师泽莫雷加尔。我们观察到泽莫雷加尔正与第四纪元的已故英雄阿拉夫交谈——这位勇士已被泽莫雷加尔复活。埃利亚斯离开去警告瓦洛克城。

english: Emberlight: Really put it down?
translation: 余烬之光：真放下了？

english: Empty boat slot
translation: 空的船位

english: Enakhra then smashed the wall to pieces, and challenged Akthanakos to fight. They both turned into hideous skeletal things, and teleported away, saying that they were going north to resume their battle.
translation: 随后，Enakhra 将墙壁砸成碎片，并向 Akthanakos 发起挑战。两人都变成了骇人的骷髅形态，传送离去，声称要前往北方继续他们的战斗。

english: End of the room
translation: 房间尽头

english: Enter the name of the offending player, then click Next.
translation: 输入违规玩家的名字，然后点击下一步。

english: Er... Yeah, he's a bit of a... grumpy fellow. He's also got black hair and a mustache.
translation: 呃……是啊，他脾气是有点……暴躁。他也是黑头发，还留着小胡子。

english: Erysail the Pious, this book
translation: 虔诚者艾里赛尔，此书

english: Essiandar's notes.
translation: 埃西安达的笔记。

english: Essyllt assigned me the task of re-dyeing the sheep around East Ardougne to make it seem like they have the Plague. He gave me a Device to do this with, but it was broken. He suggested I speak to the Gnome they had imprisoned to get it fixed.
translation: Essyllt交给我一个任务，要把东阿多尼附近的羊重新染色，好让它们看上去像染了瘟疫。他给了我一个工具来做这件事，但工具坏了。他建议我去找他们关押的那个侏儒，让他来修好这个工具。

english: Essyllt was pleased with my work and gave me another task.
translation: 艾塞尔对我的工作很满意，又给了我一个新任务。

english: Even though you knew we were going to an underground cave? Some adventurer you are!
translation: 尽管你知道我们要去地下洞穴？你这冒险者当得可真够格！

english: Even with a god-weapon embedded in his body, the Empty Lord did not die, but fought back against Zamorak, one on one.
translation: 即便神兵嵌入体内，虚空之王也未死去，反而与萨莫拉克一对一反击。

english: Eventually Drezel gave me a key to a hidden library.
translation: 最终，德雷泽尔给了我一把隐藏图书馆的钥匙。

english: Everything's going to be okay, Safalaan. I promise.
translation: 一切都会好起来的，萨法良。我保证。

english: Evil Bob's servant points at a fishing spot.
translation: 邪恶鲍勃的仆人指向一处钓鱼点。

english: Exactly! Try decorating the totem with those kinds of items. I reckon four should do. Oh, and be sure to use the same wood that you used for the totem itself.
translation: 没错！试着用这类物品装饰图腾。我想四个就够了。对了，一定要用制作图腾时用的同一种木材。

english: Excellent work, my child. I'm pleased to confirm that after some initial... disagreements, we have managed to agree to arrangements that I think will suit all parties nicely.
translation: 做得好，我的孩子。我很欣慰地确认，经过一些最初的分歧后，我们已达成各方都满意的安排。

english: Fair enough. So after we use the portal, what then?
translation: 好吧。那我们用过传送门后，接下来呢？

english: Fair point. Right, I'll go have a go at this carving.
translation: 有道理。好吧，我就去试试雕刻这个。

english: Fancy Dress Box (1 / 8)
translation: 华丽服饰箱（1/8）

english: Father Sugadinti, forgive me for my intrusion, but there is news of Vanescula's location.
translation: 苏甘迪提神父，请恕我冒昧打扰，但我有关于瓦内斯库拉下落的消息。

english: Fear me!
translation: 畏惧我吧！

english: Feed Brutus the potato?
translation: 给布鲁图斯喂土豆？

english: Felkrash will train any overgrown cats I bring her from now on, provided I don't have one which she has already trained for me.
translation: 从现在起，只要我带来的猫不是她训练过的，费尔克拉什就会训练所有的大型猫。

english: Finally he revealed the name of the Empty Lord: Zaros.
translation: 最终，他揭示了虚空领主的名讳：萨洛斯。

english: Finally where she belongs.
translation: 终于回到她该在的地方了。

english: Finally, the FOURTH digit.
translation: 最后，第四个数字。

english: Find anything, <osrscn-name-0>?
translation: 找到什么了吗，<osrscn-name-0>？

english: Fine, but if there's any sign of danger, you don't wait for me. Use the portal and get out right away.
translation: 好，不过一旦有任何危险迹象，别等我。直接使用传送门立刻离开。

english: First click the FIRST digit.
translation: 先点第一个数字。

english: First, we need to get him out of here.
translation: 我们得先把他弄出去。

english: Following advice from the Sphinx, I spoke with the new High Priest of Icthlarin in Sophanem. He told me I could put things right by returning the Burial Jar I stole to the Pyramid. He also told me that I'd need my Cat with me to enter the Pyramid, due to them being guardians against the Devourer, the Menaphite Goddess of Destruction.
translation: 依照斯芬克斯的建议，我与索法尼姆城新任伊克塔拉林大祭司交谈。他说只要把偷走的葬瓮还回金字塔就能补救一切。他还告诉我必须带着猫才能进入金字塔，因为猫是吞噬者——梅纳法特毁灭女神的克星。

english: Following the advice of Historian Duffy, I entered a cave on the western face of Mount Quidamortem. Inside, I made some interesting discoveries. I found out that the cave was the origin point of the Lizardman species and that they were created during the time of King Shayzien VII. As well as this, I discovered an altar which seemed to be acting as an amplifier for the Dark Altar.
translation: 遵照历史学家达菲的建议，我进入了奎达莫特姆山西侧的一个洞穴。在洞内，我有了一些有趣的发现。原来这个洞穴是蜥蜴人种族的起源地，他们是在沙伊齐恩七世国王时期被创造出来的。此外，我还发现了一个祭坛，它似乎充当着黑暗祭坛的增幅器。

english: Following the battle, I travelled with Chieftain Brundt to the Jormungand's prison on the Island of Stone.
translation: 战斗结束后，我与酋长布伦特一同前往石岛上的约尔蒙甘德监狱。

english: For completing this quest I received:- 2 Quest Points.
translation:
完成此任务，我获得了：
- 2 任务点数。

english: Free Quests Only
translation: 仅限免费任务

english: Freeing the Goblin Souls
translation: 释放哥布林的灵魂

english: From here you can purchase a new boat provided you meet the relevant Sailing level requirement. You'll also need to have a free boat slot before purchasing a boat. Boat slots are limited, but more are unlocked at higher Sailing levels.
translation: 在此处可购买新船，但需满足对应的航海等级要求。购买前须有空闲船位。船位有限，提升航海等级可解锁更多船位。

english: From the dark of the night,
translation: 从黑夜的暗处中，

english: From there, we took a boat to the Icyene Graveyard and met with Safalaan and the other Myreque.
translation: 从那里，我们乘船前往冰原墓地，与萨法兰和其他迈瑞克会合。

english: Furniture Creation Menu
translation: 家具制作菜单

english: Further tests needed. Will prepare suitable devices.
translation: 需进一步测试，将准备合适器材。

english: G : Ghorrock
translation: G：戈罗克

english: Galahad gave me a napkin from the Realm of the Fisher King. I used the napkin to find a holy whistle that could teleport me to the Realm of the Fisher King.
translation: 加拉哈德给了我一张来自渔王国的餐巾。我用这张餐巾找到了一个神圣的哨子，可以把我传送到渔王国。

english: General Khazard asked me to find his four scouts and tell them:
translation: 卡扎德将军让我找到他的四名侦察兵，并告诉他们：

english: General Khazard kept his promise and let the Servils leave.
translation: 卡扎德将军履行了承诺，放走了瑟维尔仆从。

english: Gertrude told me a strange pair, Phingspet and Grimesquit, who apparently know a lot about ratcatching. I found them in the Varrock sewers.
translation: 格特鲁德告诉我两个奇怪的人——菲斯佩特和格莱姆斯奎特，他们似乎很懂抓老鼠。我在瓦洛克的下水道里找到了他们。

english: Get out! Get out!
translation: 滚出去！滚出去！

english: Get your rear in gear, Private <osrscn-name-0>!
translation: 列兵<osrscn-name-0>，快行动起来！

english: Gillie sent me to deal with the aggressive bull that she had fenced in her field. It was a tough fight but I brought the beast down. Unfortunately it turned out the the bull was Brutus, who I believed to be Cassius business partner.
translation: 吉莉让我去对付那头被她圈在田里的凶猛公牛。搏斗很激烈，但我最终制服了这头畜生。不幸的是，这头公牛竟是布鲁图斯——我原以为他是卡西乌斯的商业伙伴。

english: Given this was meant to be Ivandis' last act before his death, my guess would be within the caves where I found his tomb.
translation: 考虑到这是伊万迪斯临终前的最后行动，我猜就在我发现他墓穴的那个洞穴里。

english: Glad to hear he's improving. It looks like he's almost fully recovered. It is best I continue with improving his status.
translation: 很高兴听到他好转了。看起来他几乎痊愈了。我还是继续帮他恢复状态比较好。

english: Gloat? I'm not the one that did this to you.
translation: 幸灾乐祸？把你害成这样的可不是我。

english: Glough threw me in prison but the King freed me!
translation: 格劳夫把我关进了监狱，但国王放了我！

english: Go ahead, my child.
translation: 去吧，我的孩子。

english: Go quick, my child. I wish you good luck.
translation: 快去吧，我的孩子。祝你好运。

english: Go to a friend's house
translation: 去朋友家

english: Go to your house (building mode)
translation: 前往你的房屋（建造模式）

english: Goat Hunting Rewards
translation: 山羊狩猎奖励

english: Gone?! No! I don't believe that!
translation: 不见了？！不！我绝不相信！

english: Good boy!
translation: 好孩子！

english: Good day to you, milady.
translation: 日安，女士。

english: Good day, madam. Could I interest you in one of our finest Bloody Bracers? It's a local speciality.
translation: 日安，女士。可有兴趣看看我们最上等的血腥腕带？这可是本地特产。

english: Good job I brought one then! Just come grab it if you need it.
translation: 那正好，我带来了一个！需要的话直接来拿吧。

english: Good luck, <osrscn-name-0>. Please... bring Safalaan back.
translation: 祝你好运，<osrscn-name-0>。请……把萨法拉恩带回来。

english: Good to see you both as well. Now, in case you hadn't noticed, my brother and I aren't exactly on the best of terms right now. As for what happened to Safalaan, you tell me. He's been like this since he arrived.
translation: 也高兴见到你们。不过，你们可能也注意到了，我和我兄弟现在关系不太融洽。至于萨法兰发生了什么，你们来告诉我吧。他一来就这样了。

english: Good. I will let you know once we are ready here.
translation: 好的，我们准备好后会通知你。

english: Good. Let's finish getting this thing fixed and then let's get out of here.
translation: 好，先把这东西修好，然后我们就离开这里。

english: Good. Let's get out of here.
translation: 好了，我们走吧。

english: Good. You should give it to Safalaan.
translation: 好，你该把它交给萨法拉恩。

english: Goodbye, other funny person. You did great!
translation: 再见，另一个有趣的家伙。你干得不错！

english: Gordon's wife, Mary, suggested I track the Beast back to its Lair by covering it in Flour.
translation: 戈登的妻子玛丽建议我用面粉覆盖野兽，然后追踪它回巢穴。

english: Grand Exchange: Finished selling 3 x Contract of glyphic attenuation.
translation: 大交易所：已售出 3 份符文衰减契约。

english: Grand Exchange: Finished selling 6 x Contract of sensory clouding.
translation: 大交易所：已完成出售6份感官遮蔽契约。

english: Greetings Turtle Arms, I need your help.
translation: 你好，Turtle Arms，我需要你的帮助。

english: Greetings, Mistress <osrscn-name-0>!
translation: 您好，<osrscn-name-0>主人！

english: Greetings, my friend. Father Sugadinti has asked me to look after some of your items, if that is something that will be of benefit to you?
translation: 你好，我的朋友。苏加丁提神父让我代为保管你的一些物品，这对你有好处吗？

english: Greetings, my friend. If you need anything, you should speak with your companions.
translation: 你好，朋友。如果你需要什么，该去和你的伙伴们谈谈。

english: Grrroar!
translation: 嗷呜！

english: Grubfoot told us that goblins used to live in Yu'biusk. He believed his dream to be a vision of Zanik's destiny as the Chosen Commander. Grubfoot directed us to a hidden Goblin Temple, believing the Goblin Priests there would know a way to Yu'biusk.
translation: 格鲁布福特告诉我们哥布林以前生活在羽比斯克。他认为自己的梦境是扎尼克成为天命指挥官的预兆。格鲁布福特指引我们前往一处隐秘的哥布林神殿，相信那里的哥布林祭司知晓前往羽比斯克的方法。

english: Guests may listen in chat:
translation: 聊天中的访客可收听：

english: Guidor ran his tests and discovered a disturbing truth, that the Plague of West Ardougne is a lie.
translation: 吉多尔进行了检测，发现了一个惊人的真相：西阿尔道恩的瘟疫是个谎言。

english: Had Me VIP
translation: 接待贵宾中

english: Hallowed judgement!
translation: 神圣裁决！

english: Halt intruder!
translation: 站住，入侵者！

english: Hammer.
translation: 锤子。

english: Hand over all.
translation: 全部交出。

english: Have a kebab for free!
translation: 免费吃个烤肉串！

english: Have the Soul Bearer repaired
translation: 已修复灵魂搬运者

english: Have you found that cog?
translation: 找到那个齿轮了吗？

english: Having celebrated a romantic wedding ceremony, Snowflake asked me to fetch some goat dung. She suggested I look in the goat pen just outside the throne room.
translation: 举行完浪漫的婚礼后，雪花让我去拿些羊粪。她说可以去王座室外的羊圈找找。

english: Having destroyed the enemy ship's cannon I should return to my ship and see what Bill wants me to do next.
translation: 已摧毁敌舰火炮，我该返回自己的船只，看看比尔接下来要我做什么。

english: Having hidden from the trolls by sneaking through a narrow passageway in the cave, I had to continue dodging the sentries' rocks as I made my way to the blocked cave.
translation: 我通过洞穴里一条狭窄的通道躲过了巨魔，在前往被堵塞的洞穴途中，还得不断躲避哨兵投来的石块。

english: Having looted to my heart's content I should go and tell Bill that I have filled the hold with plunder.
translation: 我已满载而归，该去告诉比尔船舱里装满了战利品。

english: Having repaired the bridges, I have reported back to the Burgher of Neitiznot.
translation: 修好桥后，我已向奈提兹诺特的市民长官汇报。

english: Having returned Seth's book to Cassius, he then offered me a sample of the milk we will be selling. It wasn't the most pleasant thing to drink, but I managed to finish it.
translation: 把塞斯的书还给卡西乌斯后，他给了我一瓶要卖的牛奶样品。喝起来不太美味，但我还是硬着头皮喝完了。

english: Having shot the enemy crew full of holes, I think we can probably sail off into the sunset now. I will go and tell Bill that I have done what he wanted.
translation: 把敌人的船员打成筛子后，我们现在大概可以扬帆远航，驶向夕阳了。我去告诉比尔，我已经按他的要求办妥了。

english: He also told us that Vanescula would be allowed to live as his prisoner. Sugadinti then asked Veliaf and Ivan to travel to Misthalin and let them know of Drakan's defeat. He then asked me to find Efaritay.
translation: 他还告诉我们范内斯库拉可以活下来成为他的囚犯。苏加迪提随后要求维利亚夫和伊凡前往米斯萨林，告知德拉坎战败的消息。接着他让我去寻找艾法力泰。

english: He asked if I'd learned how to fly. How very strange! I decided to improvise.
translation: 他问我是否学会了飞行，真是古怪！我决定即兴发挥一番。

english: He asked me to poison two of the three Food Supply Points in West Ardougne to fool the citizens into believing they have the Plague.
translation: 他要我毒害西阿杜格恩的三个粮草供应点中的两个，让市民误以为瘟疫发作。

english: He asked me to retrieve the relic from Captain Tock and return it to the ogre chief with his apologies.
translation: 他让我从托克船长那里取回圣物，并带着他的歉意归还给食人魔首领。

english: He asked me to return to Ver Sinhaza to work out what Vanstrom and Ranis are up to.
translation: 他让我回到韦辛哈萨，弄清楚范斯特罗姆和拉尼斯在搞什么鬼。

english: He challenged me to prove he was faking his own illness.
translation: 他向我挑战，要证明他在装病。

english: He didn't know, but suggested that if any tunnels did exist, they would have been built by the Sect of Scabaras. The High Priest recommended I speak to Jex at the Temple of the Lesser Gods to learn more.
translation: 他并不知情，但表示如果真有隧道存在，那一定是"斯卡巴拉教派"修建的。大祭司建议我前往次等神祇神殿向杰克斯了解更多情况。

english: He directed me to his Storeroom in the eastern section of the caves. There, I found and activated an Anti-Illusion Device, revealing the truth about the truth about Dumpling. Within the Storeroom, I also found a small Crystal Seed and a Singing Bowl.
translation: 他让我去洞穴东部的储藏室。在那里，我找到并启动了一个反幻象装置，揭开了“饺子”的真相。在储藏室里，我还发现了一颗小型水晶种子和一个颂钵。

english: He explained that Mother only respected strong trolls. Long ago, the Weiss trolls were driven out from their tunnels
translation: 他解释说，母亲只尊重强壮的巨魔。很久以前，韦斯巨魔被赶出了他们的隧道。

english: He gave everything to stop them, and that was his reward... I can't even begin to imagine what that must have been like...
translation: 他付出一切去阻止他们，这就是他的回报……我简直无法想象那是什么滋味……

english: He gave me a huge stack of gold coins and several diamonds.
translation: 他给了我一堆金币和几颗钻石。

english: He gave me an amulet as thanks for what I'd done.
translation: 他送了我一条护身符，作为对我所做一切的感谢。

english: He gave me some fishing xp and money too.
translation: 他还给了我一些钓鱼经验和金币。

english: He has lost his Animal Skull and thinks he may have dropped it around the digsite. I need to find it and return it to him; maybe someone has picked it up?
translation: 他的动物头骨丢了，可能掉在考古挖掘点附近了。我得找到还给他；说不定有人捡到了呢？

english: He has lost his Special Cup and thinks he may have dropped it around the tents near the panning site. I need to find it and return it.
translation: 他把特殊杯子弄丢了，觉得可能掉在了淘金点附近的帐篷周围。我得找到杯子还给他。

english: He infused it into a magic ogre potion.
translation: 他将它注入了魔法食人魔药水中。

english: He killed Sani and Harold, both young members of the Myreque.
translation: 他杀了萨尼和哈罗德，他们都是迈里奎的年轻成员。

english: He killed them! It was like they were nothing! He killed them, and all I could do was watch!
translation: 他杀了他们！就像捏死蚂蚁一样！他杀了他们，而我只能眼睁睁看着！

english: He needed a 'Dirty Blast', some greenman's ale, a rotten tomato and an eye of newt for the feast.
translation: 宴会上他需要一杯'污秽爆裂', 一些绿色矮人麦酒, 一个烂番茄和一个蝾螈眼珠。

english: He noted it down in his mission report and then gave it to me.
translation: 他在任务报告中记下了，然后把它给了我。

english: He says his name is Cyrisus. His state is improving, but there is more work to do on improving his stats. I can find out what to do by inspecting him.
translation: 他说自己名叫Cyrisus。他的状况有所好转，但属性提升还需更多努力。我可以检查他来了解该怎么做。

english: He sent me to a secret training ground, where my wits were thoroughly tested.
translation: 他派我去了一处秘密训练场，在那儿我的才智经受了一番彻底的考验。

english: He smashed a bush, disturbed a dangerous spider and a broodoo victim, and hurt the village's fiercest warrior!
translation: 他撞倒了一丛灌木，惊动了一只危险蜘蛛和一个布杜受害者，还打伤了村里最勇猛的战士！

english: He soon recovered when I used an antipoison potion on him.
translation: 我给他用了瓶解毒药剂后，他很快就恢复了。

english: He suspected the vampyres were involved and tasked me to discover the source of the illness.
translation: 他怀疑吸血鬼参与了此事，并派我去查明病源的真相。

english: He thanked me and arranged to send an emissary to meet with the dwarves.
translation: 他向我道谢，并安排派遣一名使者与矮人会面。

english: He thanked me for my help and sent some Wizards to repair the Well of Voyage.
translation: 他感谢了我的帮助，派了一些巫师去修复旅行之井。

english: He told me that the entrance to Zanaris is in the shed in Lumbridge swamp but only if I am carrying a Dramen Staff.
translation: 他说扎纳里斯的入口在伦布里奇沼泽的小屋里，但必须手持德拉门法杖才能进入。

english: He told me to follow his directions to a mansion and catch the rats there while remaining unseen.
translation: 他让我照他的指示去一座大宅，在那里抓老鼠，同时保持不被发现。

english: He wants me to meet him there by travelling through the dungeon below it. I hope I get to look through the telescope!
translation: 他要我穿过地下城的通道去那里见他。希望我能用望远镜看看！

english: He was more lucid there. Is he recovering?
translation: 他在那儿更清醒了。他在恢复吗？

english: He's going for Drakan.
translation: 他要对付德拉坎了。

english: He's going for the castle... This isn't good. I need to find the others!
translation: 他朝城堡去了……这下不妙。我得找到其他人！

english: He's hurt badly, but he's alive.
translation: 他伤得很重，但还活着。

english: He's totally revived. I should talk to Cyrisus and find out what next to do.
translation: 他完全痊愈了。我得去和Cyrisus谈谈，看看接下来该怎么做。

english: He's wrong about Safalaan. I know my son is alive and I'm going to go and save him. Sugadinti can't stop me, and neither can you.
translation: 他说错了萨法拉安的事。我知道我儿子还活着，我要去救他。苏加丁提拦不住我，你也一样。

english: He's... alive. I think for now that's the best we can hope for.
translation: 他还活着……暂时只能这样指望了。

english: Healer level up complete
translation: 治疗者等级提升完成

english: Helm and sails (H1)
translation: 头盔与船帆 (H1)

english: Helping Yarlo & Marlo
translation: 帮助亚洛和马洛

english: Helping you.
translation: 帮你。

english: Her brother?
translation: 她哥哥？

english: Here we are. Are you ready, my child?
translation: 我们到了。准备好了吗，我的孩子？

english: Here's that pickaxe, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 这是你要的镐子，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: Hey <osrscn-name-0>! It's your lucky day!
translation: 嘿，<osrscn-name-0>！你今天走运了！

english: Hey, <osrscn-name-0>. Did you make some of those stakes?
translation: 嘿，<osrscn-name-0>。你做了一些那些木桩吗？

english: Hey, Ivan. Doing okay?
translation: 嘿，伊凡，还好吗？

english: Hild enchanted my Amulet of Catspeak, if I open it up I can use it to locate Bob.
translation: 希尔德给我的猫语护符附了魔，打开它就能用来找鲍勃了。

english: His health and spirit are better now. It is best I talk to the fallen man to see how he is feeling now.
translation: 他的身心状况有所好转。最好还是和那位倒地者谈谈，看看他现在感觉如何。

english: His patience was rewarded,
translation: 他的耐心得到了回报。

english: Hitpoints.
translation: 生命值

english: Hmm... Best we keep progressing on then.
translation: 嗯...那我们继续前进吧。

english: Hmm... I have a feeling I know where Efaritay will have gone. I'll go there at once.
translation: 嗯……我直觉知道埃法瑞泰去了哪。我这就去。

english: Hmm... I should go and get Ivan before heading in there.
translation: 嗯...得先去把伊凡叫上再进去。

english: Hmm... Looks like Ivan isn't here.
translation: 嗯……伊凡不在这儿。

english: Hmm... Me neither.
translation: 嗯…我也是。

english: Hmm... Okay. Well, let's head down there then and get out of here.
translation: 嗯...好吧。那咱们下去，离开这儿吧。

english: Hmm... You might be right, but we should try to find out for sure.
translation: 嗯……也许你说得对，但我们还是该查个明白。

english: Home World:
translation: 主世界:

english: Home? Surely you don't mean Vampyrium? You would see us return to that wasteland? You would see us return to lives of misery?
translation: 家？你总不是在说Vampyrium吧？你想看我们回到那片废土？你想看我们重回痛苦的生活？

english: Honour Points Reward:
translation: 荣誉点数奖励：

english: Hopefully I'll find Ivan in one of them as well.
translation: 希望我也能在其中一个里面找到伊凡。

english: Housing Security System
translation: 房屋安保系统

english: How are you doing, Ivan?
translation: 最近怎么样，伊凡？

english: How can we be sure he won't find a way? Even if not him, what happens if someone one day works out how to open a new portal to Vampyrium? While he lives, how can this truly be over?
translation: 怎能确保他找不到方法？就算不是他，若有一天有人找到开启通往吸血鬼位面的新传送门呢？只要他还活着，此事怎能真正了结？

english: How did you end up allying with Sugadinti?
translation: 你是怎么和Sugadinti结盟的？

english: How did you find out you were descended from Ivandis?
translation: 你是怎么发现自己有伊凡迪斯血统的？

english: How have things been here?
translation: 这儿情况如何？

english: How long will that take?
translation: 那要花多久时间？

english: How many sets would you like to make?
translation: 你想制作多少套？

english: How many would you like to redirect?
translation: 你希望重定向几个？

english: How many would you like?
translation: 你想要多少？

english: How much longer do we need?
translation: 我们还需要多久？

english: How would you like to modify this facility?
translation: 你想如何修改这个设施？

english: How's Safalaan doing?
translation: 萨法拉安还好吗？

english: However, I dug up the doll and found that it was clockwork, and did not appear to be possessed. It fell in the sea and was lost again.
translation: 然而，我挖出了那个玩偶，发现它是个发条装置，似乎并没有被附身。它掉进了海里，再次丢失了。

english: However, I looked through that telescope myself, and saw an ogre rather than a mermaid.
translation: 不过，我自己用望远镜看过了，看到的不是美人鱼，而是个巨魔。

english: However, Lowerniel saw through her lies. He killed her bodyguards along with most of the Myreque and took her captive.
translation: 然而，Lowerniel 看穿了她的谎言。他杀死了她的护卫以及大多数 Myreque 成员，并将她囚禁。

english: However, Movario arrived at the same time, shortly followed by Lucien.
translation: 然而，莫瓦里奥同时抵达，卢西恩紧随其后。

english: However, Safalaan was very weak and didn't even know who we were. We shared details on our plan with Vanescula, but she warned us of a Stockpile of Safalaan's blood on the upper level of the Castle. I continued to explore and found Ivan again.
translation: 然而，萨法拉恩十分虚弱，甚至不认得我们。我们将计划细节告知瓦内斯库拉，但她警告我们城堡上层还存有一批萨法拉恩的血液。我继续探索，再次找到了伊凡。

english: However, Safalaan was very weak and didn't even know who we were. We shared details on our plan with Vanescula, but she warned us of a Stockpile of Safalaan's blood on the upper level of the Castle. I continued to explore and found Ivan again. We should keep exploring together and work out how to find and destroy the Blood Stockpile.
translation: 不过，萨法拉恩虚弱不堪，甚至不记得我们是谁。我们向瓦内丝库拉透露了计划细节，但她警告说城堡上层存有萨法拉恩的血库。我继续探索时再次遇到了伊万。我们应该继续结伴探索，想办法找到并摧毁血库。

english: However, Safalaan was very weak and didn't even know who we were. We shared details on our plan with Vanescula, but she warned us of a Stockpile of Safalaan's blood on the upper level of the Castle. I'll need to find a way up there and destroy this Stockpile. I also still need to find Ivan.
translation: 然而，萨法拉恩非常虚弱，甚至不知道我们是谁。我们向瓦妮斯库拉详细说明了计划，但她警告我们城堡上层有萨法拉恩的血库。我需要设法上去摧毁这个血库。还得继续找伊凡。

english: However, after he left, the Egg fell and broke. I went into the nearby town of Tal Teklan to ask for help with this.
translation: 然而，在他离开后，那颗蛋掉下来摔碎了。我前往附近的塔尔特克兰镇寻求帮助。

english: However, before we could do anything with her, Furia arrived and killed her. Itzla then took Furia back to the surface, but I decided to stay behind and look around some more.
translation: 然而，我们还没对她做些什么，弗瑞娅就来了并杀了她。伊茨拉随后带弗瑞娅返回地面，但我决定留下继续探索。

english: However, before we could investigate it, we were attacked by an Assassin which I managed to defeat. I then opened the Panel to find another Riddle behind it.
translation: 但我们还没来得及调查，就被一个刺客袭击了，我设法击败了他。随后我打开了面板，发现背后藏着另一道谜题。

english: However, he destroyed it, claiming it was no longer needed. He then rewarded me.
translation: 但他却毁了它，说不再需要了，然后给了我赏赐。

english: However, he told me that a group of aranei would slow Drakan down long enough for the rest of us to escape. I offered to join these aranei.
translation: 但他告诉我，一群阿拉内伊能拖住德拉坎足够久，让我们其余人逃脱。我主动提出加入这些阿拉内伊。

english: However, he was unwilling to tell me anything about his supply of Bloody Bracers.
translation: 但他拒绝透露任何关于鲜血护腕来源的信息。

english: However, it had escaped.
translation: 但它逃走了。

english: However, it seems that I was tricked by Vanstrom who turned out to be a vampyre following me to the Myreque's hideout.
translation: 然而，范斯特罗姆竟是追随我至米瑞克藏身处的吸血鬼，我被他欺骗了。

english: However, rather than attacking, he spoke to me. He revealed his mind to still be intact and that he had been trying to resist Zemouregal's control. While speaking to me, he mentioned his Heart, but was called away by Zemouregal before he could say more.
translation: 不过，他并未攻击我，反而开口说话。他表明自己的心智尚存，一直在抵抗泽莫瑞戈的控制。与我交谈时，他提到了自己的心脏，但话未说完就被泽莫瑞戈唤走了。

english: However, she escaped. With her gone, I was forced to fight off the Wardens, two ancient automatons that she was using to drain the Lesser Deities of their power. Upon my success, I met with the spirit of Osmumten himself. He rewarded me for my help, but informed me that many servants of the Devourer remained in the Tomb.
translation: 然而，她逃走了。她消失后，我被迫与典狱长战斗——那是两台古老的自动机械，她曾用它们汲取次级神祇的力量。成功击败他们后，我见到了奥姆姆腾本人的灵魂。他奖励了我的帮助，但告诉我吞食者的许多仆从仍留在墓穴中。

english: However, she first insisted that I review the Form I submitted earlier with her. Once that was done, she then gave me another Form which I had signed by the Mayor, finalising the change to the By-Law.
translation: 但她先是坚持要我陪她重新审阅我先前提交的表格。审完后，她又给了我一份新表格，我让镇长签了字，最终完成了附例的修改。

english: However, she wasn't able to discover anything.
translation: 但她也未能查出任何线索。

english: However, there is one individual here that we made good progress on recruiting. She is not yet aware of this, but I believe we have the means to ensure she... agrees to support us.
translation: 不过，这里有个招募对象进展不错。她本人还不知情，但我相信我们有办法确保她……同意支持我们。

english: However, they couldn't agree on who should replace them.
translation: 然而，他们无法就谁来替代他们达成一致。

english: However, upon doing so, I was attacked by Cuthbert, who it turns out survived the election. Thankfully, I was able to deal with him.
translation: 然而，当我这么做时，我被幸存于选举中的卡斯伯特袭击了。幸好我将他解决了。

english: However, upon finding it, I was attacked by some sort of Elemental Creature which I was forced to defeat. I then touched the Stone and was granted a Strange Vision.
translation: 然而，当我找到它时，被某种元素生物袭击，只得将其击败。随后我触碰了那块石头，获得了一段奇异的幻象。

english: However, we instead found some Old One Ruins.
translation: 不过，我们倒发现了一些远古遗迹。

english: Hull parts.
translation: 船体部件。

english: Hull type: Mahogany hull
translation: 船体类型：桃花心木船体

english: Hull type: Wooden hull
translation: 船体类型：木质船体

english: Human blood. Vampyre blood. It makes no difference. The half-icyene is the catalyst. The rest matters not. But one way or another, sacrifice will be required.
translation: 人血也好，吸血鬼血也罢。没什么区别。半冰雅人是催化剂。其余的都无关紧要。但无论如何，都需要献祭。

english: I : Senntisten
translation: I: 森提斯滕

english: I accepted the challenge of finding the lost crystals.
translation: 我接受了寻找失落水晶的挑战。

english: I activated the Mysterious Orb near the Dark Altar and it exploded with power.
translation: 我在黑暗祭坛附近激活了神秘之球，它迸发出了强大的能量。

english: I agreed to find and rescue them.
translation: 我答应了要找到并救出他们。

english: I agreed to go to his ship, moored west of Rimmington.
translation: 我答应去他那艘停在里明顿西边的船。

english: I agreed to help Veos and his Mysterious Client gather information on the five cities of Great Kourend. To gather the information, Veos gave me an Enchanted Scroll and taught me how to make an Enchanted Quill. Veos suggested I gather the information by talking to the General Store Owners of each city.
translation: 我答应帮助Veos和他的神秘委托人搜集大寇伦德五座城市的情报。Veos给了我一张附魔卷轴，并教我如何制作附魔羽毛笔来收集信息。他建议我通过与各城杂货店老板交谈来获取情报。

english: I agreed to help the student in the orange top.
translation: 我同意帮助穿橙色上衣的学生。

english: I agreed to help the student in the purple skirt.
translation: 我同意帮助那个穿紫色裙子的学生。

english: I also found a dead sea slug on the floor. I wonder if it will come in handy?
translation: 我还在墙角发现了一只死海蛞蝓。不知道以后会不会派上用场？

english: I also see that some have decided to remain absent. It's surprising... Lord Jovkai was so eager to speak up before, yet now he is nowhere in sight.
translation: 我还注意到有些人选择了缺席。令人惊讶的是……乔夫凯大人之前那么急于发言，现在却不见踪影。

english: I also see you've used enchanted gems as part of the construction. I'd recommend that while shortening the shaft, you replace the sickle with one containing an enchanted diamond.
translation: 我还注意到你在建造中使用了附魔宝石。建议你在缩短轴杆时，将镰刀替换为带有附魔钻石的镰刀。

english: I am not a slave! I am a free person!
translation: 我不是奴隶！我是自由人！

english: I am now an official member of the Temple Knights, although I have to wait for the paperwork to go through before I can commence working for them.
translation: 我现在已是圣殿骑士的正式成员，不过还得等文书手续办完才能开始为他们工作。

english: I am now the proud owner of a Holy Wrench. I will take up this Holy Wrench and strike the Brewing Controls until they are very, very sorry.
translation: 我现在已经是神圣扳手的骄傲主人了。我要拿起这把神圣扳手，狠敲那些酿酒控制器，直到它们彻底认错。

english: I am. I'll make sure nothing gets in there.
translation: 我会的。我会确保没人能进去。

english: I arrived at the Temple, but Prince Itzla wasn't there. Instead, I was met by Metzli, the Teokan of Ranul. She directed me to the Temple Crypt and said I'd find Prince Itzla meeting with Servius, the Teokan of Ralos, down there.
translation: 我抵达了神殿，但伊茨拉王子并不在那里。迎接我的是拉努尔的圣者梅茨莉，她指引我去神殿地窖，说会在地窖深处找到正与拉洛斯的圣者塞尔维乌斯会面的伊茨拉王子。

english: I asked Dimintheis if he had any quests for me, he did not and suggested I contact his sons and see if they need any help themselves.
translation: 我向迪米修斯询问是否有任务交给我，他没有，并建议我联系他的儿子们，看看他们自己是否需要帮助。

english: I asked around the Bandit Camp and discovered someone who was willing to help me find the diamonds, by using a magic spell and some scrying glasses.
translation: 我在强盗营地四处打听，发现有人愿意用魔法咒语和占卜镜帮我找到钻石。

english: I asked around town about the Missing People and found a Couple who seemed distressed at the mention of them.
translation: 我在城里打听失踪人口的事时，发现一对夫妇听到这消息显得很痛苦。

english: I assume it's your blood we're using for this portal?
translation: 我猜我们是用你的血来开启这个传送门？

english: I believe so, but you will need to speak to Father Sugadinti if you wish to know the specifics.
translation: 应该是吧，但如果你想知道具体细节，得去问苏加丁提神父。

english: I believe you to be correct, my child, and so if required, we must be ready to remove her from the picture more... permanently.
translation: 孩子，你说得对。若有必要，我们得准备让她…永远消失。

english: I blew the Whistle at the correct location and was teleported to the Realm of the Fisher King. The path to the Fisher King's castle was blocked by a mighty warrior called the Black Knight Titan who seemed invincible!
translation: 我在正确的位置吹响了哨子，被传送至渔王之境。通往渔王城堡的道路被一位名为黑骑士泰坦的勇猛战士阻挡，他看起来无可战胜！

english: I brought Fenkenstrain a needle and 5 quantities of thread.
translation: 我已经给芬肯斯特雷恩带去了一根针和5卷线。

english: I brought Montai logs to help fortify their defences.
translation: 我带了蒙泰原木来加固他们的防御。

english: I brought Zanik's body to Juna.
translation: 我将赞尼克的身体带到了朱娜那里。

english: I brought all of the ingredients to him, and he rewarded me with some cooking experience!
translation: 我把所有食材都带给了他，他给了我一些烹饪经验作为奖励！

english: I brought her an onion, a rat's tail, a piece of burnt meat and an eye of newt which she used to make a potion.
translation: 我给了她一个洋葱、一条老鼠尾巴、一块烧焦的肉和一只蝾螈眼珠，她用这些材料做了一瓶药水。

english: I brought the 'Rod of Ivandis' to Veliaf who was incredibly impressed with it. I'm not sure if I'm part of the Myreque yet, but I think this has helped to get me a step closer.
translation: 我将‘伊万迪斯之杖’带给维利亚夫，他对此惊叹不已。虽然还不确定自己是否已是迈尔奎成员，但这一步显然更接近了。

english: I brought the old woman the Book of Haricanto, the Robes of Necrovarus, and a translation manual.
translation: 我给老太太带来了哈力坎托之书、尼可瓦鲁斯长袍和一本翻译手册。

english: I built the bird hide structure. It wasn't easy to do in all this snow.
translation: 我在雪地里建起了鸟棚，可真是不容易。

english: I built the statue Lazim asked for, using stone from the nearby quarry. When Lazim added the head to the statue, the ground caved in, and I fell in after the statue!
translation: 我按拉齐姆的要求用附近采石场的石头建了雕像。当拉齐姆把头部装到雕像上时，地面塌陷了，我和雕像一起掉了进去！

english: I can buy armour appropriate to my White Knight level.
translation: 我可以购买适合我白骑士等级的盔甲。

english: I can dig in the crypt of the Arceuus church to find a replacement if I ever lose my soul bearer.
translation: 若丢失灵魂携具，可至阿塞乌斯教堂墓穴挖掘以寻找替代品。

english: I can get new anti-dragonbreath shields from the Duke of Lumbridge.
translation: 我可以从伦布里奇公爵那里得到新的防龙息盾牌。

english: I can help the expedition by setting up facilities around the island.
translation: 我可以帮探险队在岛上搭建设施。

english: I can now make origami balloons. I can also use the balloon transport system. To go to new locations I should speak to Auguste on Entrana.
translation: 我现在会做折纸气球了，也能使用气球运输系统。要去新地点得找恩特拉的奥古斯特聊聊。

english: I can now use Doric's Anvils whenever I want.
translation: 现在我可以随时使用多里克的铁砧了。

english: I can now use the gnome's spirit tree to teleport around the world to places that are linked to the spirit tree!
translation: 我现在可以使用侏儒的灵魂树，传送到与灵魂树相连的世界各地了！

english: I can obtain another from Otto.
translation: 我可以从奥托那里再拿一个。

english: I can return to the Watchtower at any time.
translation: 我可以随时返回瞭望塔。

english: I can start this quest by talking to Effigy at the tower south- east of Ardougne.
translation: 我可以通过与阿多格恩东南方向塔楼的Effigy交谈来开始这个任务。

english: I can start this quest by talking to Lokar at the docks to the west of Rellekka.
translation: 我可以与雷勒卡西边的码头上的洛卡交谈来开始这个任务。

english: I can start this quest by talking to the professor, in the Observatory reception, south-west of Ardougne.
translation: 与教授交谈即可开始此任务，他位于阿多格恩西南方的天文台接待处。

english: I can stay on Tutorial Island to learn more about Ironman mode, or use my Home Teleport to travel to the mainland.
translation: 我可以留在教程岛继续学习钢铁侠模式，或者使用我的家传传送术前往大陆。

english: I can switch between my old spells and my new spells any time by using the altar there, and can avoid the traps by using the secret passage.
translation: 我随时可以通过那里的祭坛在旧法术和新法术之间切换，也能通过秘密通道避开陷阱。
