english: I snuck into the Black Knights' Fortress again. I had to wear a bronze medium helm and an iron chainbody to get past the guards. Then I had to wear full black plate armour to fool the rest of the Black Knights.
translation: 我又溜进了黑骑士要塞。得戴着铜制中盔、穿着铁制链甲才能通过守卫。接着得全副武装穿上黑骑士铠甲，才能骗过其他黑骑士。

english: I sought out help from various rulers and heroes in the hope that they would join us in the fight against Zorgoth. A meeting was held in Varrock Palace where it was agreed that we would take on the dragons.
translation: 我向各位统治者与英雄寻求帮助，希望他们能加入我们对抗佐尔戈斯的战斗。我们在瓦洛克皇宫举行会议，最终达成共识：我们将共同迎战巨龙。

english: I spoke to Alan in the Tal Teok Temple north of Tal Teklan. He told me that he recently started living there along with an Egg for company.
translation: 我在塔尔泰克兰北部的塔尔提奥克神庙和阿兰谈过。他说自己最近住进了那里，还养了一个蛋作伴。

english: I spoke to Alina and Noah in Varrock Square. They explained that a Delegation from the Kingdom of Varlamore would soon be arriving to finalise the opening up of the kingdom to outsiders.
translation: 我在瓦洛克广场和阿丽娜、诺亚谈过了。他们解释说，瓦拉莫尔王国的一支代表团即将到来，以最终确定该王国对外部人员开放的事宜。

english: I spoke to Almera in her home next to Baxtorian Falls. She asked me to check on her son, Hudon, who has been searching for treasure near Baxtorian Falls.
translation: 我在巴克斯托里安瀑布旁的家中与阿尔梅拉交谈。她委托我去查看她的儿子哈登的情况，他一直在瀑布附近寻找宝藏。

english: I spoke to Aretha to ask her about the artefact described in her book. She told me the artefact was buried in the crypt of the Arceuus church.
translation: 我跟阿雷莎聊了聊，问她书中描述的那件神器。她说神器埋在阿尔修斯教堂的地下墓穴里。

english: I spoke to Arianwyn in Lletya. He asked me to investigate the Mourners to see if they'd found the Temple of Light.
translation: 我在勒提亚和阿利安温谈过。他让我调查哀悼者，看他们是否找到了光明神殿。

english: I spoke to Awusah again. He told me the statuette was thrown down a crevice to the west of Nardah.
translation: 我又跟阿乌萨谈了一次。他说那尊小雕像被扔进了纳尔达西边的一道裂缝里。

english: I spoke to Brother Kojo at the Clock Tower South of Ardougne and agreed to help him repair the clock.
translation: 我跟阿杜因南边钟楼的科乔修士交谈过，同意帮他修钟。

english: I spoke to Burntmeat, in the Troll Stronghold kitchen. He asked me to do another quest for him, and began telling me what it would entail.
translation: 我跟布尔特米特聊过了，他在巨魔要塞的厨房里。他请我再去帮他做个任务，还讲了讲具体要做什么。

english: I spoke to Chieftain Brundt in the Fremennik Longhall. He asked me to investigate a disturbance at the Sandpit in Rellekka.
translation: 我和弗雷门尼长厅的酋长布伦特交谈过。他让我去调查雷尔卡沙坑的骚乱。

english: I spoke to Councillor Halgrive north of Ardougne Zoo. He asked me to help deal with some Diseased Sheep north of the city.
translation: 我跟阿多格尼动物园北边的哈尔格里夫议员谈过。他让我帮忙处理城北的一些病羊。

english: I spoke to Edmond at his home in East Ardougne. He told me that his daughter, Elena, was arrested by the Knights of Ardougne. They claimed that she was speaking out against King Lathas and telling people that the Plague of West Ardougne was a lie.
translation: 我跟东阿多尼的埃德蒙在他家谈了谈。他说女儿埃琳娜被阿多尼骑士团抓了，理由是她说拉萨斯国王的坏话，还跟人讲西阿多尼的瘟疫是骗局。

english: I spoke to Elena within the Ardougne Prison. She had a plan to escape through a grate into the Ardougne Sewers. However, she needed me to fetch her some Sulphuric Acid to melt the grate with.
translation: 我在阿多格恩监狱里跟艾琳娜谈过了。她打算通过一个铁栅栏逃进阿多格恩下水道，但需要我去弄些硫酸来熔化栅栏。

english: I spoke to Essyllt in the Mourner Headquarters. He gave me a key to the mines and asked me to keep an eye out for a missing Dig Team.
translation: 我在哀悼者总部与埃塞尔特交谈过。他给了我矿井钥匙，并让我留意一支失踪的挖掘队。

english: I spoke to Felkrash about the rats I drowned. She saw the whole thing and can now compose her poem.
translation: 我和费尔克拉什提了淹死老鼠的事。她目睹了全过程，现在可以写诗了。

english: I spoke to Fenkenstrain, who wanted me to find him some body parts so that he could build a creature.
translation: 我跟芬肯斯特兰谈过了，他要我找些身体部位来造个怪物。

english: I spoke to Galahad in his shack West of McGrubor's Wood.
translation: 我去了麦格鲁伯树林西边的小屋，和加拉哈德谈过了。

english: I spoke to Garth outside Ver Sinhaza. He told me the story of Serafina and how she survived the Theatre of Blood.
translation: 我跟韦辛哈扎外的加斯聊过。他给我讲了塞拉菲娜的故事，以及她如何从血腥剧场幸存下来。

english: I spoke to Gertrude about Bob's past, she doesn't know anything.
translation: 我跟格特鲁德聊了聊鲍勃的过去，她什么也不知道。

english: I spoke to Gillie at the Duke of Lumbridge's request, and she asked me to drink the milk sample so that she could get a sense of the quality of the milk. It wasn't pleasant, but seemed to bring her around to my cause.
translation: 遵照卢姆布里奇公爵的要求，我与吉莉交谈过。她让我喝下这瓶牛奶样品，以便了解牛奶的品质。那滋味可不好受，但似乎让她对我的请求产生了兴趣。

english: I spoke to Gordon at his Farm south of the Farming Guild. He asked me to track down and kill a Beast that had been causing problems on the Farm. He also asked that I bring back the Beast's Head as proof.
translation: 我在农业公会南边的农场跟戈登谈了谈。他让我追踪并杀死一只一直在农场惹麻烦的野兽。他还让我把野兽的头带回去作为证明。

english: I spoke to Grubfoot in the mines north of Dorgesh-Kaan. He wanted to enter the city and speak to Zanik about his belief of her being the Chosen Commander. As surface goblins are not normally allowed into the city, I agreed to personally escort Grubfoot.
translation: 我在多格什-卡恩北边的矿洞里跟格鲁布福特谈过了。他想要进城跟扎尼克谈谈，因为他坚信她就是那位“被选中的指挥官”。由于地面哥布林通常不被允许进城，我同意亲自护送格鲁布福特。

english: I spoke to High Priest Bighead in the Goblin Temple. He asked me some questions on Goblin Religion, and I was able to answer them all correctly.
translation: 我在哥布林神庙里跟大头大祭司聊了聊。他问了我一些关于哥布林宗教的问题，我都答对了。

english: I spoke to Hild, she doesn't know where Bob is but will enchant my Amulet of Catspeak so that I can find Bob.
translation: 我跟希尔德谈了谈，她不知道鲍勃在哪，但会给我的猫语护符附魔，这样我就能找到鲍勃了。

english: I spoke to Islwyn and Eluned within the Isafdar forest. Islwyn, the grandson of Baxtorian and Glarial, refused to take me to the Elven Resistance as he did not believe me to be trustworthy. However, after I told him that I'd moved Glarial's remains into Baxtorian Falls, he decided to give me a chance.
translation: 我在伊沙夫达尔森林里与伊索尔温和艾露娜德交谈过了。作为巴克斯托里安与格拉里尔孙子的伊索尔温，因不信任我而拒绝带我去精灵抵抗组织。但当我告诉他已将格拉里尔遗骸迁至巴克斯托里安瀑布后，他最终决定给我一次机会。

english: I spoke to Islwyn and Eluned within the Isafdar forest. They took me to the hidden village of Lletya to meet with Arianwyn, the leader of the Elven Resistance.
translation: 我在伊萨夫达森林中和伊兹文与艾露内德交谈过了。他们带我去了隐藏的村庄拉塔，见到了精灵抵抗组织的领袖阿里安温。

english: I spoke to Jex at the Temple of the Lesser Gods. He confirmed that there were indeed some tunnels under the city, with an access point in the Temple.
translation: 我在小神之殿跟杰克斯谈过了。他确认城市下面确实有一些隧道，神庙里就有一个入口。

english: I spoke to Junior Jim and traded the Cup I found in exchange for a Raft. He then helped me build myself a Cargo Hold on my new Raft. He also gave me a Captain's Log to track my adventures out at sea with.
translation: 我跟小吉姆说过了，用找到的杯子换了个木筏。他又帮我在新木筏上建了个货舱，还给了本船长日志记录海上冒险。

english: I spoke to Katrine in the Black Arm Gang Headquarters to the west of the Varrock South Gate. She offered to let me join the Gang in return for stealing two Phoenix Crossbows from the Phoenix Gang.
translation: 我跟黑臂帮总部的凯特琳谈过了，总部在瓦洛克南门西边。她提出让我偷两把凤凰弩来换取加入黑臂帮。

english: I spoke to King Arthur and he said I would be worthy of becoming a Knight of the Round Table if I could free Merlin from a giant crystal that he has been trapped in.
translation: 我跟亚瑟王谈过了，他说要是我能解放被困在巨型水晶里的梅林，就够格成为圆桌骑士。

english: I spoke to King Lathas in Ardougne Castle. He asked me to find a way through the Underground Pass, the only known way into the lands to the west.
translation: 我在阿多格恩城堡与拉萨斯国王交谈过。他让我找一条穿过地下通道的路，那是已知通往西部地区的唯一途径。

english: I spoke to King Lathas in Ardougne Castle. He informed me that the time had come journey into the west and deal with his brother, King Tyras. To get there, King Lathas told me to travel through the recently repaired Well of Voyage within the Underground Pass.
translation: 我跟阿多尼城堡的拉萨斯国王谈过。他告知我，是时候前往西方解决他的兄弟泰拉斯国王了。拉萨斯国王让我通过地下通道内最近修好的“旅程之井”前往那里。

english: I spoke to Kolodion in the Mage Arena basement. He said I could train in the Mage Arena if I dueled him.
translation: 我跟法师竞技场地下室的克洛狄翁谈过了。他说要和他决斗才能在那里训练。

english: I spoke to Kolodion in the Mage Arena basement. He said he could imbue my god cape with great power if I defeated three powerful foes and brought him their remains.
translation: 我跟法师竞技场地下室的克罗迪恩谈过。他说如果我击败三个强大的敌人，带回他们的遗骸，就能给我的神披风注入强大力量。

english: I spoke to Mistag and agreed to help a Dorgeshuun agent spy on the HAM group.
translation: 我与米斯塔格交谈，同意帮助一位达苟斯舒恩间谍监视HAM组织。

english: I spoke to Montai. The orb was in the Khazard stronghold North of the battlefield, but it was secure in there.
translation: 我跟蒙泰谈过了。水晶球在战场北面的卡扎德要塞里，但那里守卫森严。

english: I spoke to Mori in Arceuus. Despite the supposed immortality of the Arceuus people, her friend Thana had just died. Mori asked me to inform Councillor Andrews of the Kourend Council, hoping that he could help.
translation: 我在阿尔修斯跟莫里谈过。尽管阿尔修斯人据说不朽，她的朋友萨娜却刚刚去世。莫里让我去告知科伦德议会的安德鲁斯议员，希望他能提供帮助。

english: I spoke to Oziach in Edgeville. He told me to slay the dragon of Crandor island.
translation: 我在艾奇维尔和奥齐亚克聊了聊。他让我去杀死克兰多岛上的龙。

english: I spoke to Pagida in the Library Historical Archive. He didn't have any information on the expedition but did agree to let me access the Tower of Magic Prison which was built around the time the expedition took place.
translation: 我在图书馆历史档案室和帕吉达谈了谈。他对那次远征一无所知，但同意让我进入魔法监狱塔，那座塔大约是在远征期间建造的。

english: I spoke to Raley at his home on the Great Conch. He mentioned Floopa had gone missing, so I offered to help find her.
translation: 我在大螺壳的瑞利家中和他谈过话。他提到弗鲁帕失踪了，于是我主动提出帮忙寻找她。

english: I spoke to Reldo in the Varrock Palace Library and he helped me work out the names of the descendants of the Elders of Avarrocka.
translation: 我在瓦洛克皇宫图书馆与雷尔多交谈，他帮我理清了阿瓦罗卡长老后裔的名字。

english: I spoke to Safalaan again. He told me that he intends to lead the Myreque out of Morytania to escape the threat of the Abomination. However, he agreed to help me investigate Serafina and her discovery before leaving.
translation: 我又和萨法拉谈了一次。他说打算带领米瑞克撤离莫里塔尼亚以躲避那异形怪物的威胁。不过，在离开前他同意帮我调查塞拉菲娜及其发现。

english: I spoke to Sarah at the farm. She explained that she was attacked at the Crossroads north of Draynor.
translation: 我跟农场里的莎拉谈过了。她说自己在德拉诺北边的十字路口遭到了袭击。

english: I spoke to Spria about my triumph. She gave me some Slayer Reward Points.
translation: 我向斯普瑞娅讲述了胜利的事迹，她给了我一些杀戮者奖励点数。

english: I spoke to Steve about hunting down Will and Anne. He told me I'd need a Boat of my own and directed me to Junior Jim on the docks of The Pandemonium.
translation: 我跟史蒂夫谈过追捕威尔和安妮的事。他说我需要一艘自己的船，还让我去潘德莫尼姆码头找小吉姆。

english: I spoke to Strongbones inside the Goblin Crypt. He told me that if the barriers between the planes were ever to be broken, goblin blood would call out and open a portal to Yu'biusk.
translation: 我在哥布林地窟里与壮骨谈了谈。他告诉我，如果位面之间的屏障被打破，哥布林之血就会召唤并打开通往尤比斯克的大门。

english: I spoke to Zanik and Oldak in Dorgesh-Kaan and told them what I'd discovered about Yu'biusk. With this information, we were able to use a magical Fungus Ring in the caves south of the city to open a portal to Yu'biusk.
translation: 我在多尔格什-卡恩与扎尼克和奥达克交谈，告诉了他们我在尤比乌斯克的发现。借助这些情报，我们利用城南部洞穴中的魔法菌环成功打开了通往尤比乌斯克的传送门。

english: I spoke to a Guard outside the Carnillean Mansion in East Ardougne. He asked me to help him investigate a crime at the Mansion.
translation: 我在东阿多尼的卡尼利安大宅外与一名卫兵交谈。他让我帮忙调查大宅里的一起案件。

english: I spoke to a Wanderer in her camp north of the locked down city of Sophanem, but she didn't take kindly to the presence of my Cat. In return for me putting it away, she promised to tell me about a Secret Passage into the city.
translation: 我对索法南姆封锁区北边营地里的一位流浪者说过话，但她不太喜欢我的猫。作为让我把猫收起来的回报，她答应告诉我一条进入城市的秘密通道。

english: I spoke to all of the General Store Owners. While speaking with the Arceuus Store Owner, the Dark Altar was mentioned. The mention of this caused the Enchanted Quill to glow and damage my hand.
translation: 我和所有杂货店老板都交谈过了。在和阿瑟乌斯杂货店老板谈话时，他提到了黑暗祭坛。这话让附魔羽毛笔发光并灼伤了我的手。

english: I spoke to some pirates in the Rusty Anchor Inn and learned about two different ways to avoid falling victim to sea curses.
translation: 我在锈锚旅馆跟几个海盗聊了聊，学到了两种避免遭受海咒的方法。

english: I spoke to the Cook in Lumbridge, who asked for my help again in preparing a feast for some very important visitors to the castle.
translation: 我跟卢姆布里奇的厨师谈了谈，他再次请我帮忙，为一些非常重要的城堡访客准备一场盛宴。

english: I spoke to the Duke of Lumbridge about getting a business permit for Cassius' future milk empire, but unfortunately the Duke couldn't grant us one without us speaking to the Groats family first.
translation: 我跟伦布里奇公爵谈过为卡西乌斯未来的牛奶帝国申请商业许可证的事，但不幸的是，公爵说我们得先跟格罗茨家族谈过才能批准。

english: I spoke to the Ghost and he told me he could not rest in peace because an evil wizard had stolen his skull.
translation: 我跟幽灵谈过，他说有个邪恶巫师偷了他的头骨，所以他无法安息。

english: I spoke to the Gossip about the Sinclairs.
translation: 我跟八卦女谈过辛克莱一家的事。

english: I spoke to the High Priest in Sophanem. He told me that when the Plagues in the city started, the neighbouring city of Menaphos was quarantined. However, many citizens from Sophanem became trapped there as a result. The High Priest tried to convince Menaphos to end the quarantine, but they refused.
translation: 我跟索菲纳姆的大祭司谈过了。他说城里瘟疫爆发时，邻城梅纳弗斯被隔离了。结果许多索菲纳姆的市民被困在那里。大祭司试图说服梅纳弗斯解除隔离，但他们拒绝了。

english: I spoke to the Hunting Expert and she showed me how to catch and train a Broav.
translation: 我跟狩猎专家聊过，她教我怎么捕捉和训练一只布罗瓦。

english: I spoke to the Tasakaal within Mount Karuulm. They seemed reluctant to help, believing the immortality of Arceuus to be an affront to the balance between life and death. However, in the end they agreed, but they asked me to do something for them first.
translation: 我跟卡鲁尔姆山的塔萨卡族谈过了。他们不太愿意帮忙，认为阿塞乌斯的永生是对生死平衡的亵渎。不过最后他们还是同意了，但要求我先替他们做件事。

english: I spoke to the curator at Varrock museum and he informed me that the barge at the digsite was almost complete. I was sufficiently qualified to offer my services to the expedition.
translation: 我跟维洛克博物馆的馆长聊过了，他说挖掘场那艘驳船快完工了。以我的经验，完全够资格为这次探险搭把手了。

english: I spoke to the imprisoned Gnome and with a bit of work I managed to convince him to fix the Device for me. I then used it to re-dye the Sheep around East Ardougne.
translation: 我和囚禁的侏儒谈了谈，费了点功夫说服他帮我修好了装置。然后用它把东阿多格尼附近的羊重新染了色。

english: I spoke to the navigator, he sounds like the likely suspect - what a cheeky chap! But he suggested I check with the captain.
translation: 我跟领航员谈过了，他听起来很可疑——真是个厚脸皮的家伙！但他建议我去问问船长。

english: I spoke to the other members of the Myreque and convinced them to work with Vanescula.
translation: 我跟Myreque的其他成员谈了，说服他们与Vanescula合作。

english: I spoke with Burntof, Checkal and Marley. It took some convincing, but they all agreed to work with Willow again.
translation: 我和伯恩托夫、奇卡尔、马利谈过了。费了些口舌，但他们总算都同意再次与维洛合作了。

english: I spoke with Launa next to the rift and she told me about her lost Son.
translation: 我跟裂隙旁的劳娜谈过了，她告诉了我她失踪的儿子的事。

english: I spoke with Thurgo at Mudskipper Point about the Special Key and he helped me make a Crowbar.
translation: 我在泥滩角与瑟尔戈谈论了特殊钥匙的事，他帮我做了一把撬棍。

english: I started chatting to the locals, making certain not to stick out too much. The place was a dump; a real ghetto. It's a terrible place to live! I pity those poor people living in Meiyerditch.
translation: 我跟当地居民聊了聊，尽量低调不引人注意。这儿简直是个垃圾场，标准的贫民窟！根本不是人住的地方！我真同情那些住在梅耶迪奇的可怜人。

english: I started climbing the cliffs to reach Weiss.
translation: 我开始攀爬悬崖，前往维丝。

english: I started my Quest for the Holy Grail in Camelot Castle.
translation: 我在卡梅洛特城堡开始了圣杯任务的征程。

english: I stole Fenkenstrain's Ring of Charos, and he released me from his service.
translation: 我偷走了芬肯斯特兰的查洛斯之戒，于是他解除了我的职务。

english: I stole a Plushy from Marcellus and planted it on the Flies.
translation: 我从马塞勒斯那里偷了一个布偶，然后把它放在了苍蝇身上。

english: I successfully freed Elena from the Plague House. I returned to Edmond who thanked me for rescuing her. He gave me a new spell to learn as a reward.
translation: 我成功将埃琳娜从疫病之屋中解救出来。回到埃德蒙那里，他感谢我救了她，并奖励了我一个新的咒语供学习。

english: I successfully made the potion and used it to enter the Grand Library of Prifddinas.
translation: 我成功制成了药水，并用它进入了普里菲迪纳斯的大图书馆。

english: I successfully staked out the house to make sure no one was home.
translation: 我成功盯梢了那间屋子，确认没人在家。

english: I suppose we're about to find out...
translation: 看来我们很快就能知道了…

english: I suspect not. If she has taken on my daughter's memories, she will be all too aware of who I am. She will not be able to resist an audience with me.
translation: 我猜不然。若她真继承了我女儿的记忆，必深知我是谁。断然无法抗拒与我相见的机会。

english: I talked to Dunstan and he gave me the Law Talisman as a token of thanks!
translation: 我和邓斯坦谈了谈，他送了我一个律法护符作为答谢！

english: I talked to Elissa about the letter from the desert.
translation: 我和艾丽莎谈过了关于沙漠来的信。

english: I talked to Grish in the Jiggig area which is swarming with Zombie Ogres
translation: 我在僵尸食人魔泛滥的吉吉格区域与格里什交谈过。

english: I talked to Lazim in the desert south of the Bandit Camp, and he told me he was a sculptor. I agreed to help him build a statue in the desert.
translation: 我跟荒漠强盗营南边的拉齐姆谈过，他说自己是个雕刻家。我答应帮他在这片荒漠里建一座雕像。

english: I talked to Veliaf about helping the Myreque again. He gave me a pretty important mission: to enter the Sanguinesti region and make contact with the Myreque. Being a pretty hands-on sort of woman, I set to work repairing a nearby boat and the slipway. It took a bit of nous to get them both fixed up, but before too long I'd launched the boat and was ready to set sail.
translation: 我又和威利亚夫谈了谈关于帮助迈里奎的事。他交给我一项相当重要的任务：进入桑圭内斯蒂地区，与迈里奎建立联系。身为一个喜欢亲力亲为的女子，我立刻着手修理附近的一艘船和滑道。费了些脑筋才把它们都修好，不过没过多久我就把船推下水，准备扬帆起航了。

english: I talked to the Prince and Princess. Prince Brand suggested I persuade the King and Queen to marry.
translation: 我跟王子和公主谈过了。布兰德王子建议我劝说国王和王后成婚。

english: I talked to the dwarf. He said he'd seen a giant monster with huge teeth and eyes, and warned me about the caves. He also gave me a mining prop so I could get through the crack in the wall.
translation: 我跟矮人谈过了。他说见过一个长着巨牙和巨眼的怪物，还警告我别靠近洞穴。他还给了我一个采矿支架，让我能穿过墙上的裂缝。

english: I talked to the villagers who informed me that I had caused them more harm by removing the Menaphite leader.
translation: 我跟村民们谈话，他们说我除掉门纳弗首领反而给他们带来了更多麻烦。

english: I talked with the strange character in the centre. Seems I have to solve some games to learn about myself: A game of chance!
translation: 我和中间那个怪人聊了聊。看来得解开几个迷局才能了解自己：一个靠运气的游戏！

english: I tell myself it's for the future. A future for my son... A future for all who have suffered at the hands of the vampyres...
translation: 我告诉自己这是为了未来。为了我儿子的未来……为了所有遭受过吸血鬼折磨之人的未来……

english: I then delivered it to the High Priest in Sophanem.
translation: 然后我把这个送到了索法尼姆的大祭司那里。

english: I think I need to take a close look at the Saradomin shrine, west of Witchaven.
translation: 我想得仔细看看萨拉多明神龛，它在巫妖港西边。

english: I threw the Doll into the corrupted Well of Voyage. By doing so, I killed Iban for good. I returned to King Lathas and let him know that the way through the Underground Pass was clear.
translation: 我将人偶扔进了被腐蚀的旅行之井。以此彻底消灭了伊班。我回到拉萨斯国王处告知地下通道已畅通。

english: I told Colin that there was no mermaid there, to reassure him that the curse was not his fault.
translation: 我告诉科林那里没有美人鱼，让他放心诅咒不是他的错。

english: I told Gnocci that the doll was not possessed, to reassure him that the curse was not his fault.
translation: 我告诉格诺奇那个娃娃并没有被附身，让他放心诅咒不是他的错。

english: I told Kaqemeex I would help them prepare their ceremony.
translation: 我跟卡奎米克斯说我会帮他们准备仪式。

english: I told Lancelot of Gawain's suspicions, and he told me that Mordred's Fortress is not completely impenetratable.
translation: 我向兰斯洛特提及了高文的疑虑，他告诉我莫德雷德的堡垒并非完全无法攻破。

english: I told Marlo that I'd finished helping his father, and he confirmed he'd reward me.
translation: 我告诉马洛我已经帮他父亲完成了任务，他确认会给我奖励。

english: I told Phileas about the message which convinced him that someone survived the expedition. He asked me to conduct an expedition of my own to try and find out what the original team discovered.
translation: 我向菲利亚斯提到了那条消息，这让他确信有人在探险中幸存了下来。他委托我亲自带队展开一次探险，试图查明原始队伍究竟发现了什么。

english: I told Romeo what was going to happen, but I'm not exactly sure he understood what was happening. Ah well, I was rewarded for all of my help regardless.
translation: 我已经告诉罗密欧会发生什么，但我不太确定他是否理解了状况。不过也罢，我所有的帮助终究都得到了回报。

english: I told him about getting shot out of a cannon. I hope I never have to do that again.
translation: 我跟他聊了被大炮轰出去的事儿。但愿这辈子别再经历一回了。

english: I told the golem that the demon was dead, but it did not believe me!
translation: 我告诉魔像恶魔已经死了，但它不信！

english: I told the penguins about Farmer Fred, but I wanted to spice it up a little.
translation: 我跟企鹅们讲了农夫弗雷德的故事，不过加了些料。

english: I told the sisters that I'd successfully caught the rats. They said I already knew everything they could teach me and gave me a Rat Pole.
translation: 我告诉姐妹们我已经成功捕到了老鼠。她们说我已经掌握了她们能教的所有技巧，并给了我一根老鼠杆。

english: I took Grubfoot to meet with Zanik at Oldak's Lab in Dorgesh- Kaan. He told us about a dream he had of Zanik leading the goblins to a place called Yu'biusk.
translation: 我带葛布脚去多盖什-卡恩的奥达克实验室见了赞妮克。他说他梦见赞妮克带领地精们前往一个叫尤比斯克的地方。

english: I took Ivan to the temple in order that he can be kept safe and away from harms way. However, I then talked to Drezel and he seemed quite cagey when I asked him about Ivandis.
translation: 我带伊凡去了神庙，好让他安全远离危险。但后来我找德里泽尔谈话，问他关于伊凡迪斯的事，他却显得相当遮遮掩掩。

english: I took Varmen's notes from the Digsite Exam Centre.
translation: 我从考古挖掘中心拿了瓦门的笔记。

english: I took the Abyssal Incantation from the Dark Mage to Persten.
translation: 我将从黑暗法师那里获得的深渊咒语交给了普斯顿。

english: I took the Mayor to Catherine to get the By-Law changed.
translation: 我带村长去见凯瑟琳，修改了地方法规。

english: I took the Orb to Entrana and placed it on the Altar in the Church. However, using the Orb, an Assassin teleported in and stole a Relic. The High Priest asked me to return to Paterdomus and find the Monk who gave me the Orb.
translation: 我把球体带到了恩特拉纳，并将其放置在教堂的祭坛上。然而，使用球体时，一名刺客传送进来偷走了一件圣物。大祭司让我返回帕特多姆斯，找到给我球体的那个僧侣。

english: I touched the door to the Pyramid, and I experienced a Flashback of me going inside to steal something. It seems I was hypnotised to do so, likely by the Wanderer.
translation: 我触碰了金字塔的门，回想起我曾进去偷东西的片段。看来我是被催眠了，很可能是那个流浪者干的。

english: I travelled north east of the Necropolis and found the Ruins mentioned by the Guard. There, I discovered an Entrance leading underground. I was able to craft a Scarab Emblem, which I inserted into a nearby Pillar, unlocking the Entrance.
translation: 我前往亡灵之城的东北方，找到了卫兵所说的遗迹。在那里，我发现了一个通往地下的入口。我制作了一个圣甲虫徽章，并将其插入附近的石柱，入口随即开启。

english: I travelled to Baxtorian Falls with Arianwyn. We discovered that the statue of Baxtorian there was in fact Baxtorian himself, frozen in stone. We managed to free him from the statue and Arianwyn took him back to Lletya.
translation: 我与Arianwyn一同前往Baxtorian瀑布。我们发现那里的Baxtorian雕像竟是本人，被封冻在石中。我们成功将他从雕像中释放，Arianwyn带他返回了Lletya。

english: I travelled to Ivandis' Tomb below Canifis with Veliaf and Ivan.
translation: 我和Veliaf、Ivan一同来到了Canifis下方的Ivandis之墓。

english: I travelled to Paterdomus and spoke to someone claiming to be Drezel. At his request, I headed into the Mausoleum below the temple and killed a Dog-like Thing causing trouble down there.
translation: 我前往Paterdomus，与一个自称Drezel的人交谈。应他要求，我进入神殿下方的陵墓，杀死了一只在那里捣乱的狗形生物。

english: I travelled to an isolated lighthouse north of the Barbarian outpost, to find a Fremennik girl called Larrissa locked outside, and worried about her boyfriend Jossik.
translation: 我来到了蛮族前哨以北一座孤立的灯塔前，发现一个叫拉丽莎的弗雷蒙尼女孩被锁在外面，正为她的男友乔西克担心。

english: I travelled to the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock and found Dr Harlow. He told me that vampyres are hard to kill due to their ability to regenerate. However, he gave me a Stake and told me I could use it to prevent the regeneration.
translation: 我去了维洛克城的蓝月旅店，找到了哈洛博士。他告诉我吸血鬼因为拥有再生能力而难以杀死。不过，他给了我一根木桩，并告诉我可以用它来阻止其再生。

english: I travelled to the Fight Arena Bar to try and find Evelot. I paid the Barman there for some information, and he told me she'd left the Bar just before I arrived.
translation: 我去了战斗竞技场酒吧，想找埃芙洛特。我付钱给那里的酒保打听消息，他说我到达前她刚离开酒吧。

english: I travelled to the Library Historical Archive and managed to recover Rose's Diary.
translation: 我去了图书馆历史档案馆，设法找到了罗丝的日记。

english: I travelled to the Quetzacalli Gorge Pub and rented a room there. I met with Itzla's Contact in the room, but they turned out to be Itzla himself. He explained his plan to infiltrate the Twilight Emissaries by posing as new recruits. To do so, I spoke to the Quetzacalli Gorge Shopkeeper, a member of the Emissaries, about joining. He agreed to send word to them.
translation: 我前往了奎察卡利峡谷酒馆，在那里租了个房间。在房间里遇到了伊茨拉的接头人，结果那人就是伊茨拉本人。他解释了自己的计划：假扮成新兵混入暮光使者组织。为此，我和奎察卡利峡谷店主——一名使者成员——谈了加入的事。他答应会向组织传话。

english: I travelled to the Ruined Building and met up with Veliaf and Ivan. While Ivan kept watch outside, Veliaf and I went in and found Vanescula in an old Vampyrification Lab. To our horror, we discovered that she'd turned Safalaan into a vampyre.
translation: 我前往废墟建筑与Veliaf和Ivan会合。Ivan在外放哨时，我和Veliaf潜入内部，在一间古老的吸血鬼转化实验室里发现了Vanescula。令人惊骇的是，她竟将Safalaan转化成了吸血鬼。

english: I travelled to the Ruins of Camdozaal and spoke with Ramarno, the last of the Imcando Dwarves there. He told me that the Sacred Forge would give me access to something called the Dream Theatre, where I'd be able to learn more about the Shield.
translation: 我前往坎多扎尔废墟，与那里最后的伊姆坎多矮人拉马诺交谈。他告诉我，神圣熔炉将让我进入一个名为梦境剧场的地方，在那里我能了解更多关于盾牌的事。

english: I travelled to the Twilight Temple and witnessed Metzli giving a speech to her followers with Ennius and Furia at her side.
translation: 我前往暮光神殿，目睹梅兹莉在恩纽斯和芙莉娅的陪伴下向追随者发表演讲。

english: I travelled to the Twilight Temple east of Quetzacalli Gorge and met with Itzla outside the Tower of Ascension. While we waited to be called up to take our Recruitment Tests, I spoke to the other Recruits. One of them told me the Emissaries had a new leader called the Augur.
translation: 我前往了奎察卡利峡谷东面的暮光神殿，在登天塔外见到了伊茨拉。在等待被叫去参加征募测试时，我跟其他新兵聊了聊。其中一人告诉我，使节团换了新头目，叫做先知。

english: I travelled to the town of Mort'ton where the people had an affliction. I found the diary of 'Herbi Flax' and managed to work out the ingredients for a special serum. The serum worked on the afflicted and I was able to speak to several villagers.
translation: 我前往了莫尔顿镇，那里的人们身染怪病。我找到了赫比·弗拉克斯的日记，并成功研制出特殊血清的解药配方。血清对患者生效后，我与几位村民交谈了一番。

english: I tried adding some Fur to the Fake Head to see if that would convince Gordon. However, he still didn't buy it.
translation: 我试着给假头加了点毛，看能不能骗过戈登。但他还是不上当。

english: I tried telling Veldaban something important, but I forgot what I wanted to say to him.
translation: 我本想告诉维尔达班一些重要的事，但忘记要对他说什么了。

english: I tried to defeat the shamans, but they are protected by powerful magics! I should speak with the Watchtower wizard to see if he has any advice for me.
translation: 我试过击败那些萨满，但她们被强大的魔法保护着！我应该去找瞭望塔巫师谈谈，看他有没有什么建议。

english: I tried to enter the Arboretum in the middle of Darkmeyer.
translation: 我试图进入Darkmeyer中心的植物园。

english: I tried to enter the mines but my way was blocked by a guard. I was sure I had to get deeper into the mines.
translation: 我试图进入矿井，但被一名守卫拦住了。我很确定必须深入矿井。

english: I tried to fight the Monster but I was quickly overwhelmed.
translation: 我试图与那怪物战斗，但很快就败下阵来。

english: I tried to make Gordon a Fake Head out of Clay. However, he didn't buy it.
translation: 我想给Gordon用粘土做个假头，但他不上当。

english: I underwent the monkey commander Duke's extensive combat training programme.
translation: 我完成了猴子指挥官杜克的高强度战斗训练项目。

english: I unlocked the Door within the Lizardman Temple. Behind, I found another area of the Temple. In this area, I overheard a conversation between a mage called Xamphur and his Mysterious Master. It sounded like the two had only recently been united and that it was the earlier Earthquake that enabled this. Before they could say much more, they realised I was there and teleported me into the room with them. Apart from myself and Xamphur, the only other person in the room appeared to be Veos. Could he be Xamphur's Master?
translation: 我打开了蜥蜴人神庙内的那扇门。门后是神庙的另一片区域。在这里，我无意中听到了一个名叫Xamphur的法师与他神秘主人的对话。听起来两人似是刚刚重逢，而先前的"地震"促成了这一切。他们还未来得及多说，便发现我在此处，随即将我瞬移到了他们所在的房间。除我和Xamphur外，房里似乎只有Veos一人。难道他就是Xamphur的主人？

english: I unlocked the door. It was trickier than locks I've tried before.
translation: 门开了。这锁比我之前弄过的都要棘手。

english: I upgraded my flail like you suggested.
translation: 我照你的建议升级了连枷。

english: I used a Catapult near King Tyras's camp to fire the Bomb into his tent, dealing with him once and for all.
translation: 我在泰拉斯国王营地附近用投石机将炸弹射入他的帐篷，彻底解决了他。

english: I used an ancestral key and wore some robes of Eldinis that I had found in the shrine in Nardah to get through some double doors in the cave.
translation: 我用先祖钥匙并穿上在Nardah神龛找到的艾尔迪尼斯长袍，穿过了洞穴中的双扇门。

english: I used my disguise to infiltrate the Mourner Headquarters in West Ardougne. Inside, I met Essyllt, the elf in charge of the Mourners. He revealed a mining operation beneath the city to me. However, he didn't trust me enough to tell me what it was for.
translation: 我利用伪装潜入了西阿尔多恩的哀悼者总部。在里面见到了哀悼者首领艾塞尔特精灵，他向我透露了城市地下的采矿作业，但对我还不够信任，没有说明其用途。

english: I used some cave nightshade to distract the enclave guard.
translation: 我用了一点洞穴颠茄引开了守卫。

english: I used the ID on the guard and he let me into the iceberg. I needed to be debriefed before I could go any further.
translation: 我对守卫使用了身份证明，他放我进入了冰山。但我需要先接受情况汇报才能继续前进。

english: I used the Talismans to find the source of power in Neypotzli.
translation: 我使用护符找到了涅伊波兹利的能量源头。

english: I used the enchanted Amulet of Catspeak to locate Bob.
translation: 我用附魔的猫语护身符找到了鲍勃。

english: I used the mining prop, and got into a cave with a high ledge and a broken lift.
translation: 我用了采矿道具，进入了一个有高岩架和破损升降机的洞穴。

english: I used the press to flatten the hot elemental bar.
translation: 我用压机把炽热元素棒压扁了。

english: I used the twigs to open a trap door in Glough's house.
translation: 我用树枝打开了格洛房子里的活板门。

english: I used this key to reach the legendary crystals, from which I cut a salve shard to aid in fighting the undead.
translation: 我用这把钥匙找到了传说中的水晶，从中切下一块疗魂碎片，用以对抗亡灵。

english: I visited the home of the Rehnison Family in the north of the city to see if I could find Elena.
translation: 我去了城北的雷尼森家族宅邸，想看看能不能找到埃琳娜。

english: I waited for Carl to go and retrieve some more Bloody Bracer from his supplier. When he did, I followed him. Eventually, he led me into the Slepe Dungeon.
translation: 我等着卡尔去找他的供应商多拿些血腥护腕。等他拿回来时，我便跟上了他。最终，他带我进入了斯利普地牢。

english: I wanted to hear Ping and Pong's song but they didn't have any instruments, so I had to steal a cowbell from a cow and make a set of bongos.
translation: 我想听乒乒乓乓的歌，但他们没有乐器，所以我只好从牛那儿偷了个牛铃，又做了一组邦戈鼓。

english: I was a child! I was a child who had to stand and watch as my father died!
translation: 我当时还是个孩子！我只能眼睁睁看着父亲死去！

english: I was able to operate the crane and dip the elemental bar into the lava. The bar is now very hot.
translation: 我操作起重机将元素棒浸入熔岩中。现在这根棒子非常烫手。

english: I was able to pick up Evelot's trail outside the Fight Arena Bar.
translation: 我在战斗竞技场酒吧外找到了Evelot的踪迹。

english: I was able to reassure Arsen that the curse was not his fault.
translation: 我成功安抚了Arsen，让他明白诅咒并非他的过错。

english: I was given a map by the guard.
translation: 守卫给了我一张地图。

english: I was given a pair of Reinforced Goggles to protect my eyes from the Sourhog's spitting attack.
translation: 有人给了我一双强化护目镜，用来保护眼睛免受酸猪喷射攻击。

english: I was hoping I'd find you here.
translation: 我正希望在这儿找到你。

english: I was thrown into a pit deep in the iceberg where they locked away the Ice Lords. I killed an Ice Lord and managed to escape!
translation: 我被丢进了冰山深处的冰牢，那里关押着冰霜领主们。我杀掉了一个冰霜领主，成功逃了出来！

english: I went back to Herman to see if he wanted me to do anything else.
translation: 我回去找赫尔曼，想看看他还有没有别的事要我去做。

english: I went back to Lumbridge to tell the penguins the secret phrase. They talked to me, but reluctantly.
translation: 我回到伦布里奇，把暗号告诉了企鹅们。它们虽然跟我说话了，但显得很不情愿。

english: I went to Lumbridge Swamp and talked to the goblin sergeants.
translation: 我去了伦布里奇沼泽，跟那些哥布林军士交谈了一番。

english: I went to Lumbridge and found the penguin operatives disguised as sheep in Farmer Fred's field! I performed the greeting correctly for these new penguins. They didn't seem impressed.
translation: 我去过洛姆布里奇，在农夫弗雷德的田里发现了伪装成绵羊的企鹅特工！我对这些新企鹅正确地行了问候礼，但它们似乎并不买账。

english: I went to the Apothecary regarding making this cadava potion, and he told me to bring him some cadava berries.
translation: 我去找了药剂师做这种卡达瓦药水，他让我带些卡达瓦浆果来。

english: I went to the Myreque Hideout and told Safalaan what I'd seen.
translation: 我去了梅里奎藏身处，把所见之事告诉了萨法拉安。

english: I went to the Rat & Bat Inn and spoke to the barkeep, Carl.
translation: 我去了鼠蝠旅馆，跟酒馆老板卡尔聊了聊。

english: I went to the train tunnel in south-west Dorgesh-Kaan and talked to Tegdak.
translation: 我去了多尔盖什-卡恩西南的火车隧道，跟泰格达克聊了聊。

english: I will be generous with you and allow you to keep one. The other you will return to me. Safalaan or Efaritay, the choice is yours.
translation: 我会对你宽厚，允许你保留一个。另一个你要还给我。萨法拉恩还是埃法瑞泰，选择权在你。

english: I will help you control it. There are potions that can be made. Rituals that can help. No matter what, we will overcome this, together.
translation: 我会帮你控制它。有些药水可以制作，有些仪式能派上用场。无论如何，我们都会一起战胜这一切的。

english: I will see that it is. Now, my disciples are gathering on the bridge outside. You should collect some supplies from the kitchen if needed, then join them there. I wish you good luck, my child.
translation: 我知道了。现在，我的弟子们正在外面的桥上集结。如果需要的话，你该从厨房拿些补给，然后到那里与他们会合。祝你好运，我的孩子。

english: I woke up outside a Pyramid in the city of Sophanem with a strange Burial Jar in my possession. I had no memory of how I obtained it or how I got there, but a nearby Ghost seemed very angry with me. The last thing I remembered was speaking to the Wanderer outside the city.
translation: 我在索法南姆城的一座金字塔外醒来，手中有一个奇怪的葬罐。我完全不记得是如何得到它的，也不记得自己是怎么来到这里的，但附近的一个幽灵似乎对我非常愤怒。我最后的记忆是在城外与流浪者交谈。

english: I wonder if I can find any information inside the dungeon.
translation: 不知道地牢里能不能找到什么线索。

english: I worked out that I needed to enter a cave at the source of the river Elid.
translation: 我明白了，得进入艾利德河源头的一个洞穴。

english: I would see us return to lives of strength! I will take us back to a land where we will live as we were meant to! Not as royalty! Not as aristocrats! No. We will be hunters once more.
translation: 我愿见我们重归强韧之生！我将带领我们回到那片本应生存的土地！既非王族！亦非贵族！不。我们将再次成为猎人。

english: I'd better get back to it.
translation: 我最好还是回去干活吧。

english: I'll be fine. Just tell me which way he went.
translation: 我没事。告诉我他往哪边走了。

english: I'll find it.
translation: 我来找它。

english: I'll get back to it.
translation: 我稍后再处理。

english: I'll try and teleport us out of here! Keep them off me!
translation: 我来试着用传送法术带我们出去！别让他们靠近我！

english: I'm afraid that we have decided on... alternate arrangements for the future of the vampyres. Unfortunately, my daughter is not here to help you this time.
translation: 恐怕我们已经为吸血鬼的未来...做出了不同的安排。很不幸，这次我女儿不在，无法帮你。

english: I'm afraid, my child, the original plan was cut short after your arrival in Vampyrium. However, given the situation we are in... I fear we will have to make do.
translation: 恐怕孩子，你到达吸血鬼之地后，原计划就中断了。但鉴于目前的处境……恐怕我们只能将就了。

english: I'm already under attack!
translation: 我已经被攻击了！

english: I'm already under attack.
translation: 我已在受攻击了。

english: I'm fine. Any sign of Ivan?
translation: 我没事。有伊凡的消息吗？

english: I'm fine... but, your companions... Shouldn't we go back and help them?
translation: 我没事...但你的同伴们...我们不该回去帮他们吗？

english: I'm leaving Morytania. It's not safe for me here anymore. Not now Vanescula is gone. Before I go though, there's something you need to know.
translation: 我要离开摩里塔尼亚了。这儿对我来说不再安全——如今瓦内斯库拉不在了。不过走之前，有件事你得知道。

english: I'm not here to impress you. I'm here to stop you. We won't be plagued by your evil any longer!
translation: 我不是来讨好你的。我是来阻止你的。我们不会再被你的邪恶所困扰了！

english: I'm not leaving you out here!
translation: 我不会把你丢在这里！

english: I'm not sure exactly, but all vampyres have been ordered to attend a gathering outside Castle Drakan. Apparently he has an announcement to make regarding the future of Morytania.
translation: 我不太确定，但所有吸血鬼都被命令前往德拉肯城堡外参加集会。显然，他有关于莫里塔尼亚未来的重要事宜要宣布。

english: I'm not too sure, but I do wonder if that journal you found could help us out in some way. I'll give it another read and see what I can come up with.
translation: 我也不能确定，但我在想，你找到的那本日记或许能在某些方面帮到我们。我再仔细看看，看看能想出什么办法来。

english: I'm now an honorary member of the Imperial Guard!
translation: 我现在是帝国卫队的荣誉成员了！

english: I'm offering you a choice. If you wish for your freedom, it's right out there waiting for you.
translation: 我给你一个选择。若你渴望自由，它就在门外等着你。

english: I'm preparing a potion that should help him, but he also needs to eat. If you head outside, you will find an amitire plant I have been cultivating.
translation: 我正在准备一种对他有帮助的药水，但他也需要吃点东西。如果你出去，会发现我在种植的阿米泰尔草。

english: I'm right behind you, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 我跟在你后面，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: I'm right behind you.
translation: 我跟在你后面。

english: I'm sorry my child. You have my deepest sympathies, but his sacrifice will not be in vain. With Drakan gone, that which you have fought so hard for can finally come to be.
translation: 抱歉，我的孩子。我深表同情，但他的牺牲不会白费。德拉坎已死，你们为之奋斗的一切终将实现。

english: I'm sorry to disturb you... er...
translation: 抱歉打扰您…呃…

english: I'm waiting for you, Mistress <osrscn-name-0>!
translation: 我在等你，女主人 <osrscn-name-0>！

english: I'm working on it, but I need more time!
translation: 我在处理，但我需要更多时间！

english: I've been working on your furniture.
translation: 我在帮你做家具呢。

english: I've created a Salve Amulet, which greatly enhances my ability to fight undead, gained 2 Quest Points and will now be able to enter Tarn's Lair!
translation: 我制作了神愈护符，它极大增强了对抗亡灵的能力，获得2任务点数，现在可以进入塔恩巢穴！

english: I've created an opening to let Kennith escape.
translation: 我已经制造了一个出口，让肯尼斯逃走。

english: I've discovered the physical form of Tolna, and his father.
translation: 我已经发现了托尔纳的实体形态，和他的父亲。

english: I've found Kennith, he's hiding behind some boxes.
translation: 我找到了肯尼斯，他正躲在几个箱子后面。

english: I've found Kent on a small island.
translation: 我在一个小岛上找到了肯特。

english: I've found a slave who says he's going to escape. I've made a deal with the slave. If I can crack the locks on his chains, he'll trade me his slaves clothes for desert robes. Hopefully, whenn I'm dressed in slaves clothes I'll be able to get deeper in to the mining cave system.
translation: 我找到了一个奴隶，他说自己要逃跑。我和他做了个交易：如果能撬开他锁链上的锁，他就用奴隶服换我的沙漠长袍。希望穿上奴隶服后，能深入矿洞系统。

english: I've helped the dwarves keep out the Goblins, and found the remains of their friend.
translation: 我帮助矮人抵御了哥布林，并找到了他们朋友的遗骸。

english: I've learnt a fair bit from those games, if I talk to the strange character in the centre, they will take me to the last stage.
translation: 我从那些游戏中学到不少，如果和中间的怪人对话，他会带我去最后一关。

english: I've managed to get into the underground mine area and the guards haven't stopped me yet.
translation: 我已经成功进入了地下矿场区域，守卫还没拦我。

english: I've managed to swap the desert robes for slave robes.
translation: 我成功用沙漠长袍换到了奴隶长袍。

english: I've rescued the Homunculus's mind. I should confront Effigy outside the tower.
translation: 我已经拯救了霍蒙克鲁斯的意识。我应该去塔外直面艾菲吉。

english: I've spoken Thormac and he thanked me for finding his pet Kharid Scorpions.
translation: 我跟索尔马克谈过了，他感谢我帮他找到了他的卡里德蝎子宠物。

english: I've spoken to Caroline and she thanked me for rescuing her family from the Sea Slugs.
translation: 我跟卡罗琳谈过了，她感谢我从海蛞蝓手下救出了她的家人。

english: I've spoken to Thormac, he's lost his pet Kharid Scorpions and needs my help to find them.
translation: 我跟索马克谈过了，他弄丢了他的卡里德蝎子宠物，需要我帮忙找到它们。

english: I've spoken to the Seer and been given the location of one of the Kharid Scorpions.
translation: 我与先知谈过，得知了卡里德蝎子之一的位置。

english: I've unlocked the storeroom!
translation: 我解锁了储藏室！

english: Icyene Graveyard.
translation: 艾辛恩墓地。

english: If Drakan gets through those doors, it won't matter where I am! Now let's get this room secure!
translation: 要是德拉肯冲过那些门，我在哪儿都一样！现在先把这房间守住！

english: If Drakan gets through, none of us will be safe. My place is here.
translation: 如果德拉肯攻进来，我们谁都逃不掉。我守在这里。

english: If all goes well, both of the Drakan siblings will be trapped here, and with both Efaritay and Safalaan out of their reach, they will have no way of escaping.
translation: 若一切顺利，德拉肯兄妹二人将被困于此。埃法里泰与萨法兰皆在掌控之外，他们便无路可逃。

english: If not for that tree, I think I'd probably be dead by now.
translation: 要不是那棵树，我估计我现在已经没命了。

english: If she does so, she risks giving Drakan a route back here. We cannot take that risk.
translation: 若她如此做，便可能让德莱肯找到返回此处的路径。我们承担不起这个风险。

english: If the raid begins, you won't be able to re-enter.
translation: 如果突袭开始，你将无法重新进入。

english: If we do defeat Drakan, what happens then?
translation: 如果我们真的击败了德拉肯，然后呢？

english: If you die in Vampyrium, you will respawn there with all of your items. However, these deaths are not considered safe. As such, Hardcore status will be lost.
translation: 若在吸血鬼之地死亡，你将在原处重生并保留所有物品。但此类死亡不被视为安全，因此硬核模式状态将失效。

english: If you do have to leave, you can do so by teleporting. Your Home Teleport spell will always be available.
translation: 如果你必须离开，可以通过传送法术离开。你的“回家传送”法术始终可用。

english: If you will not hunt, you will be hunted. One way or another, the blood needed will be gathered.
translation: 若你不猎，便将被猎。无论如何，所需的鲜血终将汇聚。

english: If you wish for the title, then claim it. You know what the Night of the Blood Moon is. If by the night's end you have the most kills, Lord Myrmel, then you will become our leader.
translation: 若你渴求头衔，便去夺取。你明白血月之夜意味着什么。今夜结束时，若你斩杀最多，米尔梅尔领主，你将成为我们的领袖。

english: If your party survives the wave, you will respawn.
translation: 若你的队伍在波次中存活，你将会重生。

english: Illegal / harmful content
translation: 非法/有害内容

english: Immunity: Crystal-flecked waters
translation: 免疫：水晶斑驳水域

english: In Castle Drakan, I checked in with Ivan to make sure he was okay. Sugadinti then arrived along with Veliaf and Vanescula.
translation: 在德拉肯城堡，我向伊凡确认了他是否安好。随后，苏加丁提与维利亚夫、瓦内斯库拉一同抵达。

english: In Tarn's bedroom I found his diary. It described how he'd developed a spell to enhance the powers of Salve crystals, and how he'd enchanted his diary with the required spell.
translation: 在塔恩的卧室里，我发现了他的日记。日记记载了他如何研发出一种增强萨尔维水晶力量的咒语，以及他如何用所需的咒语给自己的日记施加了附魔。

english: In return for this help Filliman blessed a silver sickle and showed me how to defeat the ghasts of Mort Myre.
translation: 作为回报，菲里曼祝福了一把银镰刀，并教会了我如何击败莫特·迈尔的食尸鬼。

english: In return you will receive:
translation: 你将会得到：

english: In reward, I have now become a fully fledged White Knight of Falador!
translation: 作为回报，我现在已经成为法多克正式的白骑士了！

english: In that case, I shall leave you to it.
translation: 既然如此，我就交给你了。

english: In that case, lead on.
translation: 那好，带路吧。

english: In the Ancient Laboratory, I found an Old Mural which was written in a strange language. Dallas recognised one of the words, Lithkren, from a visit to the House on the Hill on Fossil Island.
translation: 在远古实验室里，我发现了一幅用奇特语言写成的古老壁画。达拉斯认出了其中一个词——利斯克伦，这源自他之前在化石岛山丘上的宅邸之行。

english: In the lands around the Waterfall, I met the cursed ghost of Valdez, a long-dead explorer who was loyal to the god Saradomin. He told me how he'd discovered an abandoned temple, where he was astonished to find the Staff of Armadyl. Valdez took the staff, intending to deliver it to Entrana. However, before he could reach Entrana he was attacked by a thief called Rennard, who stole the staff from him.
translation: 在瀑布附近的土地上，我遇见了瓦尔德兹的诅咒之灵，他是一位早已逝去的探险家，忠于萨拉多明神。他告诉我，他曾发现一座废弃神庙，在那里惊讶地找到了阿玛迪尔之杖。瓦尔德兹取走了法杖，打算将其送往恩特拉纳。然而，在抵达恩特拉纳之前，他遭到一个名叫伦纳德的窃贼袭击，法杖被夺走了。

english: In the most common forms
translation: 最常见的形态

english: In the process of getting a Yommi tree, I released the Kharazi tribe's shaman, Ungadulu, from being possessed by a demon called Nezikchened. I managed to slay the demon, but he kept reappearing!
translation: 在寻找约米树的过程中，我将被名为尼兹克奇尼德的恶魔附身的卡拉齐部落萨满恩加杜鲁解救了出来。我成功杀死了恶魔，但他不断重生！

english: In truth, my child, I'd have preferred we be in a situation where more allies were available to us. However, I still believe she will be enough for us to achieve victory.
translation: 说实话，我的孩子，我本希望我们能有更多盟友相助。但我依然相信，有她在便足以赢得胜利。

english: Increases your chance of blocking a magic attack.
translation: 增加格挡魔法攻击的概率。

english: Increases your chance of blocking a ranged attack.
translation: 增加远程攻击的格挡几率。

english: Increases your chance of blocking a slash attack.
translation: 增加格挡劈砍攻击的几率。

english: Increases your chance of blocking a stab attack.
translation: 增加格挡穿刺攻击的几率。

english: Increases your chance of hitting successfully when you attack.
translation: 提高你攻击时的命中率。

english: Increases your effective accuracy and damage against your Slayer target. This does not stack with the Undead multiplier.
translation: 提升对当前击杀目标的有效命中和伤害。此效果不与亡灵类加成叠加。

english: Increases your max hit for melee.
translation: 提升你的近战最大伤害。

english: Indeed... Now, time is of the essence. We must go to the Theatre at once.
translation: 确实……现在时间紧迫。我们必须立刻前往剧场。

english: Infernal axe: Really put it down?
translation: 地狱斧：真要放下它？

english: Inspect the books?
translation: 检查这些书？

english: Inspect the map.
translation: 查看地图。

english: Instead, Vanstrom goaded Safalaan into losing control. As a result, Safalaan accidentally killed Vanstrom using his powers. At that point, Ivan managed to teleport himself, Veliaf and I away but Safalaan was captured by the vampyres.
translation: 然而，范斯特罗姆刻意激怒萨法拉安，使其失控。结果，萨法拉安失手用力量杀死了范斯特罗姆。那时，伊凡设法将自己、维利亚夫和我传送走，但萨法拉安被吸血鬼们俘虏了。

english: Insurance for what?
translation: 保什么险？

english: Interests:
translation: 兴趣爱好：

english: Intrigued by his description of the Centennial feast, I entered the dining room, where an evil magician from the past appeared, and threatened to kill the entire council!
translation: 出于对百年盛宴描述的着迷，我走进了餐厅，这时一位来自过去的邪恶法师出现了，扬言要杀死整个议会！

english: Irena was distraught that her daughter Ana had vanished somewhere in the desert, and I agreed to help find her.
translation: 艾琳娜因女儿安娜在沙漠中失踪而悲痛欲绝，我答应帮她寻找。

english: Iriandul Caistlyn's travels
translation: 伊兰杜尔·凯斯特林的旅行

english: Is Safalaan okay?
translation: 萨法拉恩还好吗？

english: Is it... true?
translation: 真的...是这样吗？

english: Is now really the best time for this?
translation: 现在真的是做这个的好时机吗？

english: Is this necessary? I've got a house of my own, in Rimmington, and I've been learning about Construction for a while.
translation: 有这个必要吗？我在里明顿有自己的房子，也学了一段时间建造术。

english: Is this:
translation: 这是：

english: Isadora might be able to tell you how.
translation: 伊莎朵拉也许能告诉你方法。

english: Islands: Ape Atoll
translation: 岛屿：猴岛

english: Islands: Near Zul-Andra
translation: 群岛：祖尔安德拉附近

english: Islands: Poison Waste
translation: 岛屿：剧毒荒地

english: Islands: River Salve
translation: 岛屿：萨维尔河

english: Islands: South of Draynor Village
translation: 岛屿：德雷诺村以南

english: Islands: South-east of Ardougne
translation: 岛屿：阿杜因东南方

english: Islands: The Great Conch
translation: 岛屿：大贝壳

english: Islwyn sells you a bow.
translation: Islwyn 卖给你一把弓。

english: It does to me. This was once the palace of the sycophant Lord Jovkai. When my brother first started to unite the vampyre clans, it was a long and slow process. Most resisted, the Jovkai in particular.
translation: 对我而言确实如此。这里曾是谄媚者乔夫凯领主的宫殿。当初我兄弟开始统一血族部族时，这是个漫长而缓慢的过程。多数人都抗拒过，尤以乔夫凯为甚。

english: It doesn't matter. We'll close the portal behind us. Without Safalaan, he'll be trapped here.
translation: 没关系。我们会在身后关上传送门。没有Safalaan，他就会被困在这里。

english: It doesn't seem safe to move on through this part of the forest... yet.
translation: 这处森林似乎还不宜通行……再等等吧。

english: It grants you immunity from venom.
translation: 它使你免疫毒素。

english: It has been a long time since I last stood before the vampyres of Morytania. I thought I had prepared myself for what I would see. Yet as I stand here now, I see that I was wrong.
translation: 我已许久未曾站在莫里塔尼亚吸血鬼面前，本以为已做好目睹这一切的准备。但此刻立于此处，方知我所想皆为误会。

english: It is generally acknowledged
translation: 普遍认为

english: It is my personal view that the Vitur clan were already one of the more... civilised clans, even before the arrival of the Stranger from Afar.
translation: 依我看来，维图尔家族即使在那位远方来客到来之前，也已是较为……文明的家族之一。

english: It is not my desire to abandon your friend. However, we have no idea where Vanescula might be or what she might be planning.
translation: 我无意抛弃你的朋友。但我们现在完全不知道薇涅斯库拉在哪里，也不知道她有何图谋。

english: It is often said that to take
translation: 常言道，欲得之

english: It is unfortunate that betrayal comes so naturally to our kind. I'm sorry that you yourself fell victim to that.
translation: 背叛对我们这种人而言，实在太过稀松平常。只可惜你自己也成了其牺牲品。

english: It is. I give you my word.
translation: 的确如此。我向你保证。

english: It looked like it was made from oak, so presumably oak logs should be enough. However, I do wonder if using better wood would help it survive the elements better...
translation: 看起来是用橡木做的，所以橡木原木应该足够了。不过，我确实想知道用更好的木材能否帮助它更好地抵御风雨……

english: It looks like something could be mounted here.
translation: 这里似乎可以安装什么东西。

english: It looks like something could be poured into this basin. A panel next
translation: 这个盆子似乎能倒入什么东西。旁边有个控制面板。

english: It looks like something could be poured into this basin. An inscription
translation: 这水盆看起来可以倒入什么东西。上面刻有一段文字。

english: It looks like you will either need to carry a chaos talisman or be wearing a chaos tiara to use this portal.
translation: 看来你需要携带混沌护符或佩戴混沌头饰才能使用这个传送门。

english: It seems so. I trust you'll remember your side of the deal?
translation: 看来如此。相信你不会忘记我们的约定吧？

english: It seems that the machine is being used to hide some sort of illusion.
translation: 看来这台机器正在被用来隐藏某种幻觉。

english: It seems the first mate disappeared during the feast.
translation: 看起来大副在宴会期间失踪了。

english: It tastes great, some of your energy is restored!
translation: 味道好极了，你恢复了一些体力！

english: It tells of magic ore and a workshop created to fashion it.
translation: 讲述着魔法矿石和为其打造的工坊。

english: It took some work, but I managed to power up the Replacement Crystal on the Altar in the middle of the Temple. I then used it to reactivate the Temple's defences. While doing so, I discovered that some dwarves had tunnelled into the back of the Temple.
translation: 费了不少功夫，我终于给圣殿中央祭坛上的替换水晶充了能。接着用它重新激活了圣殿的防御系统。过程中还发现，有些矮人竟挖了条隧道通到殿后。

english: It turns out to be a sharp kitchen knife.
translation: 原来是把锋利的厨房刀。

english: It was a challenge, but we managed to fix the Egg just before Alan returned. Alan was thrilled to see the Egg again, but disaster then struck! In a freak accident, Alan himself fell and died. With Alan dead, my quest is seemingly at a sad end, begging the question as to what the point was in any of this.
translation: 虽历经波折，但总算在艾伦回来前修好了蛋。艾伦看到蛋重现时欣喜若狂，然而灾难随即降临！一场离奇意外中，艾伦自己失足身亡。随着艾伦逝去，我的追寻似乎也走向悲伤的终局，不禁令人质疑这一切究竟有何意义。

english: It was a close call.
translation: 好险啊。

english: It was likely only temporary. A result of the potion I gave him. However, it is a first step. Given time, the Safalaan you knew will return. I'm sure of it.
translation: 多半只是暂时的，是我喂他喝的药造成的。不过，这是第一步。假以时日，你认识的那个萨法拉恩一定会回来的。我确定。

english: It was originally my hope that my dear sister Vanescula would be the first to offer her blood, but circumstances have changed somewhat since then. No matter though, for I am more than capable of adapting.
translation: 我本希望亲爱的妹妹Vanescula能率先献上她的血液，但时局已变。不过无妨，我向来善于应变。

english: It was the cabin boy! The naughty boy went and put symbols everywhere. I should be able to find them with the lens he gave me.
translation: 是那个船舱服务员干的！那个调皮鬼到处乱画符号。用他给我的透镜应该能找到。

english: It was very much my pleasure, madam.
translation: 非常乐意，夫人。

english: It would appear I can safely store my items with the Bank of Gielinor, which will make them accessible from any branch and means I don't have to carry them everywhere with me.
translation: 看来我可以安全地把物品存入吉莱诺银行，这样就能在任何分行取用，不必随身携带了。

english: It's a fancy display case with an ornate knife and skull
translation: 这是个华丽的展示柜，里面放着一把精美的小刀和一个骷髅头。

english: It's a fancy display case with an ornate skull in it.
translation: 这是个华丽的展示柜，里面放着一个精美的骷髅头。

english: It's a long way down!
translation: 下面深不见底！

english: It's a venator head mounted on the wall. However, both of the eyes
translation: 这是一个挂在墙上的猎人(venator)头骨。不过，它的两只眼睛都……

english: It's a very old and ornate grandfather clock.
translation: 这是一座非常古老且装饰华丽的落地钟。

english: It's an old fireplace with a unique shaped slot above it.
translation: 这是一个老旧的壁炉，上方有一个独特形状的插槽。

english: It's been a long time since I've seen a weapon crafted in this way. It's like a small part of Hallowvale is right here with us. It's... beautiful.
translation: 好久没见过这样打造的武器了，仿佛海洛维尔的一小部分就在我们身边。真是……美不胜收。

english: It's cold and the same temperature as last time
translation: 冷，和上次一样的温度。

english: It's done. Let's get out of here.
translation: 搞定了。我们离开这里吧。

english: It's me. I'm here, Safalaan.
translation: 是我。我在这里，萨法拉恩。

english: It's no use! <osrscn-name-0>, fall back into the entrance hall!
translation: 没用！<osrscn-name-0>, 撤回门厅！

english: It's not about that. I already have a disguise. I made my own a while ago. It's just...
translation: 不是这个问题。我已经有伪装了，之前自己做的。只是……

english: It's probably not been used for thousands of years. The mechanism's going to need repairing.
translation: 大概有上千年没人用过了，这个机关需要修理。

english: It's said that all seven died in the battle when the river was blessed, with them being buried in the mausoleum below.
translation: 传说七人皆死于祝圣河之战，葬于下方陵墓中。

english: It's starting to turn red!
translation: 开始变红了！

english: It's very hot and the same temperature as last time
translation: 很热，和上次温度一样。

english: It's very hot and warmer than last time
translation: 比上次更热了，热得要命。

english: Items donated here may be retrieved by other party-members,
translation: 此处捐赠的物品可由其他队伍成员取回。

english: Items stored here cannot be taken by other players.
translation: 存放于此的物品不会被其他玩家取走。

english: Itzla and I attended our Initiation Ceremony in the Temple.
translation: 伊茨拉和我在圣殿参加了入会仪式。

english: Itzla and I entered the Old One Ruins and found Metzli. She revealed the Ruins to be Mokhaiotl, an Archive built by the Old Ones before they went extinct. She also revealed that she never believed in the Final Dawn. Instead she was simply using Ennius, Furia and the Twilight Emissaries to find and access Mokhaiotl in the hopes of claiming the knowledge of the Old Ones for herself. Metzli then attacked us, but we were able to fight her off.
translation: 我和伊兹拉一起进入了古老者遗迹，找到了梅兹莉。她揭露了遗迹其实是莫凯奥特——古老者灭绝前建造的档案馆。她还坦白自己从未相信过末日黎明教，她只是利用恩纽斯、福瑞亚以及暮光使者来寻找并进入莫凯奥特，企图独占古老者的知识。随后梅兹莉攻击了我们，但我们成功将她击退。

english: Itzla and I travelled down into the Caverns beneath the Crypt of Tonali. We explored them, but couldn't find Furia or Metzli.
translation: 伊兹拉和我下到了托纳利地窟下的洞穴中。我们探索了一番，但没找到芙莉娅或梅兹莉。

english: Ivan and I returned to Drezel, but found Veliaf there as well, with him having decided to help us after all. We told the two of them about Ivandis' plan and deduced that the hidden tunnel his Writings mentioned must be the same one where I found his Tomb. We decided to go there and investigate.
translation: 我和伊凡回到了德雷泽那里，却发现维利亚夫也在，他最终决定帮助我们。我们向他们俩讲述了伊凡迪斯的计划，并推断他遗著中提到的隐藏隧道一定是我找到他墓穴的那条。我们决定去那里调查。

english: Ivan and I travelled to Slepe to begin looking for Veliaf. After asking around, we discovered that Veliaf had recently left the pub and that there was some sort of commotion at Crombwick Manor soon afterwards. We should look into this commotion.
translation: 我和伊凡前往斯利普寻找维利亚夫。四处打听后得知维利亚夫刚刚离开酒馆，随后克朗布威克庄园便发生了骚动。我们该去查探一番。

english: Ivan and I travelled to Slepe to begin looking for Veliaf. After asking around, we discovered that Veliaf had recently left the pub and that there was some sort of commotion at Crombwick Manor soon afterwards. We went over there to investigate and found Veliaf fighting some Vampyres, which we helped him defeat. We told him about Drakan's announcement, but he didn't seem interested in helping us. As such, Ivan decided to leave for Paterdomus, believing the library there might be able to help us. I should meet him there.
translation: 我和伊凡前往斯莱佩开始寻找维利亚夫。四下打听后得知维利亚夫不久前离开了酒馆，随后克朗威克庄园就发生了骚乱。我们赶去调查时，发现维利亚夫正在与吸血鬼交战，便助他击退了敌人。向他提及德拉肯的公告时，他似乎不愿相助。于是伊凡决定前往帕特多米斯，认为那里的图书馆或许能帮上忙。我该去那里与他会合。

english: Ivan and I travelled to Slepe to begin looking for Veliaf. After asking around, we discovered that Veliaf had recently left the pub and that there was some sort of commotion at Crombwick Manor soon afterwards. We went over there to investigate and found Veliaf fighting some Vampyres, which we helped him defeat. We told him about Drakan's announcement, but he didn't seem interested in helping us. As such, Ivan decided to leave for Paterdomus, believing the library there might be of benefit.
translation: 我和伊万前往斯莱佩寻找维利亚夫。四处打听后得知维利亚夫最近离开了酒馆，随后克罗姆威克庄园发生了骚动。我们去调查时发现维利亚夫正在与吸血鬼战斗，便帮他击退了敌人。向他提起德拉肯的公告时，他似乎无意相助。于是伊万决定前往帕特多莫斯，认为那里的图书馆可能有用。

english: Ivan and I travelled to Slepe to begin looking for Veliaf. Asking about him in the local pub seems like a good place to start.
translation: 我和伊万去了斯利普，开始寻找维利亚夫。先在当地酒馆打听他的消息应该是个不错的开始。

english: Ivan departs.
translation: 伊凡离开了。

english: Ivan gives you Ivandis' writings.
translation: 伊万给了你伊万迪斯的著作。

english: Ivan gives you a pickaxe.
translation: 伊凡给了你一把镐。

english: Ivan gives you some supplies.
translation: 伊万给了你一些补给品。

english: Ivan gives you the journal.
translation: 伊万把日记交给了你。

english: Ivan! <osrscn-name-0>! Are you okay?
translation: 伊凡！<osrscn-name-0>！你还好吗？

english: Ivan! Protect Safalaan!
translation: 伊万！保护萨法拉恩！

english: Ivan! Thank goodness you're okay!
translation: 伊万！谢天谢地你没事！

english: Ivan! Veliaf! It's good to see you.
translation: 伊文！维利亚夫！见到你真好。

english: Ivan! What happened?! Where is everyone else?
translation: 伊万！发生什么事了？！其他人在哪？

english: Ivan's managed to gather up a selection of useful supplies.
translation: 伊万已经收集了一些有用的物资。

english: Ivan's too busy to talk right now.
translation: 伊凡现在太忙，没空说话。

english: Ivan, please, do not go forward with this plan! I will send word to the King! He will send help, I'm sure of it!
translation: 伊凡，求你不要执行这个计划！我会传信给国王！他一定会派人来支援的，我肯定！

english: Ivan. Glad to see you made it okay.
translation: 伊凡。很高兴看到你平安无事。

english: Ivan... Is Veliaf okay...?
translation: 伊凡……维利亚夫还好吗……？

english: Ivandis Seergaze. Most of it
translation: 伊凡迪斯·西尔盖斯。大部分都是。

english: J : Carrallanger
translation: J: 卡瑞兰格

english: Jack informed me that I hadn't completed the task after all.
translation: 杰克告诉我，我终究还没完成任务。

english: Jimmy showed me the entrance of the rat pits in Ardougne - a place where I can train my kitten.
translation: 吉米给我看了阿杜因老鼠窝的入口——那里可以训练我的小猫。

english: Jimmy told me to seek out Hooknosed Jack in Varrock to learn how to train grown cats. I found him near a manhole in the South East of the city. Jack said he couldn't help me because he was too busy, so I volunteered to help him.
translation: 吉米让我在瓦洛克找一个叫钩鼻杰克的人，学怎么训练成年猫。我在城东南角的一个井盖附近找到了他。杰克说太忙没法帮我，所以我主动提出帮忙。

english: Join a public/friends fight.
translation: 加入公开/好友对战。

english: Jorral wants to save the outpost from King Lathas' plans.
translation: 乔拉尔想从拉萨斯国王的计划中拯救前哨站。

english: Just a little longer! I'm almost there!
translation: 再坚持一下！我就快到了！

english: Just as my exile ended, the town was attacked by Basilisks which we managed to fend off.
translation: 我的流放刚结束，镇上就遭到石化蜥蜴袭击，我们成功击退了它们。

english: Just make sure you put Drakan in the ground for me.
translation: 给我把德拉坎埋了就行。

english: Just make sure you've got your expectations in check. Even if we find Veliaf, be ready for him to disappoint us.
translation: 控制好你的期待。就算我们找到了维利亚夫，也要做好他会让我们失望的准备。

english: K : Fishing Guild
translation: K : 钓鱼公会

english: Kandarin: Ardougne Zoo unicorns
translation: Kandarin: 阿多尼动物园的独角兽

english: Kandarin: Hazelmere's home
translation: 坎达林：哈泽米尔的家

english: Kandarin: Legends' Guild
translation: 坎达林：传说公会

english: Kandarin: McGrubor's Wood
translation: 坎达林：麦格鲁伯林地

english: Kandarin: North-west of Yanille
translation: 坎达林：阳妮西北

english: Kandarin: Sinclair Mansion
translation: 坎达林：辛克莱庄园

english: Kandarin: Tower of Life
translation: 坎达林：生命之塔

english: Kaqemeex then taught me the basics of the skill Herblore.
translation: 卡克米克斯接着教了我药草学技能的基础知识。

english: Kebos Lowlands: South of Mount Karuulm
translation: 凯博斯低地：卡鲁尔姆山以南

english: Keep Current Settings
translation: 保持当前设定

english: Keep an eye out for messages you may receive around the world, they may indicate what you need.
translation: 留意你在世界各地可能收到的消息，它们或许会提示你需要什么。

english: Keep going!
translation: 继续前进！

english: Keep him busy!
translation: 拖住他！

english: Keeper of Keys
translation: 钥匙保管员

english: Kennith can't get downstairs without some help.
translation: 肯尼斯需要帮助才能下楼。

english: Key for mining area in mining camp.
translation: 采矿基地钥匙。

english: Kharidian Desert: Near the Kalphite Hive
translation: 卡里迪安沙漠：凯尔菲特蜂巢附近

english: Kharidian Desert: Necropolis
translation: 卡里迪安沙漠：尼可波利斯

english: Kharrim gave me some ghostly boots, and told me to find the spy, Lennissa.
translation: 卡里姆给了我一些幽灵靴，让我去找间谍莱尼莎。

english: Kill dem all!
translation: 全杀了！

english: King Arthur sent me to Merlin for advice on locating it.
translation: 亚瑟王派我去找梅林，寻求寻找它的建议。

english: King Narnode has told me that the Grand Tree is dying and has asked me to help. I have taken a bark sample from the Grand Tree from King Narnode to Hazelmere.
translation: 国王纳诺德告诉我大树正在枯萎，并请求我帮忙。我已将从大树采集的树皮样本从国王纳诺德处带给哈泽米尔。

english: Knife x 1
translation: 小刀 x 1

english: L : Troll Stronghold
translation: L：巨魔要塞

english: Lalalalalalalalalala.
translation: 啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦。

english: Larry and I returned to the iceberg. I gave the correct greeting to the guard at the door.
translation: 拉里和我回到了冰山上。我向门口的守卫做了正确的问候。

english: Larry and I spied on the penguins from the bird hide. It wasn't as exciting as I expected, but Larry seemed to think otherwise.
translation: 我和拉里从掩体里窥视企鹅，没想象中那么刺激，但拉里似乎不这么认为。

english: Larry had this crackpot idea about making a penguin suit and infiltrating their ranks. Apparently, he used to work at the Ardougne Zoo. For some reason he thinks the penguins got him fired.
translation: 拉里有个馊主意，说要做一套企鹅装混进它们中间。听说他以前在阿多格动物园干活，不知怎么认定是企鹅害他丢了饭碗。

english: Larry met me out by the bird hide. I told him what happened in the War Room.
translation: 拉里在鸟舍外遇见了我。我告诉了他作战室里发生的事。

english: Larry said we needed to find out what the penguins were planning. I found some doors that are well guarded. I think what I need is through there.
translation: 拉里说我们得查清企鹅们在策划什么。我发现了一些守卫森严的门。我觉得我需要穿过那里才能找到线索。

english: Larry suggested finding a shifty penguin who could get me a fake ID. I spoke to a penguin named Noodle.
translation: 拉里建议去找一只狡猾的企鹅，它或许能给我弄张假身份证。我找到了一只叫“面条”的企鹅。

english: Last I spoke to Drezel, he mentioned hearing that Veliaf might be in Slepe.
translation: 上次跟德雷塞尔说话时，他提到听说维利亚夫可能在斯莱普。

english: Last wave:
translation: 最后一波：

english: Lead on, <osrscn-name-0>. We need to find a way into the castle.
translation: 带路吧，<osrscn-name-0>。我们得找个办法进城堡。

english: Leader:
translation: 首领：

english: Leave the Theatre.
translation: 离开剧院。

english: Leave the encounter? Your contribution will be lost.
translation: 离开遭遇？你的贡献将丢失。

english: Leave you here alone? No chance!
translation: 把你一个人丢在这儿？没门！

english: Lennissa gave me some ghostly robes, and told me to find Dhalak.
translation: Lennissa给了我一些幽灵长袍，并让我去找Dhalak。

english: Let me know if you need a hand with anything, but otherwise, I now need to move onto my own preparations.
translation: 需要帮忙的话就说一声，不过现在我得去准备自己的事了。

english: Let the hunt begin.
translation: 狩猎开始。

english: Let us not dwell on the past. It is the present that requires our focus. On that note, while I may not have much advance on Drakan, I do have some suggestions regarding that weapon of yours.
translation: 过去的事就不必再提了，现在才是关键。说到这个，虽然我对德拉坎的情报掌握不多，但你那件武器我倒是有些建议。

english: Let us speak of something else.
translation: 我们聊点别的吧。

english: Let's go and deal with those Zamorakians.
translation: 我们去解决那些萨莫拉克教徒吧。

english: Let's go. Now!
translation: 走吧。现在！

english: Let's have a look around and see what we can find.
translation: 咱们四处看看，找找有什么发现。

english: Let's head over to Crombwick Manor.
translation: 咱们去克伦威克庄园吧。

english: Let's head over to the pub.
translation: 去酒馆吧。

english: Let's keep going, <osrscn-name-0>. We need to find a way into the castle.
translation: 继续走，<osrscn-name-0>。我们得找个法子进城堡。

english: Let's keep moving.
translation: 继续走吧。

english: Lets a crewmember automatically repair your ship when it is damaged.
translation: 让船员在船只受损时自动修理。

english: Letter of Lord Hosidius
translation: 霍西狄乌斯领主的信函

english: Level-up Unlocks - Members Only
translation: 升级解锁 - 仅限会员

english: Like I said, he left here after having quite a few drinks. I don't know where he went, but I did hear that there was some commotion up at Crombwick Manor soon afterwards.
translation: 我说了，他喝了不少酒才离开的。我不知道他去了哪儿，但后来听说克朗姆维克庄园那边出了点乱子。

english: Location:
translation: 位置：

english: Location: Corsair Cove
translation: 位置：海盗湾

english: Location: Port Roberts
translation: 位置：罗伯茨港

english: Locked. We'll need to head through the dungeon.
translation: 锁着。我们得穿过地牢。

english: Look at me... I don't belong here...
translation: 看看我... 我不属于这里...

english: Look at the hint on the right and find three objects related to it.
translation: 看右边的提示，找到三个相关的物品。

english: Looking to gather more information, Persten cast a spell to reveal any hidden secrets within the Temple. However, her spell opened an Abyssal Rift which sucked her in. Abyssal Creatures emerged from the Rift, but the Ancient Rune Guardians in the Temple became active and started to fight back against them.
translation: 为获取更多情报，佩斯滕施法揭露神庙中的隐藏秘密。然而，她的法术打开了一道深渊裂隙，将她吸入其中。深渊生物从裂隙中涌出，但神庙内的远古符文守卫被激活，开始反击它们。

english: Lord Ferral Piscarilius
translation: 菲拉尔·皮斯卡里琉斯大人

english: Lord Horatio Hosidius
translation: 霍雷肖·霍西迪乌斯勋爵

english: Lord Jovkai... I see in my absence, you have grown arrogant once more. You always did take after your father...
translation: 乔夫凯大人……我不在的这段时间里，你似乎又变得傲慢了。你总是像你的父亲……

english: Lord Lorenz Lovakengj
translation: 洛伦佐·洛瓦肯吉领主

english: Luckily, I was too smart to fall for any of their little tricks, and passed the test with flying colours.
translation: 幸好我足够聪明，没中他们的任何小把戏，还以出色的表现通过了考验。

english: Lumbridge Castle cellar was accidentally damaged by Dorgeshuun goblins, whose ancestors went to live underground long ago. Sigmund, the Duke's advisor, claimed that the Dorgeshuun stole the castle silverware, and wanted the Duke to retaliate against them. However, I found that Sigmund is a member of the Humans Against Monsters cult, and he stole the silverware himself. The Duke dismissed Sigmund and met the leader of the Dorgeshuun to sign a peace treaty. Both rulers thanked me for my help.
translation: 卢姆布里奇城堡的地窖被多吉舒恩地精意外损坏，他们的祖先很久以前就到地下生活了。公爵的顾问西格蒙德声称多吉舒恩偷了城堡的银器，并希望公爵对他们进行报复。然而，我发现西格蒙德是“人类对抗怪物”组织的成员，而且是他自己偷了银器。公爵解雇了西格蒙德，并会见多吉舒恩的首领签署了和平条约。两位统治者都感谢我的帮助。

english: Lunar Helm Lunar Torso Lunar Legs Lunar Gloves Lunar Boots Lunar Cape Lunar Amulet Lunar Ring I gave all the clothes to the Oneiromancer. Now taking the potion, clothes, staff and kindling from the Oneiromancer, I can use start the ritual at the Brazier in town.
translation: 月亮头盔、月亮上衣、月亮腿甲、月亮手套、月亮靴子、月亮披风、月亮护符、月亮指环。我把所有衣物都交给了解梦师。现在从解梦师那里拿到药水、衣物、法杖和引火物，就能在镇上的火盆处开始仪式了。

english: Lunar spellbook activated.

english: Maisa and I returned to the High Priest in Sophanem to find that the Cure had worked. The High Priest told us that representatives from Menaphos had agreed to meet to discuss the quarantine.
translation: 我和Maisa回到了索法尼姆的大祭司那里，发现治疗已经生效。大祭司告诉我们，梅纳菲斯的代表们已同意会面讨论隔离事宜。

english: Maisa took me to the Necropolis south east of Sophanem where the Excavation was taking place. While looking around, I was attacked by some Guards. However, with Maisa's help, I managed to defeat them.
translation: Maisa带我去了Sophanem东南方的墓地，那里正在进行挖掘。四处查看时，我遭到了几名守卫的袭击。但在Maisa的帮助下，我成功击败了他们。

english: Make sure you've collected all your stuff!
translation: 别忘了拿上你所有的东西！

english: Malcolm caught some chickens; now I need to buy 2 and deliver them to Ava.
translation: 马尔科姆抓了些鸡；现在我得买2只给艾娃送去。

english: Malcolm has agreed to sell chickens; now he needs to catch one for me.
translation: 马尔科姆同意卖鸡了，现在他得帮我捉一只。

english: Malcolm seems friendlier now; I need to talk to him about the undead chickens.
translation: 马尔科姆现在似乎友好多了；我得跟他谈谈那些亡灵鸡的事。

english: Malcolm wants me to talk to his wife for him. I need to do this before he will sell chickens.
translation: 马尔科姆要我去和他妻子谈谈。我得先办这事，他才肯卖鸡。

english: Many have tried and failed. Do you truly believe that you, Lord Myrmel, will have better luck?
translation: 许多人尝试过都失败了。你真的认为你，米尔梅尔领主，运气会更好吗？

english: May I suggest you save the reunions for later. We need to focus on getting out of here.
translation: 要不你先别急着叙旧，咱们得先想法子离开这儿。

english: Maybe not exactly how I'd have put it...
translation: 也许不完全是我想的那样...

english: Maybe not, but all these years later, Queen Efaritay is still remembered in Morytania. Even with all that's happened, your name still brings hope to those that live there.
translation: 也许不是，但这么多年过去了，艾法莉塔女王在莫里塔尼亚依然被人铭记。即便经历了这一切，你的名字仍给那里的居民带来希望。

english: Maybe, but I'm not abandoning my friend.
translation: 也许吧，但我不会丢下我的朋友不管。

english: Maybe... I reckon there might be something behind that wall over there. I'm going to try and mine through it.
translation: 也许……我觉得那面墙后面可能有东西。我要试着挖穿它。

english: Mayor Eustace Hobb.
translation: 尤斯塔斯·霍布市长。

english: Meaning we'd never actually need to face him directly... I suppose it could work, but it's such a slim hope...
translation: 也就是说我们其实根本不需要直接面对他……也许可行，但这希望太渺茫了……

english: Meeeeeeoow...
Merlin said our goals were: Reclaim Camelot, retrieve the Holy Grail, and save King Arthur.
translation: 默林说我们的目标是：夺回卡美洛，寻回圣杯，拯救亚瑟王。

translation: 快走吧。

translation: 穆卡利对武器之类的东西有点困惑。

english: Murcaily was so desperate to make the troll go away that he gave me a nice pile of hardy gout tubers.
translation: 默凯利急着要赶走那个巨魔，就给了我一堆结实的痛风块茎。

english: My brother comes down here periodically to collect blood from Safalaan. He must be stockpiling it.
translation: 我哥哥定期会来这里，从萨法拉安那里采血。他肯定在囤积这些血。

english: My brother's private chambers are on the top floor of the castle. My guess would be somewhere up there.
translation: 我哥哥的私人房间在城堡顶层。我猜大概就在那上面。

english: My child, you have suffered so much... All these years apart... All the time we've lost...
translation: 我的孩子，你受苦了……这些年我们天各一方……逝去的时光再也无法挽回……

english: My children, I'm sorry for rushing you inside. Time was of the essence in gaining control of the vampyres. However, I have promising news. It seems that for now at least, most are willing to accept me as their ruler.
translation: 孩子们，抱歉催你们进来。掌控吸血鬼们刻不容缓。不过好消息是，至少目前看来，大多数都愿意接受我作为统治者。

english: My disciples tell me that you have connections with the human lands to the west. I must ask you to travel there at once.
translation: 我的弟子们告诉我，你与西边的人类领地有联系。我必须请你即刻前往那里。

english: My disciples... They have already started making preparations for that eventuality. Whilst I attend to the final work needed for the portal, you may wish to assist them.
translation: 我的弟子们...已经开始为那件事做准备。当我处理传送门的最后工作时，你或许可以协助他们。

english: My flail?
translation: 我的连枷？

english: My name is Efaritay.
translation: 我叫Efaritay。

english: My next task it to finish off the enemy ship using our cannon.
translation: 我接下来的任务是使用我们的火炮解决掉敌船。

translation: 我的皮肤刺痛。阳光

english: Nice job, <osrscn-name-0>. Let's check upstairs.
translation: 干得好，<osrscn-name-0>。我们去楼上看看。

english: No adventurers are in the northern cave. No adventurers are in the western cave. No adventurers are in the eastern cave.
translation: 北部洞穴没有冒险者。西部洞穴没有冒险者。东部洞穴没有冒险者。

english: No cocoons in this chest have hatched.
translation: 这个箱子里的所有蚕茧都还未孵化。

english: No current applicants
translation: 目前没有申请者。

english: No events to show.
translation: 没有事件可显示。

translation: 该栏位未提供物品。
