translation: 目前没有列出的队伍。

english: No point wasting any time then. Let's go, Ivan.
translation: 那就不浪费时间了。走吧，伊凡。

english: No spells match your selected filters.
translation: 没有符合所选过滤条件的法术。

english: No! Stay back!
translation: 不！别过来！

english: No, don't put it down.
translation: 不，别放下。

english: No, exit the trial instead.
translation: 不，退出试炼。

english: No, keep the existing layout.
translation: 不，保留现有布局。

english: No, remain in the trial.
translation: 不，留在试炼中。

english: No, stay on the boat.
translation: 不，留在船上。

english: No. I know you didn't just come here for Safalaan, Efaritay, but he needs you. All of Morytania needs you.
translation: 不。我知道你不只是为萨法兰而来，埃法里泰，但他需要你。整个莫里塔尼亚都需要你。

english: No. They will already be dead.
translation: 不，他们反正都得死。

english: No... Leave me!
translation: 不……放开我！

english: None of us do, Ivan.
translation: 我们谁也不知道，伊凡。

english: None set : none set
translation: 未设定 : 未设定

english: Noodle wanted swamp tar and chicken feathers in exchange for an ID and a mission report.
translation: Noodle想要沼泽焦油和鸡毛，用来交换一份身份证明和任务报告。

english: North of the Arceuus Library
translation: 阿尔修斯图书馆北方

english: North of the Emir's Arena
translation: 埃米尔竞技场北边

english: North, past those old barrows.
translation: 往北，过了那些古墓。

english: Northern entrance.
translation: 北入口。

english: Not at all, my child. Instead, I have promised her a far better feast.
translation: 一点也不，孩子。相反，我答应给她一场更丰盛的盛宴。

english: Not enough. Now, if you're done asking stupid questions, would you mind getting out of my way?
translation: 不够。问完蠢问题的话，能让开点吗？

english: Not in clan
translation: 不在公会中

english: Not like this... Not here! Not again!
translation: 别这样...别在这里！别再来一次了！

english: Not only have they been laying the groundwork for our eventual arrival, but they have also been helping us to perfect the haemalchemy needed to sustain the portal that we require.
translation: 他们不仅为我们最终到来打下了基础，还一直在帮助我们完善维持所需传送门所需的血炼术。

english: Not quite, Veliaf. Safalaan is still alive. Drakan has him as a prisoner, but we have a plan to save him.
translation: 不完全是，维利亚夫。萨法拉安还活着。德拉肯把他关押了，但我们有个营救计划。

english: Not really. Ivan put it better than I ever could. Now, I'd better get to Paterdomus.
translation: 不完全是。伊凡说得比我好多了。我现在得赶紧去帕特多姆斯了。

english: Not really. There's something off about these portraits though...
translation: 不太对。这些肖像画总觉得哪里有点不对劲……

english: Not to mention, all that's before we even consider Vanescula and Safalaan...
translation: 更别提凡奈斯库拉和萨法拉恩那档子事了...

english: Not yet. Drakan has a stockpile of Safalaan's blood up in his chambers. It needs destroying before we can leave.
translation: 还没。达克南的房间里还有一堆萨法蓝的血液库存。我们必须先销毁它才能离开。

english: Not yet. I'll keep looking around.
translation: 还没。我再四处看看。

english: Nothing. As I say, my disciples have it in hand. They will buy us the time that we require. You need simply wait until the portal is ready.
translation: 无事。正如我所说，我的弟子们已掌控局面。他们会为我们争取所需的时间。你只需等待传送门准备就绪即可。

english: Now I can continue my search for the crystals.
translation: 现在我可以继续寻找水晶了。

english: Now I must reach the lower levels where apparently the crystals can be found.
translation: 现在我必须前往下层，据说那里能找到水晶。

english: Now I need to make the ceremonial clothes and give them to the Oneiromancer. I can talk to her for more information.
translation: 我现在需要制作仪式服装并交给解梦者。我可以与她交谈获取更多信息。

english: Now Juna will let me into the cave to collect the Tears if I tell her stories of my adventures.
translation: 现在，只要我向朱娜讲述我的冒险故事，她就会让我进入洞穴收集眼泪。

english: Now all I need to do is take a ferret back to Charlie at the Ardougne zoo.
translation: 现在我只用把一只雪貂带回阿多尼动物园，交给查理就行。

english: Now click the SECOND digit.
translation: 现在点击第二个数字。

english: Now that he'd seen
translation: 既然他已经看到了

english: Now their defences were secure, they were ready to use the Gnome Ballista to break through the enemy defences.
translation: 现在他们的防御已经稳固，准备用侏儒弩炮突破敌方防线。

english: Now though... Now the answer is finally in my grasp. Thanks to my dear sister, I finally have the means with which to bring about our salvation. I finally have the means for us to return home.
translation: 但如今... 答案终于尽在掌握。多亏了我亲爱的妹妹，我终于有了拯救我们的方法。我终于有了回家的途径。

english: Now's our chance! Let's get out of here!
translation: 机会来了！我们快走！

english: Now, we must focus on ensuring we are prepared for Drakan.
translation: 现在，我们必须专注于确保做好对抗德拉肯的准备。

english: O : Draynor Manor
translation: O : 德拉诺庄园

english: Obtaining the Goblin Bones
translation: 获得地精骨头

english: Of course, as it turns out, that wasn't actually true. Ivandis survived the battle. He journeyed into Morytania and eventually died there.
translation: 当然，事实证明那并不属实。伊万迪斯在战斗中幸存了下来。他一路进入了摩里塔尼亚，最终死在了那里。

english: Offer to BUY items.
translation: 提供购买物品。

english: Offer to SELL items.
translation: 出售物品。

english: Oh dear, Unferth has fallen ill.
translation: 哎呀，安弗斯生病了。

english: Oh, I assure you, brother, I still have plenty of fire within me.
translation: 哦，我向你保证，兄弟，我心中依然燃烧着熊熊烈火。

english: Oh, Saradomin save us...
translation: 哦，萨拉多明保佑我们……

english: Oh, come on. If you really believe that, why bother coming here at all?
translation: 哦，得了吧。你要真那么想，干嘛还费事来这儿？

english: Oh, merciful gods! That was the worst thing I have ever seen! I want to be sick... In other news, the monks have all had their brains swapped back into the correct bodies and the zombie bodies have been disposed of.
translation: 哦，慈悲的天神！那是我见过最恶心的东西！我想吐……好消息是，修士们的脑子都换回了正确的身体，僵尸尸体也已经处理掉了。

english: Oi, are you der BA For GP!
translation: 嘿，你是为了金币才来打BA的吧！

english: Okay then. So, wooden items? You mean things like bows and shields?
translation: 好的。所以，木制物品？你是指弓和盾牌之类的东西吗？

english: Okay, let's say we do this... Where would we even start?
translation: 好吧，假如真要这么做……我们从哪开始呢？

english: Okay. Be careful, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 好的，小心点，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: Okay... I can do this...
translation: 好吧...我能行...

english: Okay... I think that's everything.
translation: 好了……我想就这些了。

english: Omart and Kilron, friends of Jerico, helped me cross the wall into West Ardougne.
translation: 杰里科的朋友奥马特和基尔隆帮我翻墙进入了西阿尔多恩。

english: On reporting back to Jack he was very upset. It turned out his cat - Pox - had been poisoned after eating one of the rats I had killed in the warehouse. Feeling guilty, I offered to help him find a cure for his cat.
translation: 向杰克汇报时，他非常难过。原来他的猫——波克斯——在仓库吃了我杀的一只老鼠后中了毒。心生愧疚的我主动提出帮他寻找解药。

english: On reporting my success I was informed that I passed the first stage of my initiation.
translation: 报告成功后，我被告知通过了入会的第一阶段。

english: On talking to the leader of the Menaphites he appeared tobe deranged and power-mad.
translation: 在与门纳弗斯领袖交谈时，他显得精神错乱且权力熏心。

english: On the lower level, Asgarnia and I found a Strange Horn.
translation: 在下一层，阿什加尼亚和我发现了一个奇怪号角。

english: On the plinth is a book: Essiandar's notes.
translation: 基座上有一本书：《艾西安达的笔记》。

english: On the plinth is a book: Pious proceedings.
translation: 底座上有一本书：虔诚的会议记录。

english: On the plinth is a book: Scruffy notebook.
translation: 底座上放着一本书：皱巴巴的笔记本。

english: On the plinth is a book: The Life of Friar.
translation: 底座上放着一本书：《修士生平》。

english: On the whole, I suppose. I really thought we were done for out there though, and now to find out about all of this... It's a lot to take in.
translation: 总的来说，我觉得还行。不过刚才真以为要交代在外面了，现在又发现这些事...信息量有点大。

english: Once I had Rantz's bow, it was easy to hunt chompy birds using the nearby swamp toads. I cooked and seasoned a Chompy Bird for Rantz and his family.
translation: 我拿到兰茨的弓后，用附近的沼泽蟾蜍轻松猎到了锥鸟。我把锥鸟烹制调味后，送给了兰茨和他的家人。

english: Once I had handed these over to Achietties I had proved myself worthy of entrance to the Heroes' Guild.
translation: 把它们交给阿奇蒂之后，我便证明了自己有资格进入英雄公会。

english: Once I have fixed all the equipment I'll need to work out how to use it.
translation: 修好所有装备后，我还得研究怎么用它们。

english: Once I would have prayed to Saradomin for that to be true... For a part of the old me to still remain... But he stopped listening to my prayers long ago. Now I wonder if deep down, only one thing drives me now...
translation: 曾经我会祈求萨拉多民保佑那是真的...希望旧我的一部分尚存...但他很久以前就不再聆听我的祈祷了。如今我怀疑，内心深处是否只剩下一件事在驱使着我...

english: Once I'd found the Trapped Soul, I quickly freed it from the body it was trapped within.
translation: 我一找到被困的灵魂，便迅速将其从禁锢它的躯体中释放出来。

english: Once I'd mapped the jungle I met up with a Kharazi tribe member named Gujuo. He told me that his tribe was scattered throughout the jungle because their totem pole had been polluted by an evil spirit. He asked me to make a new Yommi tree totem pole so he could gather his people together.
translation: 我绘制完丛林地图后，遇到了一位名叫古卓的卡腊兹部落成员。他告诉我，部落的图腾柱被邪灵污染，导致族人分散在丛林各处。他请求我制作一根新的约米树图腾柱，以便将族人重新聚集起来。

english: Once Vanstrom and Damien left the meeting, I confronted and killed Kroy before destroying his laboratory.
translation: 范斯特罗姆和达米安离开会议后，我当面击杀克罗伊并摧毁了他的实验室。

english: Once and for all? You really mean that?
translation: 一劳永逸？你真是这么想的吗？

english: Once she is found, she will need dealing with as well.
translation: 一旦找到她，也得一并处理。

english: Once the Foundry was ready to go, I helped Kovac by making the first Sword. He thanked me for my help and invited me to come back and use the Foundry at any time.
translation: 铸造厂准备就绪后，我帮科瓦奇锻造了第一把剑。他感谢我的帮助，并邀请我随时回来使用铸造厂。

english: One of the books on the shelf catches your eye: Pious
translation: 书架上一本书吸引了你的注意：《虔诚》

english: One of the guards asked me for my help in solving the murder. After careful examination of the crime scene and interrogating all suspects, I worked out who was guilty. I took the evidence I had collected to the Guards and explained how it could identify the killer. Impressed with my deductions, the killer was arrested and I was given a fair reward for my help in solving the crime.
translation: 一名守卫请求我协助破案。仔细勘查现场并审讯所有嫌疑人后，我锁定了真凶。我将收集的证据交给守卫，详细说明如何通过证据指认凶手。卫兵对我的推理能力印象深刻，凶手随即被捕。为答谢我破案的贡献，守卫给予了我一笔丰厚的赏金。

english: One of the items I found at the Sandpit was a letter. The letter spoke of a Basilisk attack on the Fremennik Province.
translation: 我在沙坑里找到了一封信，上面提到了弗里门尼克省遭到巴西利斯克袭击的事件。

english: One of the recovered pages has been torn into pieces. I wonder if swamp paste can stick it back together?

english: One rat remained, the biggest and nastiest of the lot.
translation: 还剩一只老鼠，是那群里面最大最凶的。

english: One scout had been sent to General Khazard's home, a place of great heat.

english: One scout had been sent to a jungle in the south.
translation: 一名侦察兵被派往南方的丛林。

translation: 一名侦察兵被派往白骑士统治之地。

english: Osman told me to wait outside the gates to Sophanem while he went in to meet with Maisa. However, I decided to go in and look for him, as he was taking too long. Back at the chasm, I saw a Giant Scarab attack Osman, but I was able to kill it.
translation: 奥斯曼让我在索法南门外等候，他进去与梅萨会面。但他耽搁太久，我便决定进城寻找。回到裂隙处时，只见一只巨型圣甲虫袭击了奥斯曼，不过被我击杀。

english: Our presence in Morytania has always been highly limited. When Father Sugadinti first started sending us, he had not yet perfected the haemalchemy needed to do so. Many of our kind died as a result.
translation: 我们在莫里塔尼亚的存在一直非常有限。当苏加丁提神父最初派遣我们时，他尚未完善所需的血炼术，导致许多同胞因此丧命。

english: Over time, he grew more ill. He was tended to by the best, but it made no difference. Less than a year later, he was dead.
translation: 时光流逝，他病势渐沉。虽有良医悉心照料，却终究无济于事。不出一年，他便撒手人寰。

translation: 拉努尔夫和我决定更仔细地看看树人正在摆弄的那个图腾。结果他一不小心把图腾弄坏了。当地有个小孩，伊莎多拉，目睹了这一切。她说要重新做个图腾才能安抚那些树人。

english: Safalaan needs our help! We have to find Efaritay!
translation: 萨法拉恩需要我们的帮助！我们得找到埃法里塔！

english: Safalaan told me the message refers to a laboratory that might contain some information on how to defeat the vampyres. So, being quite proactive and adventurous, I decided to go looking for the laboratory. After hunting high and low, I found the place. I slashed my way through a tapestry and found a strange statue next to a normal- looking door.
translation: Safalaan告诉我，消息中提到一间实验室，里面可能有打败吸血鬼的方法。于是我主动出击、大胆探索，决心寻找那间实验室。四处搜寻后，终于找到了地方。我劈开一幅挂毯，在一扇普通门旁发现了一尊奇怪的雕像。

english: Safalaan wait!

translation: 她让我帮忙找条路进山下的古代遗迹。为此，她希望我把她以前的船员都召集起来。

translation: 她弄丢了幸运吉祥物，觉得可能掉在挖掘场的大瓮附近了。我得找到它并还给她。

translation: 她说她做了一些笔记，详细记录了他想要哪些东西。还提到他戴着一支单片眼镜。

english: She shared with me her suspicions that they might have been involved in the attack on the Little Pearl. I offered to investigate the Company to find out more, giving her more time to heal.
translation: 她向我吐露，怀疑他们对小珍珠号的袭击脱不了干系。我主动提出调查公司以探明真相，好让她有更多时间疗伤。

english: She told me that her husband, Justin, and son, Sammy, were captured by General Khazard and taken to fight in the Arena.
translation: 她告诉我，她的丈夫贾斯汀和儿子萨米被卡扎德将军抓走，带去竞技场战斗了。

translation: 大小：小型 (2x5)

english: Size: Tiny (1x3)
translation: 大小：极小（1x3）

english: Skilling Facilities:
translation: 技能设施：

english: Skilling Facilities: None
translation: 技能设施：无

english: Skreeeee!
translation: 叽叽叽！

english: Snowflake granted me access to the trolls' salt mine, so I could make these fires for myself.
translation: 雪花允许我进入巨魔的盐矿，让我能自己生起这些火堆。

english: Snowflake suggested that I use my new knowledge to light a Fire of Nourishment by the new farming patches her trolls had made, so that crops could grow.
translation: 雪片建议我用新学到的知识，在她巨魔开垦的新农田旁点燃一簇滋养之火，这样作物就能生长了。

english: So Ivandis set out to kill Drakan.
translation: 伊凡迪斯于是出发去刺杀德莱肯。

english: So Ivandis started to become a vampyre...
translation: 于是伊凡迪斯开始变成吸血鬼…

english: So here we are. The final resting place of Ivandis Seergaze. I'm not seeing any tunnel anywhere...
translation: 我们到了。伊万迪斯·西尔盖兹的最终安息之地。我哪儿都看不到隧道……

english: So many people have died in this fight. Ivandis was one of thousands. But if their sacrifices can help us succeed now, then they didn't die for nothing.
translation: 这场战斗死了这么多人。伊万迪斯只是数千人之一。但如果他们的牺牲能助我们此刻成功，那便死得其所。

english: So the only reason you came here is so you wouldn't have to die alone and drunk?
translation: 所以你来这里唯一的原因就是不想一个人醉醺醺地孤独死去？

english: So what? You want to go there and rescue him?
translation: 所以呢？你想去那儿救他？

english: So you can leave me here to die? I don't think so! If you want him, you'll give me passage through that portal!
translation: 你想把我扔在这里等死？门都没有！你要是想救他，就让我通过那个传送门！

english: So you're really going to go? To Castle Drakan?
translation: 你真要去？德拉肯城堡？

english: So you're saying this is my opportunity to clear my conscience and die content?
translation: 你是说，这是我清理良心、安心赴死的机会？

english: So... It is done...
translation: 这样……就完成了……

english: Sobered up?
translation: 酒醒了？

english: Sold: Rune arrow
translation: 已售：符文箭

english: Sold: Teak plank
translation: 已售出：柚木木板

english: Some cavern grubs have hatched; you take them.
translation: 一些洞穴蛆虫孵化出来了，你拿走了它们。

english: Some final preparation will be needed first, but yes.
translation: 首先需要做最后的准备，但可以的。

english: Some loot spills out alongside the Maggot King's guts. Yuck.
translation: 马格特国王的内脏里滚出些战利品。真恶心。

english: Some of the items you gathered have been dropped where you previously died.
translation: 你收集的一些物品掉落在你上次死亡的地方了。

english: Some of your dropped items are being held in a gravestone, near where you died.
translation: 你掉落的物品存放在死亡地点附近的墓碑中。

english: Some of your items have been added to your previous gravestone.
translation: 你的一些物品已被添加到之前的墓碑中。

english: Some of your payment has been taken from your bank.
translation: 部分款项已从你的银行中扣除。

english: Some of your special attack energy has been restored.
translation: 你的一部分特殊攻击能量已恢复。

english: Some supplies have been dropped on the ground from your gravestone.
translation: 你在墓碑上留下的补给品已散落在地上。

english: Some supplies have been dropped where you died.
translation: 部分物资已掉落至你死亡的地点。

english: Somehow I don't think that is the last I'll be seeing of Glough, his demons or the monkeys...
translation: 不知为何，我总觉得格洛、他的恶魔和那些猴子还会再出现……

english: Someone has spread some smoke clouds to you!
translation: 有人对你施放了烟雾云！

english: Sort of... I was able to follow his trail for a while, but I wasn't able to go any further. That said, I'm pretty sure he was heading for Castle Drakan.
translation: 嗯...我追踪他的行踪是有一段时间,但之后就再也无法继续了。不过,我很确定他当时正前往德拉肯城堡。

english: Sounds like a plan! Let's do it!
translation: 好主意！就这么办！

english: Southern entrance.
translation: 南边入口。

english: Spare us what? Your betrayal?
translation: 少来这套，背叛我们？

english: Spare you the truth! I knew you'd never be able to handle it.
translation: 省得你听真相！我就知道你根本承受不住。

english: Spencer and I dived down to the seabed. Once there, he showed me some Red Coral, a valuable substance that the Red Reef Trading Company gathers and sells.
translation: 我和斯宾塞潜到了海底。到了那儿，他给我看了一些红珊瑚，这是红礁贸易公司收集并出售的贵重物品。

english: Squawk! Squawk!
translation: 嘎！嘎！

english: Standard spellbook activated.
translation: 标准法术书已激活。

english: Start The Blood Moon Rises quest?
translation: 开始血月崛起任务？

english: Start a public/friends fight (based on privacy setting).
translation: 开始一场公开/好友战斗（基于隐私设置）。

english: Start a solo fight.
translation: 开始单挑。

english: Start of the room
translation: 房间入口

english: Stay alert. Drakan could be anywhere.
translation: 保持警惕。德拉肯可能在任何地方。

english: Stay in the Theatre.
translation: 待在剧院里。

english: Step inside now!
translation: 快进来吧！

english: Still, you need not fear, for she is no longer a danger to you. I have her imprisoned in the dungeon below.
translation: 不过，你无需恐惧，因为她已无法再威胁你。我把她关在地牢里了。

english: Stop Drakan? <osrscn-name-0>... I couldn't even cast a teleport spell to escape a few vyrewatch. Besides, even if we could stop him, you heard what he said. He's gone to this Vampyrium place. We can't get to him now.
translation: 阻止德拉肯？<osrscn-name-0>……我连施个传送法术逃过几个吸血鬼守卫都做不到。况且，就算我们能阻止他，你也听到他说的话了。他已经去了那个叫维普里斯的地方。我们现在追不上他了。

english: Stop day-dreaming, Private <osrscn-name-0>!
translation: 别做白日梦了，列兵 <osrscn-name-0>！

english: Stradius and Hutza gathered the Suspects upstairs for me. I reviewed my findings and decided to accuse Adala of being the Killer. She admitted to being a Thief, having come to the Party to steal from the Villa. However, she denied killing Livius and attacked me., but I was able to defeat her. She was then arrested.
translation: Stradius和Hutza把嫌疑人召集到楼上。我梳理线索后指控Adala是凶手。她承认自己是小偷，来派对是为了偷别墅里的东西。但她否认杀害Livius并袭击了我，不过我成功制服了她。随后她被捕了。

english: Strangely, he was unable to tell me the name of the god, though he remembered that the god had previously taken the Mahjarrat away from the control of Icthlarin.
translation: 奇怪的是，他说不出神的名字，却记得那神曾将马哈拉特人从伊克萨林的掌控中带走。

english: Strength.
translation: 力量。

english: Submitting...
translation: 提交中……

english: Sugadinti then closed the Portal, but upon realising what had happened to Safalaan, Efaritay left. Sugadinti then asked the rest of us to wait for him in Castle Drakan while he addressed the crowd.
translation: 苏伽丁提随后关闭了传送门，但在意识到萨法拉恩的遭遇后，埃法里泰离开了。苏伽丁提随即让我们其余人在德拉肯城堡等候，自己则去安抚人群。

english: Sugadinti's disciples have been providing their blood for it as well. You need not fear. We have more than enough to ensure everyone here can use it.
translation: 苏加丁蒂的门徒们也一直在为它献血。不必担心。我们拥有的数量足够让这里的每个人都能使用它。

english: Sunstone Golem Crafting Rewards
translation: 太阳石魔像制作奖励

english: Sure thing. During the Fourth Age, Drakan and his vampyres tried to invade Misthalin. The Seven Priestly Warriors led the army that stood against him.
translation: 没错。第四纪元时，达肯和他的吸血鬼曾试图入侵米斯林。七祭司勇士率领军队抵抗他。

english: Surely you must understand that I am the only one that offers hope for your kind. If I get my way, there will be no more vampyres in Morytania. Your people will finally be free once more.
translation: 你肯定明白，只有我能给你们带来希望。若按我的计划行事，莫里塔尼亚将再无吸血鬼。你的族人终将重获自由。

english: Surer than I've been for a long time. Now we'd best get going. Are you coming with us, <osrscn-name-0>?
translation: 比这么久以来都要肯定。我们最好动身了。<osrscn-name-0>，你跟我们来吗？

english: Surok, a Wizard in Varrock, has asked me to complete a task for him.
translation: 索洛克，这个在瓦洛克城的巫师，委托我替他完成一个任务。

english: Surviving.
translation: 生存。

english: Sylas has asked me to bring him Grimgnash's Feather from White Wolf Mountain and Rupert's Dwarven Helmet from Rupert in the tower to the north-east.
translation: 赛拉斯让我从白狼山带回格林戈纳什的羽毛，再从东北方向的塔楼里的鲁伯特那里取来鲁伯特的矮人头盔。

english: Sylas has told me a very strange tale about Magic Beans and a Golden Goblin. I should ask him what to do next.
translation: 赛拉斯给我讲了个关于魔法豆子和金色地精的怪事。该问问他下一步怎么办。

english: Sylas has told me that I need to plant the Magic Beans and see what happens next.
translation: 赛拉斯告诉我要种下魔法豆子，看看接下来会发生什么。

english: Sylas, a strange man in Taverley, has something he wants to trade with me.
translation: 塞拉斯，塔维利的一个怪人，想和我做点交易。

english: T : West Ardougne
translation: 西阿尔道恩

english: Take Essiandar's notes.
translation: 拿走艾思安达的笔记。

english: Take From Misthalin to Morytania.
translation: 从米斯林前往莫塔尼亚。

english: Take From Misthalin to Morytania?
translation: 从米斯林送往莫里塔尼亚？

english: Take Pious proceedings.
translation: 进行虔诚的仪式。

english: Take Pious proceedings?
translation: 虔诚仪式？

english: Take Sarl's journal.
translation: 拿走萨尔的日记。

english: Take The Life of Friar.
translation: 取修士之命。

english: Take a battleaxe.
translation: 拿起一把战斧。

english: Take a chunk of daeyalt ore.
translation: 挖一块暗影矿。

english: Take a cloudy grey potion.
translation: 拿上一瓶灰蒙蒙的药水。

english: Take a cold bluish-white potion.
translation: 喝下一瓶冰冷的蓝白色药水。

english: Take a mace.
translation: 拿起钉头锤。

english: Take a piece of pure essence.
translation: 拿一块纯净精华。

english: Take a recruitment scroll?
translation: 拿招募卷轴吗？

english: Take a spear.
translation: 拿一支长矛。

english: Take a sword.
translation: 拿一把剑。

english: Take a thick red potion.
translation: 拿上一瓶浓稠的红色药水。

english: Take a vial of blood.
translation: 拿一小瓶血。

english: Take a vial of water.
translation: 取一瓶水。

english: Take my sister here. There was once a time when I found elation in her little plots. Over time however, elation became boredom. Eventually, boredom became indifference.
translation: 带我妹妹来这。曾经，我对她的小把戏感到愉悦。但久而久之，愉悦变成了厌倦。最终，厌倦化作了漠然。

english: Take some supplies.
translation: 拿些补给。

english: Take the pipe?
translation: 要拿管道吗？

english: Take the scruffy notebook.
translation: 拿走那本破旧的笔记本。

english: Talk in chat:
translation: 在聊天中说话：

english: Tamayu has given me a Karambwan poisoned rune spear and has trained me in combat technique.
translation: 塔玛尤给了我一把卡鲁瓦姆毒符文矛，并传授了我战斗技巧。

english: Tarn's Lair now appears to be filled with terror dogs.
translation: 塔恩巢穴现在似乎满是恐怖猎犬。

english: Task Completed: Peach Conjurer (6 points)
translation: 完成任务：召唤桃树 (6 分)

english: Task Completed: Perfect Shellbane (2 points)
translation: 任务完成：完美的破壳者（2分）

english: Task Completed: Swoop No More (5 points)
translation: 完成任务：不再俯冲（5分）

english: Teachings of Ralos
translation: 拉罗斯的教义

english: Teak plank x 4
translation: 柚木木板 x 4

english: Teamwork makes the dream work!
translation: 团队合作，梦想成真！

english: Teleport into the DEEP wilderness?
translation: 传送到深层荒野？

english: Teleport to deep Wilderness?
translation: 传送至深层荒野？

english: Tell me about working for Mahogany Homes.
translation: 说说为桃花木家居工作的事吧。

english: Tess, the ogre chief, said the artefact was a tooth-pick, and she didn't care about it being stolen. She said her shamans had not cursed the crew.
translation: 兽人首领苔丝说那个神器是个牙签，她不在乎被偷走。她说她的萨满并没有诅咒船员。

english: Thank goodness.
translation: 谢天谢地。

english: Thank you kindly! Pass them over to me and I'll identify them properly.
translation: 多谢！把它们交给我，我来好好鉴定一下。

english: Thank you... for not giving up on me.
translation: 谢谢你……没有放弃我。

english: Thanks to the new recruits, the Ardougne Resistance was able to drive the Mourners out of West Ardougne.
translation: 多亏了新招募的成员，阿多尔尼反抗军才得以将哀悼者赶出西阿多尔尼。

english: Thanks. I'd better get to it.
translation: 谢了，我还是赶紧开工吧。

english: That boat is already docked at Catherby.
translation: 那艘船已经停靠在凯瑟比了。

english: That bone looks like a valuable construction material.
translation: 那块骨头看起来像珍贵的建筑材料。

english: That has to be them. Let's not waste any time.
translation: 肯定是他们了。别浪费时间。

english: That is up to her. I am very much open to letting her live. Indeed, her experience with the vampyres here could be highly beneficial to ensuring a smooth transfer of power.
translation: 这取决于她。我很乐意让她活下去。确实，她在此地对付吸血鬼的经验，对确保权力顺利交接会大有裨益。

english: That is very admirable of you, my child. However, it would be unwise of you to try and take on Drakan.
translation: 孩子，你这份心意值得称赞。不过，贸然挑战德拉肯绝非明智之举。

english: That item does not belong in here.
translation: 那件物品不属于这里。

english: That item is considered valuable.
translation: 那件物品被视为贵重物品。

english: That means Drakan himself made it back. We failed.
translation: 这么说，德拉肯本人逃回去了。我们失败了。

english: That number was incorrect.
translation: 那个数字不对。

english: That player's hitpoints are full.
translation: 那名玩家的生命值已满。

english: That simple? You're responsible for the deaths of thousands! You keep humans as slaves! As cattle!
translation: 就这么简单？你手上沾着成千上万条人命！你把人类当奴隶！当牲口！

english: That spell cannot be cast on 2jjj as they are not accepting aid.
translation: 该法术无法施放在2jjj身上，因其未开启接受协助。

english: That spell cannot be cast on <osrscn-name-0> as they are not accepting aid.
translation: 无法对<osrscn-name-0>施放该法术，因为他们当前未接受援助。

english: That statue already has a weapon.
translation: 那座雕像已有武器了。

english: That was the strangest dream I've ever had! Assuming it was a dream...
translation: 那是我做过最奇怪的梦！假设那真是一场梦的话……

english: That was your last key.
translation: 那是你最后一把钥匙了。

english: That we do. I suspect it to be the same plan that you yourself had.
translation: 正是如此。我怀疑这跟你自己那套计划如出一辙。

english: That's assuming Drakan himself doesn't rip us to shreds as soon as we arrive...
translation: 前提是德拉肯本人不会在我们到达时就把我们撕成碎片……

english: That's because it's not. It's called the Sunspear and I made it myself from blisterwood and pure silvthrill. It was one of the many things Drakan took from me.
translation: 那是因为它本就不是。此物名为太阳矛，是我用疱疹木和纯银瑟希尔亲手打造的。德莱肯从我这里夺走的众多事物之一。

english: That's right. I guess I won't be doing that again now.
translation: 确实。我想我现在不会再那么做了。

english: That's the plan.
translation: 就这么办。

english: That's the wrong type of poisoned food to use! Penalty!
translation: 用的毒食不对！罚分！

english: That, I do not. However, I did hear that there was some commotion up at Crombwick Manor soon afterwards.
translation: 不，我并不知情。不过我后来确实听说克朗威克庄园那边出了点乱子。

english: The 10th squad have sealed off the point of the breach and have dealt with any remaining creatures.
translation: 第10小队已封锁了突破口，并处理了所有残留生物。

english: The Bank of Gielinor - Item Deposits
translation: 盖林诺银行 - 物品存入

english: The Burthorpe Slayer Master can use these to construct a new axe for my undead tree cutting.
translation: 布尔索普的杀戮大师可用这些为我那不死的伐木者打造一把新斧头。

english: The Captain ain't so sure it was the navigator, he wants me to talk to him yet again!
translation: 船长不太确定是不是领航员干的，他想让我再去跟他谈谈！

english: The Chamber Guardian presented me with a staff of my chosen god.
translation: 守护者将我所选中神祇的法杖赠予了我。

english: The Consortium has opened up the tunnel for me.
translation: 财团已经为我开通了隧道。

english: The Corsair Captain told me that four of his crew had been affected by a curse: Gnocci, Ithoi, Arsen and Colin, all of whom were in their beds. He sailed me south to Corsair Cove to meet them and investigate.
translation: 海盗船长告诉我，他的四名船员受到了诅咒影响：诺奇、伊索伊、阿森与科林，他们全躺在床上。他载我向南驶向海盗湾与他们见面调查。

english: The Creature convinced me to stop Fenkenstrain's experiments once and for all, and has told me the true history of Fenkenstrain's treachery.
translation: 那生物说服我一劳永逸地阻止芬肯斯特兰的实验，并告诉我芬肯斯特兰背信弃义的真相。

english: The Creature went on a rampage, and Fenkenstrain sent me up to the Tower to destroy it.
translation: 怪物发了狂，芬肯斯特雷恩派我到塔上消灭它。

english: The Dark Altar ignores anyone who approaches it
translation: 黑暗祭坛对任何接近者都视若无睹

english: The Delegation from Varlamore arrived and entered the Palace. However, as they did, I spotted a Guard acting suspicious. I followed this Guard to a meeting with some Bandits. The Guard gave the Bandits some disguises for them to use to attack the Delegation.
translation: 瓦拉莫尔代表团抵达并进入宫殿。然而就在此时，我发现一名卫兵行为可疑。我跟踪这名卫兵与几个强盗会面。卫兵给了强盗一些伪装，让他们用以袭击代表团。

english: The Dwarves wanted me to earn their friendship by winning the Hemenster Fishing Competition.
translation: 矮人希望我通过赢得赫门斯特钓鱼比赛来赢得他们的友谊。

english: The Empty Lord began to fade from existence, as Zamorak seemed to become 'more real' than before. As the Empty Lord vanished, he cursed all who had brought about his downfall.
translation: 空之主开始从存在中消散，而扎莫拉克似乎比从前更加"真实"。当空之主消失时，他诅咒了所有导致他覆灭的人。

english: The Fairy Queen has been awakened.
translation: 仙子女王已被唤醒。

english: The Final Challenge
translation: 最终试炼

english: The Fisher King couldn't give me the Grail, but legends say that the person who restores the land could claim the Grail.
translation: 渔王无法赐我圣杯，但传说中恢复这片土地之人可得此物。

english: The Gossip told me Anna Sinclair is being held at the Seers' Village Courthouse.
translation: 八卦告诉我安娜·辛克莱被关在先知村法院。

english: The Great Conch
translation: 大法螺

english: The Great Olm fires a sphere of accuracy and dexterity your way.
translation: 大奥姆朝你射出了一颗精准与灵巧之球。

english: The Great Olm fires a sphere of accuracy and dexterity your way. Your prayers have been sapped.
translation: 大奥姆朝你射出一颗精准与灵巧之球。你的祈祷已被抽干。

english: The Great Olm fires a sphere of aggression your way.
translation: 大奥姆朝你发射了一颗愤怒的能量球。

english: The Great Olm fires a sphere of aggression your way. Your prayers have been sapped.
translation: 大奥姆朝你发射了一颗愤怒的球体。你的祈祷已被削弱。

english: The Great Olm fires a sphere of magical power your way. Your prayers have been sapped.
translation: 大奥姆向你发射了一颗魔力球。你的祈祷已被抽空。

english: The Great Olm has smothered you in acid. It starts to drip off slowly.
translation: 大奥姆用酸液覆盖了你，酸液开始缓缓滴落。

english: The Great Olm is currently protecting its left claw! You cannot see a way to attack it successfully.
translation: 大奥姆正保护着它的左爪！你找不到成功攻击它的方法。

english: The Great Olm is giving its all. This is its final stand.
translation: 大奥姆全力以赴，这是它的最后一搏。

english: The Great Olm rises with the power of crystal.
translation: 大奥姆携水晶之力升腾而起。

english: The Guildmaster of the Champions' Guild said I could earn the right to wear rune armour if I went on a quest for Oziach, who makes the armour.
translation: 冠军公会的会长说，如果我去为制作盔甲的Oziach完成任务，就能获得穿戴符文盔甲的资格。

english: The Journey of Souls
translation: 灵魂之旅

english: The Jubbly Jive
translation: 欢乐啾啾舞

english: The Lab was filled with both Vampyres and Human Slaves, but we were able to deal with the Vampyres and free the Slaves.
translation: 实验室里既有吸血鬼也有人类奴隶，但我们设法解决了吸血鬼，解放了奴隶。

english: The Life of Friar.
translation: 修士的生活

english: The MVP for this fight was: <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 本场战斗的MVP是：<osrscn-name-0>。

english: The Maggot King's screech disrupts your concentration!
translation: 蛆虫之王的尖啸打断了你的专注！

english: The Magic Beans grew into a huge Beanstalk! I should climb it to look for the Golden Goblin.
translation: 魔法豆长成了巨大的豆茎！我应该爬上去寻找金色哥布林。

english: The Miscellanians said the Etceterian army took their goods.
translation: 米斯兰人说，艾特塞里亚军队拿走了他们的货物。

english: The Mourners blocked the tunnel I used to enter West Ardougne before. However, I spoke to Jerico, an old friend of Elena's father, about finding another way into the city.
translation: 哀悼者堵住了我之前进入西阿杜因的隧道。不过，我和埃琳娜父亲的老朋友杰里科谈过，关于寻找另一条进城的路。

english: The Myreque are back.
translation: 迈奎教团回来了。

english: The Mysterious Orb led me to a third Treasure Scroll.
translation: 神秘宝珠指引我找到第三张宝藏卷轴。

english: The Odd Old man has given me a reward.
translation: 古怪的老人给了我一个奖励。

english: The Prince agreed to me becoming steward of the realm.
translation: 王子同意让我担任王国总管。

english: The Queen has arrived and you can no longer use the horn of glory!
translation: 王后已到，荣耀之角无法继续使用！

english: The Queen is immune to your attacks!
translation: 女王对你的攻击免疫！

english: The Riddle from Rose's Diary led us to the Forthos Ruin west of Hosidius.
translation: 罗斯日记中的谜语将我们引向了霍西迪乌斯西边的福索斯废墟。

english: The Royal seed pod teleports you to the Grand Tree.
translation: 皇家种子荚将你传送到大树。

english: The Sandpit has been enchanted.
translation: 沙坑已被附魔。

english: The Temple to Ranul/Ralos
translation: 拉努尔/拉洛斯神庙

english: The Theatre awaits...
translation: 剧院在等待...

english: The Theory of Transvergence
translation: 横向聚焦理论

english: The Treachery of Royalty
translation: 王室的背叛

english: The Troll Cook will tell me how to find goutweed if I bring him a tasty human.
translation: 如果我给巨魔厨师带来美味的人类，他会告诉我如何找到痛草。

english: The Vampyres are impressed by your prowess. Check the chest to see how many points they've granted you.
translation: 你的英勇表现给吸血鬼们留下了深刻印象。打开箱子看看他们给了你多少点数。

english: The Wyrd's screech disrupts your concentration!
translation: 怪异的尖啸打断了你的专注！

english: The alchemists have fled, the Homunculus wants me to meet in the dungeon under the tower.
translation: 炼金术士们逃跑了，人造人想让我去塔下的地牢见它。

english: The applicant declined your offer.
translation: 申请人拒绝了你的邀请。

english: The applicant has chosen a role.
translation: 申请人已选定角色。

english: The aranei hands you a bucket.
translation: 阿兰尼递给你一个桶。

english: The archaeologist I met in the desert seemed to think that there was some hidden treasure in the desert somewhere, I agreed to help him find it in return for a fifty percent share of whatever we found.
translation: 我在沙漠里遇到的那位考古学家似乎认为沙漠某处藏有宝藏，我同意帮他寻找，作为回报，无论找到什么，我都分得一半。

english: The bag contains the following eggs:
translation: 袋子内装有以下蛋类：

english: The barrel is full of water, but otherwise empty.
translation: 桶里装满了水，但除此之外空无一物。

english: The barrel looks dark and empty.
translation: 桶里看起来又黑又空。

english: The barrel looks dark and mostly empty, but you see something
translation: 桶里看起来昏暗且几乎空无一物，但你看到了什么东西。

english: The blood orb increases the damage of the vyrewatch sentinel's magic attacks.
translation: 血晶会提升弗勒卫戍的魔法攻击伤害。

english: The blood orb increases the damage of the vyrewatch sentinels' magic attacks.
translation: 血之宝珠会提升维瑞瓦哨兵魔法攻击的伤害。

english: The boat is already reversing.
translation: 船已经在倒退了。

english: The book crumbles into a dust cloud of knowledge.
translation: 书本化作一团知识的尘埃。

english: The book tells of a way to make elemental items even more powerful than before.
translation: 书中记载了一种让元素物品变得比以往更强大的方法。

english: The bookcase has a set of ornate gilded books, but you have no need
translation: 书架上有一套镀金装饰书，但你不需要。

english: The bookshelf contains a number of dusty looking books,
translation: 书架上放着几本布满灰尘的书。

english: The burst of speed temporarily protects the boat from the fetid pools effect.
translation: 速度爆发暂时保护船只免受腐臭池的影响。

english: The cabinet is sealed shut.
translation: 柜子紧紧锁着。

english: The cabinet is sealed shut. You notice something wedged behind it,
translation: 柜子被密封住了。你注意到柜子后面卡着什么东西。

english: The camel approach has failed because neither group keeps their word. Perhaps I should try being a little more direct and join one of them.
translation: 骆驼的办法失败了，因为两边都不守信用。也许我更应该直接点，加入他们中的一方。

english: The ceremony required various meats being placed in the Cauldron of Thunder. I did this and gave them to Sanfew.
translation: 仪式需要将多种肉类放入雷霆大锅中。我照做了，然后交给了桑夫。

english: The chest contained some nicely cooked bats.
translation: 箱子里有一些精心烤制的蝙蝠。

english: The chest is sealed shut. There is a lock on it, but it's heavily
translation: 箱子被牢牢封住。上面有把锁，但锁得很紧。

english: The chest is securely locked. You can't see any obvious way to open
translation: 箱子锁得很牢，看不出有什么明显的开启方法。

english: The chieftain of the mountain camp has allowed me to look for his lost daughter.
translation: 山寨酋长允许我去寻找他失踪的女儿。

english: The clue box refuses to open - you already have a clue.
translation: 线索盒打不开——你已经有一个线索了。

english: The conductor near the boarded up tunnel told me he can't open up the tunnel for me.
translation: 封住隧道旁的售票员告诉我，他不能为我打开隧道。

english: The crane - now the claw has been replaced the crane looks like it's in good working order.
translation: 起重机——现在爪子已更换，起重机看起来状态良好。

english: The crank wheel won't budge any further and you hear a click as something nearby unlocks.
translation: 曲柄轮再也转不动了，你听到咔嚓一声，附近有什么东西解锁了。

english: The crate contains that water-repellent waxwood Old
translation: 箱子里面装着那种防水的蜡木。

english: The crest halves perfectly join together to make a full
translation: 两半纹章完美地组合在一起，形成了一枚完整的纹章。

english: The crystal beneath your feet grows rapidly and shunts you to the side.
translation: 你脚下的水晶迅速生长，将你挤到一旁。

english: The cunning bird will also attract some of the arrows which I have fired, preventing these arrows from falling upon the ground.
translation: 灵巧的鸟儿也会引来我射出的箭矢，令其免于坠地。

english: The darkness recedes.
translation: 黑暗消散。

english: The day has been long, but I
translation: 白昼漫长，但……我

english: The dead wizard has been buried and Sandy arrested for murder.
translation: 死去的巫师已被安葬，Sandy因谋杀被捕。

english: The demonic larva seems resistant to your attack.
translation: 恶魔幼虫对你的攻击似乎不以为意。

english: The demonic shield resists your attack!
translation: 恶魔之盾抵挡了你的攻击！

english: The device is cold, and the same temperature as last time.
translation: 这装置是冷的，和上次温度一样。

english: The device is cold, and warmer than last time.
translation: 装置冰凉，但比上次暖和了些。

english: The device is cold, but colder than last time.
translation: 装置是冷的，但比上次更冷。

english: The device is hot, and the same temperature as last time.
translation: 装置很烫，和上次温度一样。

english: The device is hot, and warmer than last time.
translation: 装置很热，比上次更烫了。

english: The device is ice cold, and the same temperature as last time.
translation: 装置冰冷，与上次温度相同。

english: The device is ice cold, and warmer than last time.
translation: 这装置冰冷刺骨，却又比上次暖和了些。

english: The device is ice cold, but colder than last time.
translation: 装置冰冷刺骨，但比上次更冷了。

english: The device is incredibly hot, and warmer than last time.
translation: 这个设备滚烫无比，比上次更热了。

english: The device is very cold, and the same temperature as last time.
translation: 装置非常冷，和上次温度一样。

english: The device is very cold, and warmer than last time.
translation: 装置冰冷异常，但比上次更温暖了。

english: The device is very cold, but colder than last time.
translation: 装置很冷，但比上次更冷了。

english: The device is very cold.
translation: 这个装置非常冷。

english: The device is warm, and the same temperature as last time.
translation: 装置温热，和上次温度一致。

english: The device is warm, and warmer than last time.
translation: 这台装置温热，比上次更烫手。

english: The doctor has been sent to Harmony. I should speak to him to find out his plan for restoring the monks' brains.
translation: 医生已被送往和谐之地。我得跟他谈谈，了解他修复僧侣大脑的计划。

english: The door is locked. You can't see any way to open it.
translation: 门锁着。你看不到任何打开它的方法。

english: The door is locked. You notice the door is decorated with a crescent
translation: 门是锁着的。你注意到门上装饰着一弯新月。

english: The door is locked. You notice the door is decorated with a gibbous
translation: 门锁着。你注意到门上装饰着一个凸月图案。

english: The door is locked. You notice the door is decorated with a half
translation: 门是锁着的。你注意到门上装饰着一个半圆。

english: The door is locked. You notice the door is gilded and quite ornate.
translation: 门锁着。你注意到这扇门镀金装饰，相当华丽。

english: The door is locked. You notice the door looks especially solid.
translation: 门锁着。你注意到这扇门格外坚固。

english: The door is securely locked, but perhaps you can find some way nearby to unlock it.
translation: 门被牢牢锁住了，但附近或许能找到开锁的办法。

english: The door is securely locked. It has a symbol of House Myrmel on it.
translation: 门锁得很牢。上面刻有迈尔梅尔家族的徽记。

english: The door is securely locked. It has a symbol of House Shadum on it.
translation: 门锁得很紧。上面刻着沙杜姆家族的徽记。

english: The door is securely locked. It has a symbol of House Vitur on it.
translation: 门锁得很紧。门上刻有维图尔家族的徽记。

english: The door is securely locked. Maybe it can be opened from the other side.
translation: 门锁得很牢。也许可以从另一边打开。

english: The door seems to be locked from the other side.
translation: 这扇门似乎从另一侧锁上了。

english: The door seems to be locked, but it doesn't have a keyhole.
translation: 门似乎锁着，但上面没有钥匙孔。

english: The door slams shut and locks behind you.
translation: 门在你身后砰然关闭并锁上了。

english: The doors are locked.
translation: 门锁上了。

english: The effects of overload have worn off, and you feel normal again.
translation: 过载效果已消退，你重新恢复了正常。

english: The effects of the divine potion have worn off.
translation: 神圣药水的效果已经消失。

english: The effects of the saturated heart have worn off.
translation: 饱和之心的效果已经消失。

english: The effects of your Prayer Regeneration potion have worn off.
translation: 你的祈祷恢复药水效果已消失。

english: The egg exploded.
translation: 鸡蛋爆炸了。

english: The equipment room guard was staying at the local inn, the Toad and Chicken. The guard wouldn't talk to me! I bought the guard a drink and he seemed more helpful. I gambled with the guard until he ran out of money. He wrote me an IOU.
translation: 装备室守卫住在本地的“蟾蜍与鸡”旅店。那守卫不肯跟我说话！我给守卫买了杯酒，他看起来配合多了。我跟守卫赌钱直到他输光，他给我写了张欠条。

english: The falling crystal shatters into you.
translation: 坠落的晶体碎裂在你身上。

english: The father and the son.
translation: 父与子。

english: The father then went north,
translation: 父亲向北走去，

english: The fetid pools significantly reduce the speed of the boat!
translation: 恶臭的池水大大降低了船速！

english: The first Kharid Scorpion is in a secret room near some Nasty Spiders with two Coffins nearby.
translation: 第一只卡里德蝎子在靠近一些恶心蜘蛛的秘密房间里，附近还有两具棺材。

english: The first mate had an alibi. But the cabin boy seems to have been missing too...
translation: 大副有不在场证明。但那个船舱服务员似乎也失踪了……

english: The fruit isn't ready to be picked yet.
translation: 水果还没熟，不能采摘。

english: The future of Morytania? That's not good. I need to get over there right away.
translation: 摩里塔尼亚的未来？那可不妙。我得马上赶过去。

english: The game ended because one of your teammates exited early.
translation: 游戏结束，因为你的队友提前退出了。

english: The game ended early because one of your teammates died.
translation: 游戏提前结束，因为你的一个队友死亡了。

english: The gardener of Keldagrim palace has given me permission to grow Kelda hops in his garden.
translation: 凯尔达格里姆宫殿的园丁已允许我在他的花园里种植凯尔达啤酒花。

english: The greeting was what we observed the penguins on the iceberg doing. I had to wave, then shiver and spin.
translation: 我们在冰山上观察企鹅时看到的问候动作。需要先挥手，然后颤抖并旋转。

english: The gryphon aggressively flaps its wings...
translation: 狮鹫猛烈地拍打着翅膀……

english: The gryphon takes advantage of how light you are and easily throws you backwards!
translation: 狮鹫利用你身轻如燕的优势，轻松将你向后甩去！

english: The gryphon's attacks are devastating! You need some sort of protection!
translation: 狮鹫的攻击非常致命！你需要某种防护！

english: The guard agreed and asked me to look into the Sinclair family history.
translation: 卫兵同意了，让我去调查辛克莱家族的历史。

english: The guard said the Sinclairs left their mansion, and at the same time King Arthur and his knights mysteriously disappeared. I said I would help him gather evidence inside the mansion.
translation: 守卫说辛克莱家族离开了他们的宅邸，与此同时亚瑟王和他的骑士们神秘失踪了。我答应帮他搜集宅邸内的证据。

english: The hag gave me the poison once I had given her a snake and a bucket of camel dung.
translation: 我给女巫一条蛇和一桶骆驼粪后，她便给了我毒药。

english: The heart is still drained of its power. Judging by how it feels, it will be ready in around 1 minute.
translation: 心脏力量依然枯竭。按感觉来看，大约1分钟后会恢复。

english: The heart is still drained of its power. Judging by how it feels, it will be ready in around 6 seconds.
translation: 心脏的力量仍未恢复。根据感应，大约6秒后即可就绪。

english: The herb patch is now empty.
translation: 药草田现在空了。

english: The item you are trying to put down is considered
translation: 您尝试放置的物品被视为

english: The jar thrums as the mote feverently tries to escape
translation: 罐子嗡嗡作响，微粒拼命地想要逃出去。

english: The key I took from the mercenary captain allowed me to gain access to the desert mining camp.
translation: 我从佣兵队长那里拿到的钥匙让我得以进入沙漠采矿营地。

english: The key I've found opens the large hatch in the elemental workshop.
translation: 找到的钥匙能打开元素工坊的大舱门。

english: The key doesn't seem to do anything anymore.
translation: 这把钥匙似乎已经没用了。

english: The key doesn't seem to respond in this area.
translation: 这把钥匙在这个区域似乎没有反应。

english: The king was pleased to see the history. He gave me a letter for Jorral The outpost is saved!
translation: 国王看到历史记载后很高兴，给了我一封给乔拉勒的信。前哨站得救了！

english: The knights all broke out and stormed the keep.
translation: 骑士们全都冲了出去，猛攻城堡。

english: The land of Vampyrium awaits, but before you depart, you should be aware that the intended experience is for you to fully complete your journey there without interruptions. To allow for this, be mindful of the following:
translation: 血族之地在等待着你，但出发前请知悉，这段旅程设计为全程连贯、不受干扰的体验。为此请注意以下几点：

english: The leader removed you from the team.
translation: 队长已将你移出队伍。

english: The leaders regathered to finalise the new Royal Accord.
translation: 王室成员再度齐聚，敲定新的《皇家协约》。

english: The lever is locked in place.
translation: 拉杆被锁住了。

english: The local hag agrees to concoct an undetectable poison for me if I bring her the ingredients.
translation: 本地老巫婆答应，只要我给她带来材料，她就为我调制一种无法检测的毒药。

english: The lookout told me a bit about jinxes. But who could have done such a thing?
translation: 哨兵跟我说了些关于厄运的事。可谁会做出这种事呢？

english: The lower levels of the mine were too dark to navigate.
translation: 矿井下层太暗，无法通行。

english: The machine has revealed that the cute fluffy creatures that were running around the place are in fact evil spying creatures!!
translation: 机器显示，那些跑来跑去的可爱毛茸茸生物其实是邪恶的间谍生物！！

english: The magic of the Dark Altar
translation: 黑暗祭坛的魔力

english: The main entrance to Weiss was guarded by a troll called Boulder, who refused me entry. Weiss trolls didn't trust humans. I needed to find some other way to reach the cave entrance.
translation: Weiss的主门被一个叫Boulder的巨魔把守，他不让我进去。Weiss的巨魔不信任人类。我得另找路去洞穴入口。

english: The man still seems to be alive. It is best I check him further to see how I can help him.
translation: 这人似乎还有气。最好再仔细看看，看怎么帮他。

english: The man still seems to be in a bad state. If I inspect him, I can see how to raise his stats.
translation: 那人似乎状态仍不佳。若检查他，我便能得知如何提升他的属性。

english: The medal quivers with magic and breaks apart!
translation: 魔法勋章剧烈颤抖，随即碎裂开来！

english: The method is this: the undead chicken can attract lost, stray arrowheads with a magnet, add wood from the undead twigs and then finish the arrows using its own feathers. This will give me an unending source of arrows.
translation: 方法如下：不死鸡能用磁石吸引散落的箭镞，从不死枝条上取木制箭杆，再用自己的羽毛完成箭矢。这样我便有了取之不尽的箭矢来源。

english: The navigator suggests that a jinx has been put upon the ship. Maybe someone else on the ship knows more?
translation: 领航员说这艘船被人下了诅咒。或许船上其他人知道更多？

english: The next question is an Opinion Poll question, aimed to help give the team direction on where we should go with Mr McGroot (proposed pet from Goat Hunting). The final decision will be made by the team, taking into consideration the results. Please note, as it's an Opinion Poll, the results won't be shared.
translation: 下一个问题是民意调查问题，旨在帮助团队确定Mr McGroot（山羊狩猎中提议的宠物）的发展方向。最终决定将由团队根据调查结果做出。请注意，由于这是民意调查，结果不会公开。

english: The next step in getting our business set up was to get a business permit. To that end, Cassius sent me to the Duke of Lumbridge with another milk sample, aiming to convince him to let us begin trading.
translation: 帮我们做生意下一步是办营业执照。为此，卡修斯让我带了另一份牛奶样品去找伦布里奇公爵，想说服他允许我们开始交易。

english: The note found with the book has a strange code written on it.
translation: 书旁的便条上写着奇怪的密码。

english: The note reads 'Visit the city of the White Knights. In the park, Saradomin points to the X which marks the spot.'
translation: 便条上写着：“前往白骑士之城。在公园里，萨拉多明指向标有X的地点。”

english: The notes look less confusing now. Ava will want to see these translated research notes.
translation: 这些笔记现在看起来没那么费解了。艾娃应该会想看看这些译好的研究笔记。

english: The obelisk will teleport you into the Wilderness.
translation: 方尖碑会将你传送至荒野深处。

english: The old woman used the items I brought her to perform the enchantment on the Amulet of Ghostspeak.
translation: 老妇人用我带去的物品给鬼语项链施了魔法。

english: The only intact artefact was an ancient goblin mace. Zanik and I showed this to the scribe.
translation: 唯一完好的遗物是一把远古哥布林钉头锤。赞尼克和我把它展示给了书记员。

english: The ordinary Lumbridge citizens were rather prejudiced against Zanik.
translation: 普通的伦布里奇市民对扎尼克抱有相当的偏见。

english: The other vampyres will still be able to smell you.
translation: 其他吸血鬼仍能嗅到你的气味。

english: The pen may be mightier than the sword, but against a dragon? I'll take a melee weapon.
translation: 笔或许比剑更强，但面对龙？我还是选近战武器吧。

english: The penguins wanted me to investigate Farmer Fred. I talked to Fred, but he wasn't too impressed when I explained that there were penguins in his field.
translation: 企鹅让我去调查农夫弗雷德。我跟弗雷德谈了，但当我说明他的田里有企鹅时，他并不太在意。

english: The pirates have released the gas. I must recite the prayer immediately!
translation: 海盗释放了毒气！我必须立刻念诵祷文！

english: The player is busy with something else.
translation: 玩家正忙着别的事。

english: The player recruiting you exited their interface.
translation: 招募你的玩家已关闭其界面。

english: The poison erodes your immunity!
translation: 毒素侵蚀了你的免疫力！

english: The portal is ready when you are, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 传送门已就绪，随时可用，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: The portal is ready, my lady! You must fall back!
translation: 传送门准备好了，夫人！您必须撤退！

english: The portal to our salvation. This is our destiny. Now, it needs power, and Lord Myrmel was merely the first to provide it, for at long last, the Night of the Blood Moon is here.
translation: 通往我们救赎的传送门。这就是我们的命运。现在，它需要力量，而米尔梅尔领主只是第一个提供力量的人，因为终于，血月之夜降临了。

english: The potion of sealegs worked, putting the crew to sleep, however, the junior navigator had never sailed a barge.
translation: 海脚药水生效了，船员们陷入沉睡，然而见习领航员从未驾驶过驳船。

english: The pouch can't hold that.
translation: 这个袋子装不下那个。

english: The power of the strange device hurts you in the process.
translation: 奇异装置的力量在过程中伤害了你。

english: The power resonating here protects you from the blast.
translation: 此处共鸣的力量保护你免受爆炸伤害。

english: The prayer restoration blessing dissipates.
translation: 祈祷恢复祝福消散了。

english: The press - the pipes have now been fitted and it should work as long as it's powered.
translation: 压机——管道已安装完毕，只要接通动力就能运作。

english: The priestess rows you to Zulrah's shrine,
translation: 女祭司划船将你送往Zulrah的神殿。

english: The professor has eagerly gone ahead to the Observatory.
translation: 教授已经迫不及待地前往天文台了。

english: The question is, will it be enough?
translation: 问题在于，这够吗？

english: The race is on!
translation: 比赛开始！

english: The research notes must be translated. I should try to decipher them even though they look like total gibberish to me.
translation: 这些研究笔记必须翻译。虽然对我来说完全是天书，但我还是得试着解读它们。

english: The sails are already catching the wind well.
translation: 帆已经迎风张满了。

english: The sawmill operator agreed to convert waxwood logs to planks for me.
translation: 伐木场操作员同意帮我把蜡木原木加工成木板。

english: The scout collects your gravestone and leaves it nearby.
translation: 斥候收集了你的墓碑并留在了附近。

english: The second Kharid Scorpion is in a Village of Axe wielding Warriors, it's been picked up by a Warrior that apparently doubles up as a merchant.
translation: 第二只卡里德蝎子在斧头战士村庄里，被一个兼做商人的战士拿走了。

english: The serpent sees you coming and lashes out!
translation: 毒蛇见你靠近，猛扑而来！

english: The shed has a combination lock holding it shut...
translation: 棚屋上挂着一把密码锁锁着……

english: The ship is taking on water, so I will need to repair it. I will need to take repair planks from the repair locker and use a hammer and tacks to fix them over the cannon hole. I will then need to use swamp paste on the patch to waterproof it.
translation: 船舱进水了，我得修船。需要从修船柜里取修理木板，用锤子和钉子固定在炮洞上，再用沼泽胶泥涂在补丁上防水。

english: The sink is broken and won't work anymore.
translation: 水槽坏了，没法用了。

english: The sink is empty.
translation: 水槽是空的。

english: The sink is full of blood.
translation: 水槽里全是血。

english: The situation here in Hallowvale is... delicate, my child. To avoid attention, I would suggest we travel to Ver Sinhaza separately.
translation: 我这孩子，霍洛维尔这里的情况...颇为微妙。为了避免引起注意，我建议我们分头前往韦尔辛哈扎。

english: The slaves escape through the tunnel.
translation: 奴隶们通过隧道逃走了。

english: The smoke clouds around you dissipate.
translation: 你周围的烟云消散了。

english: The spirits told me the townspeople of Nardah threw away a statue of Elidinis. As a result they were cursed to have no water. As long as they did not have the statue the curse will stand.
translation: 灵魂告诉我，纳尔达的居民丢弃了一尊埃莉迪尼斯的雕像。因此他们遭到了诅咒，水源枯竭。只要雕像未归，诅咒便不会解除。

english: The sticky acid hampers your ability to attack!
translation: 黏稠的酸液阻碍了你的攻击能力！

english: The sticky web grips your ankles.
translation: 粘稠的蛛网缠住了你的脚踝。

english: The strange device cools as you find your treasure.
translation: 你找到宝藏时，那台奇怪的装置渐渐冷却下来。

english: The symbol perfectly attaches to the shield.
translation: 符号完美地嵌入了盾牌中。

english: The table appears to be in use.
translation: 这张桌子似乎正在使用中。

english: The teleport attack has no effect!
translation: 传送攻击无效！

english: The three of you depart for Ivandis' tomb.
translation: 你们三人启程前往伊凡迪斯的墓穴。

english: The timer will start as soon as your boat begins to move.
translation: 计时将在你的船开始移动时启动。

english: The tome is damaged and appears to be missing all of its pages.
translation: 这本典籍已损坏，看起来缺失了全部书页。

english: The transformation is almost complete, but there's still time. You need to get him out of here, quick!
translation: 转化几乎完成了，但还有时间。你得赶紧把他弄出去！

english: The trapdoor opens...
translation: 活板门打开了……

english: The tree has already been chopped from this direction. It now needs cutting from a different angle.
translation: 这棵树已经从这个方向砍过了，现在需要换个角度来砍。

english: The trolls pointed out a smelly hole through which I could squeeze to escape, but none of the other members of our party could fit into it.
translation: 山怪们指出了一个臭烘烘的洞，我勉强能钻进去逃命，但我们队伍里其他人可都挤不进这破洞。

english: The tunnel shudders as you carefully dig away enough of the crumbling rock to make an entrance big enough to climb through.
translation: 隧道微微颤动，你小心地挖掘着崩塌的岩石，直到掏出一个足够钻过去的入口。

english: The two of you return to the mausoleum.
translation: 你们二人返回了陵墓。

english: The venator corpse has been cut open. The stomach is missing.
translation: 猎人的尸体已被剖开。胃部不见了。

english: The venator corpse has stitches along one side.
translation: 这具猎手尸体的其中一侧有缝合线。

english: The venator's screech disrupts your concentration!
translation: 猎人的尖啸打断了你的专注！

english: The villagers were still ungrateful despite me defeating both groups and freeing the town from their influence.
translation: 我击败了两帮人马，把镇子从他们的影响中解放出来，村民们却仍不知感激。

english: The vyrewatch sentinel summons a magical blood orb!
translation: 血腥哨兵召唤了一颗魔法血球！

english: The wall has a large crack in it. It might be possible to get through
translation: 墙壁上有一条大裂缝，或许能穿过去。

english: The war ended when the seven of them blessed the Salve, right here where Paterdomus was eventually built.
translation: 战争在他们七人祝福Salve时结束，就在后来建造Paterdomus的地方。

english: The water tank was used to cool the elemental bar down.
translation: 水箱是用来冷却元素棒的。

english: The wave ended, so you're released.
translation: 浪潮结束了，你自由了。

english: The webs grate against your skin as they snap against your ankles.
translation: 蛛网缠住你的脚踝，划过皮肤。

english: The wind catcher is now enabled.
translation: 捕风器现已启用。

english: The wind dies down and your sails with it.
translation: 风势渐息，船帆也随之垂落。

english: The wind tunnel proved a great way to dry off the wet bar.
translation: 风洞确实是个吹干湿沙爹的好办法。

english: Their duel ended only when the Empty Lord lost his footing and fell, with his hands still gripping Zamorak's throat. As the two fell to the floor together, the Staff of Armadyl pierced his body more deeply, and also pierced the body of Zamorak so that the two were joined by the staff as the Empty Lord was defeated.
translation: 他们之间的决斗在虚空之主失足倒地后才告终，他双手仍紧抓扎莫拉克的咽喉。两人一同坠地时，阿玛迪尔法杖刺穿他身体的深度加剧，同时也刺穿了扎莫拉克的身躯，令两人被法杖相连，虚空之主就此败北。

english: Then I gave him the password. I thought I was on my way in but the guard told me I couldn't get in without ID. Why penguins need ID eludes me.
translation: 然后我把密码给了他。我以为能进去了，但守卫说没有身份证明就不让进。为什么企鹅需要身份证明，我可想不通。

english: Then I guess this is goodbye, and good luck.
translation: 那我们就此告别吧，祝你好运。

english: Then I head east, around Rellekka, to the coast near the entrance of Keldagrim.
translation: 然后我向东走，绕过Rellekka，到达Keldagrim入口附近的海岸。

english: Then I read the spell in front of the statue of King Arthur, freeing him.
translation: 接着我在亚瑟王雕像前念诵咒语，释放了他。

english: Then I'll just have to avoid him.
translation: 那我就只能躲着他了。

english: Then don't. It makes no difference to me. You are nothing more than a distraction. A passing amusement while I prepare to restore our people to glory.
translation: 那就别问。对我来说无所谓。你不过是个消遣，是我在准备带领族人重铸荣光时的一点调剂罢了。

english: Then it would be wise for us to leave. Come.
translation: 那我们最好还是离开。走吧。

english: Then let us begin, my child.
translation: 那我们就开始吧，我的孩子。

english: Then let's get down there!
translation: 那我们下去吧！

english: Then they gave me their mission report.
translation: 然后他们把任务报告交给了我。

english: Then we must find a way to cross the Salve!
translation: 那我们必须找到渡过萨维河的办法！

english: There are 0 pages missing. Perhaps Logosia would be interested in this?
translation: 没有缺失任何一页。或许Logosia会对这个感兴趣？

english: There are 2 pages missing.
translation: 缺少2页。

english: There are many options open to us. Haemalchemy is likely to be the most promising.
translation: 我们面前有许多选择。血炼术可能是最有前景的。

english: There are no fairy rings which go to that destination which you have access to.
translation: 你无法到达该目的地的任何精灵环。

english: There are no more explosive eggs left.
translation: 没有更多的爆炸蛋了。

english: There are no more poison eggs left.
translation: 没有更多的毒蛋了。

english: There are no music tracks available that match your current filters and playlist settings.
translation: 当前筛选与播放列表设置下没有可用的音乐曲目。

english: There are no wind motes in the wind catcher.
translation: 风捕器中没有风之微粒。

english: There are various items on the shelves.
translation: 架子上有各种物品。

english: There are various potions on the shelves.
translation: 架子上摆着各种药水。

english: There are various weapons on the rack.
translation: 武器架上挂着各式兵器。

english: There is 1 page missing.
translation: 缺少1页。

english: There is a jester costume for me in the King's chest.
translation: 国王的箱子里有件小丑装给我。

english: There is already a balloon toad on that outcrop!
translation: 那个岩架上已经有气球蟾蜍了！

english: There is no ammo left in your quiver.
translation: 你的箭袋里没有弹药了。

english: There is no time, my children. Things remain highly delicate here. It is my understanding that the human lands have no interest in war. They must be made aware that we feel the same way.
translation: 没时间了，孩子们。这里的情况依然很微妙。据我所知，人类领地并无开战之意。必须让他们明白，我们也是如此。

english: There is nothing to retrieve in that section.
translation: 该部分没有可领取的物品。

english: There isn't any way for you to clear it from this side.
translation: 这边没法帮你清理。

english: There isn't anything else behind the cabinet.
translation: 柜子后面没有别的东西了。

english: There isn't anything else in the sink for you to remove.
translation: 水槽里已经没有任何你可以移除的东西了。

english: There looks to be some rubble stopping you from going any further.
translation: 前方的碎石似乎挡住了你的去路。

english: There was Iriandul Caistlyn, Sarl Dunegun, Friar Twiblick, Derygull Templeton, Erysail the Pious and Essiandar Gar.
translation: 伊里安杜尔·凯斯特林、萨尔·杜内冈、特威布里克修士、德里古尔·坦普尔顿、虔诚者艾瑞赛尔、埃西安达尔·加尔。

english: There we go! I's say that's the totem finished!
translation: 搞定了！我看图腾算是完成了！

english: There's a broken Imcando Hammer inside!
translation: 里面有把损坏的伊姆坎多锤子！

english: There's a portal back to Morytania upstairs. We can use it to escape.
translation: 楼上有回莫里塔尼亚的传送门，我们可以用它逃走。

english: There's always a cost. The weak must die so that the strong may survive. It is how every race operates, even yours. There is no alternative.
translation: 凡事皆有代价。弱者必死，强者方生。万族皆循此道，人类亦然。别无选择。

english: There's an ancient relic inside!
translation: 里面有个古代遗物！

english: There's some sort of collapsed tunnel here. I reckon I'm going to need to go get a pickaxe and then try mining through it.
translation: 这儿有处塌陷的隧道，看来得找把镐子挖通它。

english: There, we discovered the Augur to be Metzli. Not only that, but Metzli revealed Ennius and Furia to be part of the Emissaries as well, with her claiming them to be Ralos and Ranul reborn. I discussed this with Itzla and he suggested we continue to investigate the Emissaries to find out more about their plans.
translation: 在那儿，我们发现先知便是梅兹莉。不仅如此，梅兹莉还透露恩纽斯和富里娅也是使徒成员，并声称他们是拉洛斯和拉努尔转世。我与伊兹拉商议后，他建议我们继续调查使徒，以探明他们的更多计划。

english: There, with help from the Assassin, I was able to recover a Medallion that once belonged to him.
translation: 在那儿，有刺客相助，我找回了一枚他曾拥有的勋章。

english: There. Drakan should have no way of making a new portal now.
translation: 好了。德拉克现在应该没法再造新传送门了。

english: They are. I do not deny that their relationship with Sugadinti is complicated, and it is not one I totally approve of.
translation: 是的。我并不否认他们和苏加丁提的关系很复杂，而且我也不完全赞同这种关系。

english: They created a Homunculus, which seems to be a mixture of logic and magic. Perhaps I can help by talking to it.
translation: 他们创造了一个人造人，似乎融合了逻辑与魔法。或许我可以和它谈谈，帮上点忙。

english: They created a life form! But sadly, it seems to have gone wrong. I should go investigate the top floor of the tower.
translation: 他们创造了一个生命体！可惜，似乎出了差错。我该去塔顶查探一番。

english: They have been watching - what are they planning?
translation: 他们一直在观望——究竟在策划什么？

english: They told me that the stolen goods were in a cave guarded by a giant sea snake, and asked me to kill it so that they could escape from the caves.
translation: 他们说赃物藏在一条巨型海蛇守护的洞穴里，让我杀掉它好让他们逃出洞穴。

english: They took my suit and are going to use the design to finish their Giant Penguin. He said I was to be thrown to the Ice Lords.
translation: 他们拿走了我的装备，还打算用设计图完成他们的巨型企鹅。他说我会被扔给冰霜领主。

english: They will. And they will do so willingly, because they know what will happen to us all if they don't.
translation: 他们会照办的，而且心甘情愿。因为他们很清楚，不照办的后果会怎样。

english: They're barbaric even without the festivals. Just look at how they've treated humans here.
translation: 即使没有节日，他们也很野蛮。看看他们在这里是怎么对待人类的。

english: This anagram reveals
translation: 这个字谜揭示的是

english: This area is so cold that you will experience
translation: 此区域异常寒冷，你将感受到

english: This buff is already active.
translation: 此增益效果已激活。

english: This clock already has both of its hands.
translation: 这块时钟已经有指针了。

english: This doesn't seem like a suitable place to take a pet.
translation: 这里似乎不适合带宠物。

english: This facility can fire ammunition up to mithril.
translation: 这个设施能发射至多秘银弹。

english: This form is for reporting players who are breaking the game's rules.
translation: 此表格用于举报违反游戏规则的玩家。

english: This is Sarei, by the way. Apparently the two of you have met before?
translation: 顺便提一句，这位是赛瑞。听说你们俩之前见过？

english: This is a celastrus patch. The soil has not been treated. The patch is empty and weeded.
translation: 这是一片苦寒藤的种植地。土壤未经处理。一片空置且已除过草的地块。

english: This is a tree patch. The soil has not been treated. The patch is empty and weeded.
translation: 这是一个树木种植区。土壤未经处理。地块空置且已除草。

english: This is an anima patch. The patch is empty and weeded.
translation: 这是灵壤。灵壤空无一物，且已除过草。

english: This is another vampyrification lab... What have you done?
translation: 这又是一个吸血鬼实验室……你做了什么？

english: This is... quite something. Here, you'd better see for yourself.
translation: 这……还挺有意思的。喏，你最好亲眼看看。

english: This item cannot be withdrawn as a note.
translation: 此物品无法以纸条形式取出。

english: This land... There's such beauty here, but none of them ever stopped to truly see it...
translation: 这片土地...如此美丽，却无人驻足细细欣赏...

english: This must be it.
translation: 肯定就是这里了。

english: This puzzle will make me a mighty pirate.
translation: 这谜题能让我成为海盗大亨。

english: This raid has already begun.
translation: 这场突袭已经开始。

english: This snake alone isn't long enough to attach to the tree.
translation: 这根蛇的长度不够，挂不到树上。

english: This spell can only be used on vampyre juveniles or vampyre juvinates.
translation: 该法术仅能对吸血鬼幼体或吸血鬼雏体使用。

english: This was our real home. Not that town back there, or that castle. This here is the last place we were truly who we were meant to be.
translation: 这才是我们真正的家。不是那边的镇子，也不是那座城堡。只有这里，才是我们最后能真正做自己的地方。

english: This was when Viggora found himself fading too, as he became a ghost along with the others I had met.
translation: 维戈拉也发现自己渐趋消散，和我遇到的其他魂魄一样化作幽灵。

english: Though it does beg the question... What was this work? All this time we've been fighting Drakan, and now we learn your kind were there as well. Why didn't you help?
translation: 但这确实引出一个问题……那项工程究竟是什么？我们一直与德拉坎战斗，而如今才得知你们的存在。为何你们不曾提供援助？

english: Through the door that the boneguard had been blocking, there was an even larger boneguard! With my experience in prayer, I avoided getting hurt. The boneguard was impressed, and told me he was really a man called Akthanakos trapped against his will. He asked me for help in defeating his rival, Enakhra.
translation: 穿过骨卫之前挡着的那扇门，竟然还有一个更大的骨卫！凭借我的祈祷经验，我躲过了伤害。骨卫对此印象深刻，并告诉我他其实是一个叫阿卡那科斯的人，被强行困在这里。他请求我帮忙击败他的对手埃纳赫拉。

english: Thurgo needed a picture of the sword before he could start work on a replacement. I took him a portrait of it. After bringing Thurgo two iron bars and some blurite ore he made me a fine replica of Sir Vyvin's Sword, which I returned to the Squire for a reward.
translation: 瑟尔戈需要剑的图样才能开始制作替代品。我给他带去了一幅剑的画像。在给了他两块铁锭和几块暗影矿石后，他为我打造了一柄精美的维文爵士之剑复制品。我将此剑归还给了侍从并获得了一份奖励。

english: Tiadeche is willing to sell Karambwan at a low price, and has trained me in fishing technique.
translation: 提亚德奇愿意低价出售卡兰布万鱼，并传授了我钓鱼技巧。

english: Time for the THIRD digit.
translation: 该输入第三位数字了。

english: Tinsay has shown me how to properly cook Karambwan, and has trained me in cooking technique. He also said he'd done something to the tribal statue, though he didn't say what.
translation: Tinsay教了我如何正确烹饪Karambwan，并训练了我的烹饪技巧。他还说他对部落雕像动了手脚，但没透露具体做了什么。

english: To Apsul they did travel,
translation: 他们踏上了前往阿普苏尔的旅途。

english: To allow me to infiltrate Darkmeyer, I worked with Polmafi to create a Vyre Noble Disguise out of a Vyrewatch Disguise.
translation: 为了让我潜入Darkmeyer，我与Polmafi合作，用Vyrewatch伪装制作了一套Vyre贵族伪装。

english: To avoid any interference while searching for Ivandis' Writings, Ivan and I dealt with the Monks of Zamorak at Paterdomus. Having done that, we should now search the temple and see if we can find the Writings. The Journal that Ivan found might be of help in doing so.
translation: 为了避免在寻找伊万迪斯文稿时受到干扰，我和伊万清算了帕特多姆斯的扎莫拉克修士。既然已经处理完毕，现在该搜查神庙寻找文稿了。伊万找到的那本日志或许能帮上忙。

english: To date, I've built 1 Vale
translation: 至今，我已经建成了 1 座山谷。

english: To do this I will need to repair it first. I will need to go to the gun locker and retrieve a new cannon barrel. I will then need to replace the broken barrel with this.
translation: 要做到这一点，我得先修理它。我需要去武器柜取一个新的炮管，然后把这个坏掉的炮管换下来。

english: To dream I did not even dare,
translation: 连想都不敢想，

english: To enter Prifddinas, which has been reverted to a crystal seed, I was asked to prepare a potion that would allow someone to survive the journey into the seed.
translation: 要进入已变回水晶种子的Prifddinas，我需要准备一种药水，让人能安全进入种子内部。

english: To experience The Blood Moon Rises as intended, the following settings are recommended:
translation: 为获得《血月升起》的预期体验，建议使用以下设置：

english: To hunt their deadly prey,
translation: 为了猎杀致命的猎物，

english: To prove to them that I was worthy of their time they demanded that I catch 8 rats with my cat, which I did.
translation: 为了向他们证明我值得他们花时间，他们要求我用猫抓8只老鼠，我照做了。

english: To purchase a boat, select one from the main shop menu and this panel will show further information on it.
translation: 购买船只时，从主商店菜单中选择一艘，此面板将显示其详细信息。

english: To restore the seal, I gathered some items for Eyatlalli to use as part of a ritual.
translation: 为了修复封印，我收集了一些物品供Eyatlalli在仪式中使用。

english: To search for an item, type the item or category of items you are looking for.
translation: 搜索物品时，请输入物品名称或类别。

english: To see what you have all become... The ways you stand... The ways you dress...
translation: 看看你们都变成了什么样子...你们站的样子...你们穿衣服的样子...

english: To take some, simply select the ones you want from the main menu. When doing so, this panel will also show further information on what you've selected.
translation: 从主菜单选择所需物品即可领取。选定后，此面板将显示所选内容的详情信息。

english: Today is not the day you die, my friend! Go!
translation: 今天还不是你死的时候，朋友！走吧！

english: Today is your lucky day, milady! I am donating to the victims of crime to atone for my past actions!
translation: 今日你运气真好，女士！我正在向犯罪受害者捐款，以弥补我过去的过错！

english: Tolna has repented and returned to the entrance of the rift.
translation: 托尔娜已忏悔并返回了裂缝入口。

english: Tolna has set up a dungeon to help others avoid his mistakes.
translation: 托尔纳建立了一个地牢，以帮助他人避免重蹈覆辙。

english: Too risky surely? There's a lot of vampyres around there.
translation: 太冒险了吧？那边吸血鬼可不少。

english: Trading with: <osrscn-name-0>
translation: 正在与 <osrscn-name-0> 交易

english: Trailblazer Relichunter (tier 2)
translation: 开拓者遗物猎人（二级）

english: Truth be told, I'm surprised I didn't work it out sooner. Drezel never hid the fact that he wanted me to succeed him, and he and Veliaf always tried so hard to keep me safe.
translation: 说实话，我居然没早点想明白。德雷泽尔从未掩饰过希望我接替他，而他和维利亚夫总那么拼命保护我。

english: Truth be told, they're probably right. In a few hours, we'll almost certainly all be dead.
translation: 说实话，他们大概是对的。再过几小时，我们几乎肯定会全死光。

english: Turn the tap on.
translation: 打开水龙头。

english: Turn the tap on?
translation: 打开水龙头？

english: Twisted Relichunter (tier 2)
translation: 扭曲遗物猎人（二级）

english: Two tables, using basic wooden planks and some nails.
translation: 两张桌子，用的是普通木板和几颗钉子。

english: U : Harmony Island
translation: U：和谐之岛

english: Uh-oh! Tell me about those voices.
translation: 哎呀！给我说说那些声音的事。

english: Uncharge the scythe
translation: 卸除镰刀充能

english: Unexpectedly, Lord Shayzien proposed that Lord Hosidius should be crowned the new King of Great Kourend. Lord Hosidius agreed to this and the finalised Royal Accord was named Rose's Accord.
translation: 出人意料地，沙济恩公爵提议由霍西迪乌斯公爵加冕为伟大的科伦德新国王。霍西迪乌斯公爵接受了这一提议，最终确定的王室协议被命名为《玫瑰协约》。

english: Unfortunately I couldn't remove the curse from the area, however, I was able to return some important artefacts to Grish, who can now set up a new ceremonial dance area for the ogres of Gu' Tanoth.
translation: 可惜我未能解除此区域的诅咒，但我将一些重要法器还给了格里斯，如今他可以为我坦诺斯的巨魔们设立新的仪式舞场。

english: Unfortunately, I can't wear the backpack at the same time as most metal chest armours. I also need to move about a bit so that the contraption can scan fresh areas for arrows.
translation: 可惜，我没办法在穿着大多数金属胸甲时同时背着这背包。我还得稍微活动活动，好让这装置扫描到新区域的箭矢。

english: Unfortunately, he wasn't willing to reward me without the Beast's Head.
translation: 可惜，他不肯在没有野兽头颅的情况下给我奖励。

english: Unfortunately, that alone won't be enough to keep you alive. I suspect even the human-borns would have no trouble in dealing with you. However, I do not intend to give them the chance.
translation: 可惜，单凭这点本事可保不住你的小命。我看那些凡人出身的家伙都能轻松料理你。不过，我可不想给他们这个机会。

english: Unless you fancy facing my brother, I'd suggest you get a move on and destroy that blood stockpile.
translation: 除非你想跟我兄弟较量一下，否则我建议你赶紧行动，摧毁那批血药储备。

english: Unsurprisingly, he wasn't happy. However, he still traced the Ancient Amulet for me. He gave me an Abyssal Incantation to teleport to the source of the Amulet with.
translation: 不出所料，他并不高兴。不过，他还是为我追踪了远古护符，并给了我一道深渊咒语，用于传送至护符的源头。

english: Until recently, our plan was to remain here in Vampyrium until we were strong enough to defeat Drakan, but recent events have made that impossible.
translation: 直到最近，我们的计划还是留在维安匹姆，直到足够强大能击败德拉坎为止，但最近发生的事件让这已无可能。

english: Untradeable drop: Dull ancient medal
translation: 不可交易掉落：暗淡的远古勋章

english: Untradeable drop: Tarnished battleaxe
translation: 不可交易掉落：锈蚀战斧

english: Untradeable drop: Tarnished ring
translation: 不可交易掉落：黯淡戒指

english: Up in the Troll Stronghold, Burntmeat the troll chef wanted me to do something for him. I'd met Burntmeat before. He made me fetch him a tasty humam to put in his stew. I brought him a sort of scarecrow stuffed with meat. He must have liked it.
translation: 在巨魔要塞上面，巨魔厨师烧肉想让我帮他做件事。我之前见过烧肉。他让我去给他弄个美味的“人肉”来炖汤。我给他带了个塞满肉的稻草人。他应该挺喜欢那玩意儿的。

english: Upgrade your flail?
translation: 升级你的连枷？

english: Upon arrival in Vampyrium, Veliaf, Ivan and I found ourselves in an older Castle Drakan. Before we could do anything else, we were attacked by some strange vampyric creatures, resulting in us becoming separated. I explored the Castle and eventually found Veliaf again.
translation: 刚到Vampyrium，维利亚夫、伊凡和我便发现自己身处一座更古老的德拉克城堡。还没来得及反应，我们就遭到了奇怪吸血鬼生物的袭击，结果我们被迫分散了。我探索了城堡，最终再次找到了维利亚夫。

english: Upon arrival in Vampyrium, Veliaf, Ivan and I found ourselves in an older Castle Drakan. Before we could do anything else, we were attacked by some strange vampyric creatures, resulting in us becoming separated. I'll need to explore the Castle and work out how to find and free Safalaan, whilst also finding Veliaf and Ivan again.
translation: 到达吸血鬼之地后，维利亚夫、伊凡和我发现自己身处一座更古老的德拉肯城堡。还没来得及做别的，我们就被一些奇怪的吸血鬼生物袭击了，结果走散了。我需要探索这座城堡，想办法找到并解救萨法拉安，同时重新找到维利亚夫和伊凡。

english: Upon arrival in Yu'biusk, all we found was an empty wasteland.
translation: 抵达 Yu'biusk 后，我们只发现了一片荒芜之地。

english: Upon arrival, I found them being attacked by some Mercenaries, but I was able to help defeat them.
translation: 我到达时发现他们正遭到一些雇佣兵的攻击，但我协助击败了他们。

english: Upon being told about Marcellus' request, the Frogs decided to call an election to pick their leader. However, two of them, Sue and Gary, told me that another, Cuthbert, intended to declare war if he won. To prevent that from happening, I sabotaged his Election Hop-Off Lily Pad.
translation: 得知马塞勒斯的请求后，青蛙们决定通过选举选出首领。但其中两位——苏和加里告诉我，另一位叫卡斯伯特的人打算在获胜后宣战。为阻止此事，我破坏了他的选举跳跃荷叶。

english: Upon further questioning from her, Councillor Orson also told us that the Council was helped by a Mysterious Mage.
translation: 在她进一步追问下，奥森议员还告诉我们，议会曾得到一位神秘法师的帮助。

english: Upon leaving the Pyramid, I experienced one last Flashback. It showed Icthlarin, the Menaphite God of the Dead, freeing me from the Devourer's control. I then returned to the High Priest. He thanked me for my efforts and rewarded me.
translation: 离开金字塔时，我经历了最后一次闪回。闪回中看到亡者之神伊瑟林将我从不朽者手中解救出来。随后我回到大祭司处，他感谢我的付出并给予奖赏。

english: Upon my return to the Ancient Vault, Asgarnia stole the Medallion and used it to open a stairway to the lower level.
translation: 我回到远古宝库时，阿斯加尼亚偷走了勋章并用它打开了通往下一层的楼梯。

english: Upon reading The Envoy to Varlamore, I discovered that the original copy of the Accord was lost at sea. It's believed that the ship carrying the Accord sunk into a set of caves not far from Land's End.
translation: 在阅读《瓦拉莫雷特使》后，我发现协约的原件在海上遗失。据信载有协约的船只沉没于距离兰德之末不远的一片洞穴中。

english: Upon the death of your next two foes, some of your special attack energy will be restored.
translation: 你接下来的两个敌人死亡时，将恢复部分特殊攻击能量。

english: Use Suggested Settings
translation: 使用建议设置

english: Use the buttons below to select a modifier before continuing to the next wave.
translation: 使用下方按钮选择修饰词，再继续进入下一波。

english: Use the portal?
translation: 使用传送门？

english: Used for catching and storing wind motes. Once caught, wind motes can be released into your sails for a speed boost.
translation: 用于捕捉和存储风之微粒。捕获后，可将风之微粒释放到船帆中以获得速度提升。

english: Using five Sewer Valves on the surface, I was able to find a way to follow Clivet to the Cultist Hideout. There, I confronted their leader, who revealed Jones, Ceril's Butler, to be a member of the Cult. He then attacked me, but I defeated him before recovering the Stolen Armour.
translation: 在地面上使用五个下水道阀门后，我成功找到了跟随Clivet前往邪教徒藏身处的方法。在那里，我与他们的首领对峙，他揭露了Ceril的管家Jones也是该邪教的成员。他随后向我发动攻击，但我击败了他并夺回了被盗的盔甲。

english: Using information found by Silif, we were able to locate Lucien's Camp near the Wilderness.
translation: 使用Silif找到的信息，我们成功定位了荒野附近的Lucien营地。

english: Using information from the Stone Tablet, I was able to find a second Ancient Ruin beneath Lake Molch Island. Within the Ruin, I found another Stone Tablet.
translation: 借助石板上的信息，我在摩尔奇岛湖底找到了第二处远古遗迹。在遗迹中，我又发现了一块石板。

english: Using information from the second Stone Tablet, I was able to find a third Ancient Ruin beneath Kebos Swamp. Within the Ruin, I found another Stone Tablet.
translation: 根据第二块石板的线索，我在凯博斯沼泽下找到第三处远古遗迹，并在其中发现了另一块石板。

english: Using information from the third Stone Tablet, I was able to find a fourth Ancient Ruin beneath the Ruins of Morra. Within the Ruin, I found another Stone Tablet.
translation: 借助第三块石板的信息，我在莫拉废墟下方找到了第四处远古遗迹。在这处遗迹中，我发现了另一块石板。

english: Using it sends us a snapshot of the last minute of activity.
translation: 使用它可让我们获取最后一分钟的活动快照。

english: Using its power I managed to destroy the demon Delrith like the great hero Wally did many years before.
translation: 借助它的力量，我成功消灭了恶魔德尔里斯，就像多年前的伟大英雄瓦利所做的那样。

english: Using my new Vyre Noble Disguise, I was able to infiltrate the vampyre capital of Darkmeyer.
translation: 我穿着新做的维雷贵族伪装，成功潜入了吸血鬼都城达克梅耶。

english: Using superior cunning and stealth I have managed to exit the Brewery compound and have collected a bucket of Stagnant Water.
translation: 凭卓越的机敏与隐秘，我已成功离开酿酒厂区并收集了一桶死水。

english: Using the second Treasure Scroll, I managed to find a Mysterious Orb.
translation: 使用第二张宝藏卷轴，我找到了一个神秘宝珠。

english: V : Cemetery
translation: V：墓地

english: Valdez gave me a ghostly top, and told me to see if Rennard still had the staff.
translation: Valdez给了我一件幽灵上衣，叫我去看看Rennard是否还拿着那根法杖。

english: Vampyrium awaits...
translation: 鲜血之地在等待...

english: Vampyrium? What are you on about?
translation: 吸血鬼(Vampyrium)？你在说什么呢？

english: Vanescula gave me some money to keep in case of an emergency. I'm paying some mercenaries from Misthalin to help me get out safely. I'll be fine. It's not me you should worry about.
translation: 瓦内斯库拉给了我一些钱应急用。我正在雇些米斯萨林的雇佣兵帮我安全脱身。我会没事的。你该担心的不是我。

english: Vanescula told us that to kill her brother, our weaponry would need improving. She suggested we return to the Haemalchemy Laboratory beneath Meiyerditch to see if we could find any more research.
translation: Vanescula告诉我们，要杀死她的兄弟，我们需要升级武器。她建议我们返回Meiyerditch地下的血液炼金实验室，看看能否找到更多研究资料。

english: Vanescula!
translation: 文森科拉!

english: Vanescula! What did your brother do to him?
translation: 瓦内斯库拉！你兄弟对他做了什么？

english: Vanescula...
translation: 维尼丝库拉...

english: Vanescula? What are you doing up here?
translation: 瓦妮丝库拉？你在这儿做什么？

english: Vannaka taught me how to equip and unequip my weapons and armour from my inventory in order to prepare me for combat.
translation: 万纳卡教我如何从背包中装备和卸下武器与防具，以便让我做好战斗准备。

english: Veldaban has told me the Red Axe has left Keldagrim, and wants me to investigate.
translation: 维达班告诉我红斧已离开凯尔达格林，让我去调查。

english: Veliaf and I returned to Slepe. There, we confronted Damien at Crombwick Manor and defeated him. With Damien dead, I used his blood to scent the Vyre Noble Disguise.
translation: 我和维利亚夫回到了斯莱佩。在克朗姆威克庄园与达米安对峙并将其击败。达米安死后，我用他的血给维瑞贵族伪装增添了气味。

english: Veliaf! Are you okay?
translation: 维利亚夫！你还好吗？

english: Veliaf! You've...
translation: 维利亚夫！你……

english: Veliaf.
translation: 维利亚夫。

english: Very good, my child. Let me know when you are ready to go in.
translation: 很好，我的孩子。准备好了就告诉我，我们进去。

english: Very inspiring...
translation: 真是鼓舞人心……

english: Very true.
translation: 没错。

english: Very well, but be ready to fall back as soon as I tell you to.
translation: 好，但我说撤退的时候要立刻准备好。

english: Very well. If that is your wish, I will not stop you, but if you are not back here by the time the portal opens, I'm afraid we will not be able to wait for you.
translation: 好吧。既然你心意已决，我也不拦你。但若传送门开启时你还没回来，恐怕我们没法等你。

english: Very well... Thank you, <osrscn-name-0>. For what you've done for me... but more importantly, for what you've done for Safalaan.
translation: 好吧……谢谢你，<osrscn-name-0>。为了你为我所做的一切……但更重要的是，为了你对萨法拉恩所做的一切。

english: View your other pets
translation: 查看你的其他宠物

english: Viggora witnessed the appearance of other gods who banished Zamorak from the world completely for daring to kill one of their own kind. However, as Viggora pointed out, this did not work because Zamorak was able to return in the form of a god himself.
translation: 维格罗见证众神出手，将萨莫拉克彻底逐出世间，只因他胆敢杀害一位神祇。但正如维格罗指出的，此举徒劳无功——萨莫拉克最终以神之形态重返此界。

english: Vowing revenge, Snowflake led us in a break-out from the prison.
translation: 为了复仇，雪花带领我们逃出了监狱。

english: W : Ape Atoll Dungeon
translation: W：猿猴岛地牢

english: Wait! Do you hear that?
translation: 等等！你听到了吗？

english: Wait! Safalaan and the others are still out there!
translation: 等等！萨法拉恩和其他人还在外面！

english: Waiting ...
translation: 等待中...

english: Waiting for other player...
translation: 等待其他玩家...

english: Wave 'Sotetseg' (Normal Mode) complete!
translation: '索泰塞格'（普通模式）波次通关！

english: Wave 'The Final Challenge' (Normal Mode) complete!
translation: '最终挑战'波次（普通模式）完成！

english: Wave 'The Maiden of Sugadinti' (Normal Mode) complete!
translation: 波次“苏加丁蒂少女”（普通模式）完成！

english: Wave 'The Nylocas' (Normal Mode) complete!
translation: 击败尼洛卡斯（普通模式）！

english: We are not far off, but more time is still needed. However, I have faith in my disciples. They will make sure that we have it.
translation: 我们离成功不远了，但仍需更多时间。不过，我对我的弟子们有信心。他们会确保我们获得所需的时间。

english: We are still preparing everything we need to make the portal, my child. While we do, may I suggest you assist my disciples and your companions with their own preparations.
translation: 孩子，我们还在准备传送门所需的一切。在此期间，我建议你协助我的弟子和你的同伴们各自准备。

english: We can't be far off now. Stay alert.
translation: 应该不远了，保持警惕。
