english: We do. Drakan's tyranny finally ends today.
translation: 我们行动吧。德拉坎的暴政，今日终结。

english: We don't have time to waste here. After you, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 我们没时间在这磨蹭。你先走，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: We either let his finish transforming, or he dies...
translation: 要么让他完成转化，要么他就得死……

english: We explored the Lab and found a route leading into the entrance hall of Castle Drakan. Within the entrance hall, we found the Portal we were looking for. We then used this Portal to travel to Vampyrium.
translation: 我们探索了实验室，找到了一条通往德拉肯城堡门厅的路线。门厅里发现了我们要找的传送门，随后通过它抵达了范皮瑞姆。

english: We explored the Lab and found a way forward. We should see if this route leads into Castle Drakan.
translation: 我们探索了实验室，找到了前路。该看看这条路线是否通向德拉肯城堡。

english: We explored the Tomb and I found and unblocked a Tunnel. We followed this Tunnel and found ourselves in some sort of Lab.
translation: 我们探索了古墓，我发现并打通了一条隧道。顺着这条隧道，我们来到了一处像是实验室的地方。

english: We explored the Tomb and I found and unblocked a Tunnel. We should see where it leads.
translation: 我们探索了古墓，我找到并打通了一条隧道。该去看看它通向哪里。

english: We found Justin being attacked by an Ogre in the Arena, but I was able to defeat it for him. We then attempted to escape, but were captured by General Khazard.
translation: 我们在竞技场发现贾斯汀正被一个巨怪袭击，但我帮他打败了它。之后我们试图逃跑，却被卡扎德将军俘虏了。

english: We found her while we were searching for you. We also found this on her. It is not a substance that occurs naturally here. We assume she obtained it at some point during your escape.
translation: 我们搜寻你的时候找到了她，还在她身上发现了这个。这东西并非此地自然生成之物，想必是你们逃跑途中她得到的。

english: We got attacked by some very strange birds. I had to fight them off.
translation: 我们被一些非常奇怪的鸟袭击了。我不得不击退它们。

english: We had the numbers back in Vampyrium as well. All those aranei he killed...
translation: 我们在万血之地也占有人数优势。他杀死的那些亚兰尼蛛……

english: We had to crawl through a little tunnel to reach the gates.
translation: 我们得爬过一条小隧道才能到那扇门。

english: We have been attacked by pirates, and Bill has told me to destroy their cannon before they sink the ship. He has told me I can climb the mast and use a rope to make a rope swing and swing across. When I get there, I will need to use some sort of a flame on a fuse after attaching it to the gunpowder barrel they have next to the cannon.
translation: 我们遭到了海盗的袭击，比尔让我在他们击沉船只前摧毁大炮。他告诉我可以爬上桅杆用绳子做个绳摆荡过去。到达后，我需要用某种火焰点燃他们大炮旁火药桶上的引信。

english: We have made a deal. Once Drakan is dealt with, I will allow the Theatre to remain open. However, rather than false promises of freedom, the Theatre will be a place where the strongest may choose to test themselves.
translation: 我们达成了协议。一旦德拉肯被解决，我将允许剧院继续开放。不过，剧院不再是虚假的自由许诺，而是强者可以自主选择接受挑战的试炼之地。

english: We helped the Ancient Rune Guardians close the Abyssal Rift.
translation: 我们帮助古老符文守护者关闭了深渊裂隙。

english: We managed to get Merlin out of the cell. All the knights formed a human pyramid which Merlin then climbed up and into the grate from. The guard was too busy doing his hair to notice.
translation: 我们成功将梅林从牢房里救了出来。所有骑士组成了人梯，梅林顺着爬上去钻进了栅栏。守卫正忙着打理头发，根本没注意到。

english: We must ensure no power vacuum is left. As soon as he is dealt with, I must immediately step up as the new leader of the vampyres.
translation: 我们必须确保不留权力真空。他一被处理，我就必须立即接任成为 vampyre 的新领袖。

english: We need to find the others. If Veliaf is with them, he'll have taken them somewhere safe.
translation: 我们得找到其他人。如果维利亚夫和他们在一起，他会带他们去安全的地方。

english: We need to get after him!
translation: 我们得追上去！

english: We need to put more distance between us and the castle. Once we're far enough away, we can double back and hopefully make a new portal.
translation: 我们得离城堡再远些。等够远了就折返，试着开个新传送门。

english: We should explore the Tomb and see if we can find a way forward.
translation: 我们该探索一下这座陵墓，看看能不能找到前进的路。

english: We should let him rest.
translation: 让他休息吧。

english: We soon found ourselves in an old ruined town that Vanescula called Sangvesti. However, the way forward was blocked by a Broken Drawbridge. I explored Sangvesti and found a missing Cog that we used to fix the Drawbridge.
translation: 我们很快来到了一座废墟古镇，凡妮丝库拉称其为桑格维斯蒂。但前方道路被一座破损吊桥阻断。我在桑格维斯蒂探索时发现了一个缺失的齿轮，用它修好了吊桥。

english: We then had to fight off a horde of vicious trolls!
translation: 然后我们得击退一群凶残的山妖！

english: We thought we'd lost you back there, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 我们以为你回不来了，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: We tried out the suit at the Zoo. Being shrunk down and walking around as a penguin was easier than I expected. The penguins at the Zoo wouldn't talk to me without a greeting.
translation: 我们在动物园试穿了套装。缩小后扮成企鹅走动比我想象中简单。动物园里的企鹅没打招呼就不愿理我。

english: We were, my child. It is my hope that I can offer her enough to join with us willingly. However, from what we've seen of her, it is clear she has rather lofty ambitions of her own.
translation: 以前是，我的孩子。我希望我能给她足够的东西，让她心甘情愿加入我们。但从我们对她的了解来看，显然她也有相当远大的野心。

english: We will all need to accept compromise here, my child.
translation: 我们都需要接受妥协，孩子。

english: We'd better get over there then.
translation: 那我们最好过去吧。

english: We'd better keep going, <osrscn-name-0>.
translation: 我们最好继续前进，<osrscn-name-0>。

english: We'd better keep moving. It probably won't be long before someone comes to check in on things here.
translation: 我们最好继续前进。可能过不了多久就会有人来查看这里的情况了。

english: We'd need to find him first.
translation: 我们得先找到他。

english: We're in this together, Safalaan. I'm not about to abandon you now.
translation: 我们并肩作战，萨法拉安。我不会抛下你不管的。

english: We're looking for a friend of ours.
translation: 我们在找一个朋友。

english: We've always been beasts, Vanescula, and no matter how much you try to hide it, that's all we ever will be.
translation: 我们是野兽，凡妮丝库拉，一直都是。无论你如何掩饰，那始终是我们的本性。

english: We've no idea what we'll find on the other side. If we get separated, try to make your way back to the portal.
translation: 我们不知道另一边会有什么。如果走散了，尽量找到回传送门的路。

english: We've stopped at the pirate's hideout. Best I see if someone can take us further.
translation: 我们停在海盗窝了。我去找找有没有人能带我们继续走。

english: Welcome back, my child. I hope you are ready, for my disciples tell me that Drakan has been sighted. He is heading this way.
translation: 欢迎回来，我的孩子。希望你已经准备好了，我的门徒报告说德拉肯现身了，他正往这边来。

english: Well done, you've completed the Treasure Trail!
translation: 干得不错，你完成了藏宝之旅！

english: Well, I had a look in the library and I found this old journal. Have a read of it and see what you reckon.
translation: 嗯，我去图书馆翻了一下，找到了这本旧日记。你看看，说说你的想法吧。

english: Well, best we get a move on then.
translation: 好了，那我们得赶紧了。

english: Well, fine! Celebrate if you wish, but I will not leave my son behind!
translation: 好吧！随你庆祝，但我绝不会丢下我儿子不管！

english: Well, given you'd been gone for a while, I thought I'd best come make sure my brother hadn't found you.
translation: 既然你离开了一阵子，我想最好还是来看看我兄弟有没有找到你。

english: Well, how about we use the portal that Drakan's already made then?
translation: 那用德拉肯已经造好的传送门如何？

english: Well, if you want to try getting something out of her, be my guest.
translation: 行啊，想从她嘴里套点东西的话，请便吧。

english: Well, it was actually my idea...
translation: 其实，这是我的主意……

english: Well, no point in us wasting time I guess. Let's go.
translation: 好吧，看来我们没必要浪费时间。走吧。

english: Well, no point wasting any time, I suppose. Safalaan's waiting for us.
translation: 好吧，我想没必要浪费时间了。萨法兰还在等着我们。

english: Well, probably best you work on that, given we'll surely soon be dead without it.
translation: 好吧，最好你去忙这个，毕竟没它我们肯定很快就要死了。

english: Well, that's one way of putting it...
translation: 好吧，这么说也行……

english: Well, we'll just have to hope he makes the right choice. Anyway, now that you're here, we can get started.
translation: 好吧，那就只能希望他做出正确的选择了。总之，既然你来了，我们可以开始了。

english: Well, you're god damn right there. Whatever it is you think the truth is, we don't accept it. Now give us Safalaan!
translation: 你说得一点没错。不管你觉得真相是什么，我们都不会接受。现在把萨法拉安交出来！

english: What a fantastic idea, Veliaf! Yes, why not kill the only person who actually knows their way around this place. Brilliant as always!
translation: 真是个好主意，Veliaf！没错，何不干掉唯一认得这地方的人呢。一如既往地高明啊！

english: What a lovely thought.
translation: 多么美好的想法。

english: What about Safalaan?!
translation: 那萨法拉安呢？！

english: What about Vanescula?
translation: 那范尼斯科拉呢？

english: What about her?
translation: 她怎么了？

english: What about the other six? Who were they?
translation: 那另外六个呢？他们是谁？

english: What animal would you like to carve?
translation: 你想雕刻哪种动物？

english: What are you doing? Safalaan's still through there!
translation: 你在这儿干嘛？萨法兰还在里面呢！

english: What can you tell me about this land?
translation: 这块土地有什么故事吗？

english: What do you know about this festival your brother is planning?
translation: 你知道你哥哥在策划的这个节日是什么吗？

english: What do you make of your brother's plan?
translation: 你觉得你兄弟的计划怎么样？

english: What do you think of this festival of Drakan's?
translation: 你觉得德拉肯的庆典怎么样？

english: What exactly was it you were doing there, anyway?
translation: 话说，你刚才在那儿到底在干什么？

english: What happened back there?
translation: 刚刚那里发生了什么？

english: What if you're wrong about this? If so, Drakan will just use my son's blood to come back anyway!
translation: 万一你搞错了呢？要是那样，德拉坎照样会拿我儿子的血复活！

english: What potion would you like to mix?
translation: 你想混合哪种药水？

english: What would you like to buy?
translation: 你想买什么？

english: What would you like to craft?
translation: 你想制作什么？

english: What's it to be then, brother? Back to the cells with us? Or will you do us the kindness of killing us here and being done with it?
translation: 那怎么样呢，兄弟？是让我们回牢房去，还是行行好，在这儿把我们杀了了事？

english: What's the plan here, Vanescula?
translation: 范斯库拉，你们到底有什么计划？

english: What's the plan?
translation: 计划是什么？

english: Whatever that is!
translation: 管它是什么呢！

english: When I entered the Pyramid, I experienced another Flashback of me stealing the Burial Jar from a room within. I returned to that room and put the Burial Jar back.
translation: 进入金字塔时，我又经历了一次闪回，看到自己从里面一个房间里偷走了骨灰瓮。我回到那个房间，把骨灰瓮放了回去。

english: When I got to Drezel, he told me that there had been some strange goings-on around there and asked me to check the area out for him. So I did, but got attacked by agents unknown in the process. I have a hunch they came from Morytania, and most likely from Canifis.
translation: 见到德雷泽尔时，他说附近有些怪事发生，让我去查查。于是我便去了，结果途中遭到不明身份者的袭击。我隐约觉得他们来自莫里塔尼亚——很可能就是卡尼菲斯。

english: When I told Captain Tock that I'd seen Ithoi running around, thus proving he'd faked his illness, the Captain told me to kill Ithoi.
translation: 我告诉托克船长看到伊索伊四处跑，证明他装病后，船长让我杀了他。

english: When I'd solved the puzzles of the four rooms, I was able to pass through the barrier to the fifth room.
translation: 当我解开四个房间的谜题后，就能穿过屏障进入第五个房间了。

english: When do we go?
translation: 我们什么时候走？

english: Where am I? What's going on?
translation: 我这是在哪儿？发生什么事了？

english: Where do we go?!
translation: 我们该往哪儿走？！

english: Where even is here?
translation: 这到底是哪儿？

english: Whew! We survived our first balloon flight. We successfully flew the first Gielinor balloon to Taverley!
translation: 呼！我们成功完成了第一次热气球飞行。我们驾驶着吉莉诺第一艘热气球飞抵塔弗利！

english: Which approach would you prefer us to take regarding Mr McGroot? Please note, if Mr McGroot is offered as a transmog, you would need to have acquired the other pet separately before using it.
translation: 您希望我们对麦格鲁特先生采用何种方式？请注意，若麦格鲁特先生作为幻化外观提供，您需要先单独获取另一宠物才能使用它。

english: Which book would you like to take?
translation: 你想拿哪本书？

english: Which can only mean one thing...
translation: 那只意味着一件事...

english: Which is why you need to go now.
translation: 所以你赶紧去吧。

english: Which role do you wish to be?
translation: 你想担任哪个角色？

english: While Safalaan recovered from the fight with the Mutated Bloodvelds, I searched the Laboratory and found some more research.
translation: 在萨法拉恩从与变异血魔的战斗中恢复时，我搜查了实验室并发现了更多的研究资料。

english: While discussing the Jormungand with Chieftain Brundt, we were interrupted by the arrival of Agnar. Believing me to be responsible for the Basilisk threat, Agnar presented a declaration from the Fremennik Council that demanded my exile. Chieftain Brundt had no choice but to comply.
translation: 在与族长勃伦特讨论耶梦加得时，阿格纳突然闯入打断了我们。他认定我对蛇怪的威胁负有责任，并带来了弗雷蒙尼议会要求将我放逐的声明。族长勃伦特无奈只得遵从。

english: While doing so, may I also suggest some other improvements?
translation: 在我这么做的时候，我能提一些其他改进建议吗？

english: While investigating the Rat & Bat Inn, I noticed that the supply of Bloody Bracer had run out.
translation: 调查鼠蝠旅店时，我发现血腥护腕的库存已断货。

english: While looking around, Zanik disappeared after being sucked into a Strange Box. Before we could do anything about this, Oldak and I were forced to leave due to the portal becoming unstable. For now, Zanik is on her own.
translation: 正四处张望时，赞妮克被一股力量吸进了奇异盒子中消失了。我们还没来得及反应，传送门就开始不稳定，我和奥达克只得被迫撤离。眼下，赞妮克只能独自应对了。

english: While not as effective as your flail, you might find it beneficial to craft some stakes from this blisterwood. You can use them like a throwing knife, allowing you to harm vampyres from a distance.
translation: 这水疱木虽不如你的连枷那么管用，但或许值得做些木桩。你可以像飞刀一样投掷它们，从远处也能伤害吸血鬼。

english: While she stayed to guard the entrance, I travelled deeper into the Tomb to stop the Devourer.
translation: 她留守入口时，我深入墓穴阻止吞噬者。

english: While the cover of this book has remained largely intact,
translation: 尽管这本书的封面基本完好，

english: While the others prepared, I managed to track down Lady Ithell and Lady Meilyr, the last two clan elders.
translation: 趁其他人准备时，我设法找到了最后两位部族长老——伊塞尔女士和美利尔女士。

english: While the stomach presumably came from this venator,
translation: 尽管这胃囊很可能来自这只猎人，

english: While waiting for Ysgawyn to return, I managed to track down Lord Crwys and Lady Hefin, the elders of two elven clans.
translation: 在等待伊丝伽温归来的期间，我设法找到了两位精灵部族的长老——克维斯勋爵和海芬夫人。

english: While waiting for the Sophanem Pox Cure to take effect, Maisa and I returned to the Necropolis and freed the citizens there. However, the entry into the Excavated Tomb was still blocked. Some of the citizens offered to stay and unblock it for us.
translation: 在等待索法南瘟疫疫苗生效时，我和梅萨回到大墓地，解放了那里的居民。但通往挖掘出的墓穴的入口依然被堵着。一些居民主动留下为我们疏通道路。

english: While working on the potion, I managed to track down Lord Amlodd and Lady Trahaearn, the elders of two elven clans.
translation: 炼制药剂时，我成功追踪到了两位精灵族长老——阿姆洛德勋爵与特拉哈恩女士。

english: Who... Who are you? What is this?
translation: 谁……你是谁？这是什么？

english: Why didn't you tell us that you knew?
translation: 你为什么不告诉我们你知道？

english: Wingstone hands you a puzzlebox!
translation: 温斯通递给你一个谜盒！

english: With Elena's help, I managed to make a suitable poison. I used it to contaminate two of the three Food Supply Points in West Ardougne.
translation: 在艾琳娜的帮助下，我成功调制出了一种合适的毒药。我利用它污染了西阿杜因三个食品供应点中的两个。

english: With everything done around the Palace, I returned to Sugadinti. He told me that the Portal was nearly ready, but that Drakan had been sighted approaching the Palace.
translation: 皇宫这边的事情都办妥后，我回到了苏加丁提那里。他告诉我传送门快准备好了，但有人看到德拉肯正朝皇宫赶来。

english: With his treason revealed, King Lathas was executed before the people of East Ardougne and West Ardougne.
translation: 叛国罪行败露后，拉萨斯国王在东西阿登民众面前被处决。

english: With most of the Myreque dead, Lowerniel ordered Vanstrom to finish the rest of us off. However, we managed to defeat him. Safalaan tried to appeal to Vanstrom, hoping to remind him of his former life as Ascertes Hallow. But it didn't work.
translation: 迈瑞克大部已死，洛瓦尼尔命令范斯特罗姆将我等余党彻底铲除。然而，我们成功击败了他。萨法拉恩试图唤起范斯特罗姆对前世身份——阿塞特斯·哈洛的回忆，却未能奏效。

english: With my investigation complete, I returned to Veliaf to tell him what I'd found out. He informed me that while I was gone, he did some further investigating of his own. While spying on Crombwick Manor, he overheard another conversation between Vanstrom and Damien. Veliaf learnt that Slepe wasn't the only place where Damien was collecting extra blood tithes without permission. He'd also been using the werewolves of Canifis to increase his supply.
translation: 调查完毕后，我返回维利亚夫处汇报发现。他告知我其间他也做了进一步调查——在监视克伦布威克庄园时，他偷听到范斯特罗姆与达米安的又一次对话。维利亚夫得知，斯莱佩并非达米安擅自加收血税的唯一点，他还利用卡尼菲斯的狼人扩充血源。

english: With my work done, Essyllt revealed the purpose of the mining operation. They've been searching for an Ancient Temple under West Ardougne, using the citizens as slaves to mine the caverns. I told Arianwyn about this and he started work on a plan of action.
translation: 工作结束后，艾西尔特透露了采矿作业的真正目的。他们一直在西阿尔多恩地底寻找一座远古神殿，并奴役当地居民挖掘洞穴。我将此事告知了阿里安温，他已着手制定行动方案。

english: With no replacement, our only option was to fix the original Egg as best as possible.
translation: 没有替代品，我们唯一的办法就是尽可能修复原来的蛋。

english: With the Giant Scarab dealt with, Maisa held up her end of the bargain and helped the Sophanem citizens sneak out of Menaphos. I returned to the High Priest, who rewarded me for my help.
translation: 处理完巨型圣甲虫后，梅莎履行了承诺，帮助索法南的居民偷偷逃出了梅纳菲斯。我回到大祭司那里，他因我的帮助给予了奖励。

english: With the Iorwerth threat gone, Baxtorian and the other clan elders restored the city of Prifddinas. For the first time, they decided to allow humans to access the city, inviting myself and Elena to be the first humans to enter. Meanwhile, Arianwyn helped to repair the damage to Lletya before going into self-imposed exile.
translation: 伊奥沃斯的威胁解除后，巴克斯托里安与其他部族长老重建了普里弗迪纳城。他们首次决定允许人类进入这座城市，邀请我和埃琳娜成为首批踏入的人类。与此同时，阿瑞安温修复了莱蒂亚的创伤后，便自我放逐离去。

english: With the aid of a spade, I treated the soil with seven buckets of supercompost and three buckets of camel dung. It smelt pretty awful, but it looked ready to be used as a farming patch.
translation: 用铲子翻土后，我往土里添了七桶超级堆肥和三桶骆驼粪。虽然气味难闻，但地看起来已经可以当农地用了。

english: With the council members immune to his magic, Aris removed her time spell, so that I could defeat the Culinaromancer once and for all.
translation: 由于议会成员对他的魔法免疫，阿瑞斯解除了她的时间法术，让我能彻底击败烹饪法师。

english: With the future of Kourend decided, the leaders of Kourend's Five Houses were able to remove the Kourend Council from power.
translation: 随着科伦德未来的确定，科伦德五大家族的领袖得以罢免科伦德议会。

english: With the help of Savant from the Temple Knights, and their CommOrb device, I managed to finally track down the evil Solus and have him taken into Temple Knight custody for interrogation.
translation: 在圣殿骑士智者及其通讯法器的帮助下，我终于追踪到邪恶的索卢斯，并将其交由圣殿骑士羁押审讯。

english: With the help of Veliaf, I was able to fight off Vanstrom and his Juvinate henchmen and we moved the rest of the Myreque, with the exception of Ivan, down to 'Burgh de Rott'.
translation: 在维利亚夫的帮助下，我击退了凡斯特罗姆和他的年轻随从们，并带着除伊凡外的其余米瑞克成员转移到了"伯格·德·罗特"。

english: With the help of Vertida, I was able to use the Blisterwood Logs to create a Blisterwood Sickle. I then attached it to my Ivandis Flail to make a Blisterwood Flail.
translation: 在维尔蒂达的帮助下，我使用水疱木原木制作了一把水疱木镰刀。随后我将它安装到伊文迪斯连枷上，制成了一把水疱木连枷。

english: With the help of a Fellow Adventurer, I was able to obtain two Phoenix Crossbows. I gave them to Katrine and she allowed me to join the Black Arm Gang.
translation: 在一位冒险伙伴的帮助下，我得到了两把凤凰弩。我将它们交给了卡特琳，她准许我加入了黑臂帮。

english: With the help of her crew, Willow managed to gain entry into the Ancient Ruins.
translation: 在船员的帮助下，薇洛成功潜入了远古遗迹。

english: With the help of some workers, you swap out the flag on your boat.
translation: 在工人的帮助下，你换掉了船上的旗帜。

english: With the help of some workers, you swap out the keel of your boat.
translation: 在几名工人的帮助下，你更换了船的龙骨。

english: With the interrogation complete, Prince Itzla returned to the Delegation. However, before doing so, he invited me to join him in Varlamore to continue the investigation.
translation: 审讯结束后，伊茨拉王子回到了使团。但在离开前，他邀请我前往瓦拉摩雷继续调查。

english: With the monks' help, I have warded the granary from the gas.
translation: 在僧侣们的帮助下，我用防护罩护住了粮仓，使其免受毒气侵袭。

english: With the research recovered, I returned to the others at the Icyene Graveyard. There, Vanescula was able to translate it for us. The research revealed something that she had long suspected - that our weapons could be enhanced using the bark of a tree called the Blisterwood Tree, located in the vampyre capital of Darkmeyer.
translation: 带着找回的研究资料，我回到寒冰之墓的其他人身边。在那，凡妮斯库拉为我们翻译了这些内容。研究证实了她长期以来的猜测——我们可以用一种名为水疱木树的树皮来强化武器，这种树生长在吸血鬼首都黑暗迈尔。

english: With the stronghold breached by ballista fire, I was able to make my way inside and recover the orb of protection.
translation: 借助弩炮火力攻破的堡垒，我得以进入内部并取回护法宝珠。

english: With the test complete, I used the Crowbar to open Steve's Crate. It turns out the Crate was itself full of Crowbars, meaning I now have a plentiful supply for whenever I need one.
translation: 测试完成后，我用撬棍打开了史蒂夫的板条箱。原来板条箱里装满了撬棍，这意味着我现在有充足的储备，随时都能拿到。

english: With them, I came to the conclusion that Naiatli, Livius' understudy, was the one responsible for his death. I went on stage and confronted her. She admitted to being responsible, but claimed it to be an accident. She was then arrested, concluding the case.
translation: 和他们一起，我得出了结论，伊维乌斯的副手奈亚特莉应对他的死负责。我走上台去质问她。她承认了自己是罪魁祸首，但声称这是个意外。随后她被逮捕，案件就此结案。

english: Withdrawal / Storage
translation: 取出/存放

english: Within Osmumten's Tomb, I managed to free the four Lesser Menaphite Deities. I then confronted the Devourer herself.
translation: 在奥斯穆腾之墓中，我成功解放了四位小梅纳菲特神祇。随后，我直面了吞噬者本人。

english: Within the Hidden Room beneath the Carnillean Mansion, I found a Locked Chest with a Dusty Scroll inside. The scroll depicted half of a Crest of some sorts.
translation: 在卡尼利安大宅地下的密室里，我发现了一个上锁的箱子，里面有一卷布满灰尘的卷轴。卷轴上描绘了某种纹章的一半。

english: Within the Salt Mine, we found a cave-in leading to a Frozen Dungeon. Within this dungeon, General Khazard and I found the Assassin who I'd previously encountered on Entrana. He was trying to open a Large Door. However, he escaped after we confronted him.
translation: 在盐矿深处，我们发现一处塌陷通向冰封地牢。我与卡扎德将军在地牢中遇到了之前在恩特拉岛交过手的刺客。他正在试图打开一扇巨门，但我们现身对峙时他逃走了。

english: Within the cavern, I found a group of Dwarves. They told me that the crazed cultist Iban had taken control of the Well of Voyage, the only way through the Underground Pass. To find out how to kill Iban, the Dwarves told me to seek out the witch Kardia.
translation: 洞窟里我发现了一群矮人。他们告诉我，疯狂的邪教徒伊班控制了航行之井，那是穿过地下通道的唯一途径。要找到杀死伊班的方法，矮人让我去寻访女巫卡迪亚。

english: Wolf Bat Rat Baby Blue Dragon Ogre Jogre Zogre Mogre Dagannoth Snake Zombie Werewolf Moss Giant Fire Giant Ice Giant Terrorbird Ghoul Troll Seagull Undead Cow Experiment Rabbit Basilisk Massive Desert Lizard Cave Goblin Vulture Jackal That was fun.
translation: 狼、蝙蝠、鼠、幼蓝龙、食人魔、乔格、佐格、莫格、达甘诺斯、蛇、僵尸、狼人、苔藓巨人、火巨人、冰巨人、恐鸟、食尸鬼、巨魔、海鸥、亡灵牛、实验体、兔、巴西利斯克、巨型沙漠蜥蜴、洞窟哥布林、秃鹫、豺狼。真好玩。

english: Woo Wooooooooo wooo wooo wo wooo woo!!
translation: 唬！唬唬唬唬唬唬唬唬唬！！

english: Woo'o wooo wooooo - woooooo wo woooooo!!
translation: 呜哦呜哦呜哦哦——呜哦哦哦呜哦哦哦！！

english: Wooo wo wo wooooo wooooo, woo wo woooo wo wooooooooo!!
translation: 喔喔 喔 喔 喔喔喔 喔喔喔，喔 喔 喔喔喔 喔 喔喔喔喔喔!!

english: Wooo wooooooo, Wooooo woooooo o woooo!!
Woooo wo woo wooooo!!
translation: 呜呼呜呼呜呼！！

english: Would you be able to look after some things for me?
translation: 你能帮我照看一些东西吗？

english: Wyrmscraig is a new island designed by community member Gnome as part of our Player Designed Island competition. This poll covers the unique rewards proposed from Wyrmscraig's boss fight, Sunstone Golem Crafting and Goat Hunting.
translation: 龙鳞岛是社区成员Gnome在我们的玩家设计岛屿竞赛中设计的新岛屿。本次投票涵盖龙鳞岛首领战、旭石魔偶制作和山羊狩猎的独特奖励方案。

english: X : Barrows
translation: X：巴罗斯

english: Xarpus begins to stare intently.
translation: 赛普斯开始专注地凝视。

english: Yeah, <osrscn-name-0> and Safalaan were pretty good teachers.
translation: 是啊，<osrscn-name-0> 和 Safalaan 算是挺好的老师了。

english: Yeah... hopefully.
translation: 嗯…希望如此。

english: Yes yes yes! That is it! Thank you so much, Baltor Dräpare. The memories have come flooding back. I get why the lyrics are what they are now.
translation: 没错没错！就是这个！太感谢你了，Baltor Dräpare。记忆如潮水般涌回。我现在明白歌词为何如此了。

english: Yes, I suppose I could return your crew to port.
translation: 好吧，我大概能把你的船员送回港口。

english: Yes, and it was beautiful.
translation: 没错，那很美好。

english: Yes, and we've managed to rescue Safalaan and Vanescula as well. They're waiting downstairs.
translation: 是的，我们还成功救出了 Safalaan 和 Vanescula。他们正在楼下等着。

english: Yes, but their sacrifices were necessary. It is only thanks to them that he and the icyene can now make a portal capable of taking us all to Morytania.
translation: 没错，但他们的牺牲是必要的。正因为他们，他才能和冰伊族如今制造出能带我们所有人前往莫里塔尼亚的传送门。

english: Yes, indeed... However, I can assure you, my child, that there is always another way. If you need an example of that, just look at my disciples. They are proof that vampyres can live side by side with other races.
translation: 确实如此……不过，孩子，我可以向你保证，总有另一条路可走。若你需要例证，只需看看我的弟子们。他们就是吸血鬼与其他种族共存的证明。

english: Yes, my child. I fear that in her current state, she will do something regrettable.
translation: 是的，我的孩子。我担心以她目前的状态，她会做出追悔莫及的事。

english: Yes, reload the raid.
translation: 好的，重新加载副本。

english: Yes, restart the trial.
translation: 好，重新开始试炼吧。

english: Yes, teleport away and don't ask this again.
translation: 好，传走吧，别再问了。

english: Yes, teleport away from it.
translation: 对，传送走吧。

english: Yes, teleport me now.
translation: 好，现在传送我吧。

english: Yes, the Myreque are back.
translation: 是的，米瑞克又重新活跃起来了。

english: Yes... I understand your experiences with my kind are likely to give you a... less than warm feeling towards me.
translation: 是的...我明白你与我的族群的经历可能让你对我...怀有不太温暖的感觉。

english: Yes... I'm fine... I'm sorry for... For what happened there.
translation: 是……我没事……我很抱歉……为那里发生的事。

english: Yes... Make sure you are well prepared, my child, then let me know when you are ready to depart.
translation: 好……确保你准备周全了，我的孩子，准备好出发时就告诉我。

english: Yes... Thank you...
Yes... Thanks to your work, I was able to create a toxin that will be quite deadly to her and her children. I suspect it will help with persuading her... if required.
translation: 没错……多亏了你，我才能制造出对她和她的孩子们相当致命的毒素。我怀疑这东西能在必要时帮助说服她……

english: Yes... Time is not on our side, but as long as we can stop Drakan before the moon fully rises, his festival need not come to be.
translation: 没错……时间不在我们这边，但只要能在月亮完全升起前阻止德拉肯，他的庆典就不会发生。

english: Yes... Trapping Drakan here in the short term makes perfect sense, but the question is what do we do about him in the longer term. Sugadinti believes that once trapped here, he will have no hope of escape.
translation: 没错...短期内将德拉肯困在此处完全合理，但问题在于长期该如何处置他。苏加丁提认为一旦他被困于此，便绝无逃脱的可能。

english: Yes... You should come to the Theatre again soon... You will be a fine meal...
translation: 好……你该很快再来剧院……会是一顿美餐……

english: You abandon your boat, resulting in it becoming lost at sea.
translation: 你遗弃了你的小船，导致它消失在了大海中。

english: You add the barrels.
translation: 你加上了桶。

english: You add the battered key to your key ring.
translation: 你把破旧的钥匙挂到了钥匙圈上。

english: You add the bone key to your key ring.
translation: 你把骨钥匙加到了钥匙环上。

english: You add the brass key to your key ring.
translation: 你把黄铜钥匙挂到了钥匙环上。

english: You add the crystal mine key to your key ring.
translation: 你将水晶矿井钥匙添加到了钥匙环上。

english: You add the dusty key to your key ring.
translation: 你把布满灰尘的钥匙添加到了钥匙环上。

english: You add the furnace.
translation: 你把熔炉加了进去。

english: You add the maze key to your key ring.
translation: 你把迷宫钥匙加到了钥匙环上。

english: You add the metal key to your key ring.
translation: 你将金属钥匙挂上了钥匙环。

english: You add the shiny key to your key ring.
translation: 你将闪亮的钥匙添加到了钥匙环上。

english: You add the stand.
translation: 你把支架加了上去。

english: You add the weapon store key to your key ring.
translation: 你将武器店钥匙添加到了钥匙圈上。

english: You add the wrought iron key to your key ring.
translation: 你将锻铁钥匙挂到了钥匙环上。

english: You already have a Death Charge pending on you.
translation: 你身上已有死亡充能效果。

english: You already have a copy.
translation: 你已经有一份了。

english: You already have a placeholder for that item.
translation: 你已经有了那个物品的占位符。

english: You already have enough balloon toads!
translation: 你已经有很多气球蟾蜍了！

english: You already have wizards to fight!
translation: 你已经有了要对付的巫师了！

english: You analyse the chemical vial made using a vial of blood
translation: 你分析了一支用血液瓶制成的化学药剂瓶。

english: You are about to give:
translation: 你即将交出：

english: You are already part of a team.
translation: 你已经加入了一个队伍。

english: You are forced out from underneath.
translation: 你被从下方强行挤了出来。

english: You are missing some of the materials needed to build this facility.
translation: 你缺少建造此设施所需的某些材料。

english: You are no longer eligible to lead the party.
translation: 你不再有资格带领队伍。

english: You are not to blame. In hindsight, we should have revealed ourselves to you. At the time though, it seemed too risky. We did not want there to be any chance of Drakan and his kin learning about our plans.
translation: 莫怪罪。事后看来，我们本应向你表明身份。可当时风险太大，我们绝不能让德莱坎那帮人窥得我们的计划。

english: You are teleported to a place of relative safety.
translation: 你被传送到了一个相对安全的地方。

english: You aren't holding any bones!
translation: 你手里没有拿着任何骨头！

english: You become surrounded by smoke clouds!
translation: 你被烟雾云包围了！

english: You begin to harvest the herb patch.
translation: 你开始收割这片草药田。

english: You board the boat and sail to Meiyerditch.
translation: 你登上船，驶往梅耶迪奇。

english: You board the boat and sail to Slepe.
translation: 你登上船，前往斯莱佩。

english: You board the boat and sail to the Icyene Graveyard.
translation: 你登上小船，驶向艾辛恩墓地。

english: You board your boat.
translation: 你登上了船。

english: You break the jar as you try to open it. You throw the shattered remains away.
translation: 你试图打开罐子时把它打破了。你把碎片扔掉。

english: You build a STASH unit.
translation: 你建造了一个STASH储藏单元。

english: You build a bank chest.
translation: 你建造了一个银行箱。

english: You bury the bones and feel a wave of gratitude from the spirit of Mosschin.
translation: 你将骨头埋入土中，感受到莫斯钦之灵传来的一阵感激之情。

english: You bury the bones and feel a wave of gratitude from the spirit of Redeyes.
translation: 你埋下了骨头，感受到红眼之灵传来的一阵感激之情。

english: You bury the bones and feel a wave of gratitude from the spirit of Snailfeet.
translation: 你埋下了骨头，感受到蜗脚精魂传来的感激之情。

english: You bury the bones and feel a wave of gratitude from the spirit of Snothead.
translation: 你埋下了骨头，感受到斯诺特海德的灵魂传来一阵感激之情。

english: You bury the bones and feel a wave of gratitude from the spirit of Strongbones.
translation: 你把骨头埋下，感受到斯特龙博恩斯之灵传来的一阵感激之情。

english: You bury the bones.
translation: 你埋下了骨头。

english: You can get another by searching the library beneath Paterdomus.
translation: 你可以在帕特多穆斯下方的图书馆里再找到一本。

english: You can only build a maximum of one teleport focus or related facility on your boat.
translation: 你的船上最多只能建造一个传送聚焦设施或相关设施。

english: You can only do that in building mode.
translation: 你只能在建筑模式下这么做。

english: You can only pick up the pets in your own house.
translation: 你只能在自己家中拾取宠物。

english: You can only plant oak saplings in a tree patch.
translation: 你只能在树坑里种橡树苗。

english: You can't autocast that spell with your current active spellbook.
translation: 你当前激活的法术书无法自动施放该法术。

english: You can't be an Attacker - there are too many assigned to that role.
translation: 你无法成为攻击者——该角色已分配太多人了。

english: You can't carry any more!
translation: 你拿不下了！

english: You can't climb over this part of the tree as there's something in the way on the other side of it.
translation: 你无法爬过树的这一部分，因为另一侧有东西挡着路。

english: You can't do that right now.
translation: 你现在不能这么做。

english: You can't load any more explosive eggs.
translation: 你不能再装更多爆炸蛋了。

english: You can't load any more poison eggs.
translation: 你不能再带更多毒蛋了。

english: You can't load any more stun eggs.
translation: 你不能再装填更多眩晕弹了。

english: You can't move the target outside of the gallery.
translation: 你不能将目标移动到展览厅外。

english: You can't recruit that player because they have Accept Aid switched off.
translation: 该玩家已关闭接受协助，你无法招募他。

english: You can't set up your prayers at the moment.
translation: 你目前无法设置祈祷。

english: You can't sign up <osrscn-name-0> because they are already leading another team.
translation: 无法报名 <osrscn-name-0>，因为他们已经在带领另一支队伍。

english: You can't sign up <osrscn-name-0> because they are already on another team.

translation: 你的胃不太舒服……但还是恢复了一些生命值。

translation: 你的超级抗火药剂即将失效。

translation: 你的小费罐是空的。

translation: 你身上的毒液抗性已消失，但你对毒药仍有抵抗力。

english: Your venom resistance is about to wear off.
translation: 你的毒抗即将消失。

english: Your vial has been filled.
translation: 你的小瓶已经装满了。

english: Your weapon is unsuitable to break the ice.
translation: 你的武器不适合破冰。

english: Your wish has been granted!
translation: 你的愿望已实现！

english: Yourself and 66vv have swapped places!
translation: 你和 66vv 已交换位置！

translation: 你和<osrscn-name-0>交换了位置！

translation: 你和Gigi Lai已经交换了位置！

english: Yup, suicide...
translation: 对啊，自杀……

english: Zaff has given me the Beacon Ring.
translation: 扎夫给了我一个信号戒指。

english: Zanik and I defeated Sigmund but he managed to escape using a ring of life.
translation: 我和扎尼可打败了西格蒙德，但他用生命戒指逃走了。

english: Zanik and I smashed Sigmund's drilling machine so that he could not use it to flood the city.
translation: 赞尼克和我砸碎了西格蒙德的钻机，让他无法用它来淹没城市。

english: Zanik has asked me to take her on a tour of Lumbridge. She is the first cave goblin to visit the surface.
translation: 赞尼克让我带她参观伦布里奇。她是第一个来到地表生活的洞穴哥布林。

english: Zanik talked to an ordinary goblin and was horrified at how violent their culture is.
translation: 赞尼克与一个普通哥布林交谈后，对其文化的暴虐程度感到震惊。

english: Zanik was amazed when she saw the sun for the first time.
translation: 赞尼克第一次见到太阳时，惊讶不已。

english: Zanik was fascinated by wooden tools in the general store, and bought some as souvenirs.
translation: 赞尼克对杂货店的木制工具很着迷，买了一些作纪念品。

english: Zorgoth had bred a deadly dragon called Galvek to use to wipe out humanity. Zorgoth and Galvek escaped, killing Dallas in the process.
translation: 佐戈斯培育了一条名为加尔维克的致命巨龙，试图用来消灭人类。佐戈斯与加尔维克逃脱，并在此过程中杀死了达拉斯。

english: |Collection Log Luck plugin: Unknown error calculating luck for item.
translation: 收藏日志幸运插件：计算物品幸运时发生未知错误。

english: (1) Blisterwood logs
translation: 水泡木原木

english: (5) Camphor hull parts
translation: 樟木船体部件

english: (Island) South of Draynor Village
translation: 德雷诺村南边的小岛

english: 1 : Lunar Isle
translation: 1: 月亮岛

english: 1: Tree Gnome Village
translation: 1: 地精村庄

english: 2: Gnome Stronghold
translation: 2: 地精要塞

english: 3: Ferox Enclave
translation: 3: 费罗飞地

english: 4: Fortis Colosseum
translation: 4: 福蒂斯竞技场

english: 5 : Seers' Village
translation: 5: 先知村

english: 5: Feldip Hills
translation: 5: 费迪普丘陵

english: 6: Barbarian Outpost
translation: 6: 野蛮人前哨站

english: 7: Corporeal Beast
translation: 7: 实体巨兽

english: 7: Port Sarim
translation: 7: 沙林港

english: 8: Tears of Guthix
translation: 8: 古斯之泪

english: 9: Wintertodt Camp
translation: 9: 寒冬营地

english: A : Grand Exchange
translation: A : 大交易所

english: A Master Crafter told me that a normal pot with a lid would be fine for transporting bone seeds.
translation: 一位制作大师告诉我，一个带盖的普通罐子就足够运输骨头种子了。

english: A guide for In Search of Knowledge has been opened in the Old School RuneScape Wiki.
translation: 已在 Old School RuneScape 维基中打开《寻找知识》指南。

english: A quick guide for Hopespear's Will has been opened in the Old School RuneScape Wiki.
translation: 已在 Old School RuneScape 维基中打开《霍普斯皮尔的遗愿》快速指南。

english: According to Milli Rehnison, Elena was captured and taken into a Plague House in the south east corner of the city.
translation: 据米莉.雷尼森所说，埃琳娜被俘并被带到了城市东南角的一间瘟疫房屋里。

english: According to the Account Guide, I should be proactive with my security to protect my account.
translation: 根据帐号导师的建议，我应该主动加强安全措施来保护我的帐号。

english: Adamant platebody:
translation: 精金胸甲:

english: After I gave the drunken dwarf his Kelda stout, he told me a very interesting tale!
translation: 在我给了那个醉酒的矮人他的凯尔达黑啤酒后，他给我讲了一个非常有趣的故事！

english: After I'd fetched a lot of bones for the Odd Old Man, near the Limestone Mine, he asked me to fetch some more. They were written on his wish list.
translation: 在我为石灰石矿附近的怪异老人收集了大量骨头后，他又让我去收集更多。这些骨头都写在他的愿望清单上。

english: After bypassing the traps and security inside the mansion I was able to reclaim the totem, and take it back to Kangai Mau, who rewarded me for all of my help.
translation: 绕过豪宅内的陷阱和安保后，我成功取回了图腾，并将其带回给康盖.毛，他因我的所有帮助而奖励了我。

english: After helping Brother Aimeri I asked him why he came to The Forthos Dungeon, he said that he came in search for knowledge regarding Ralos and Ranul, the sun and moon gods.
translation: 帮助艾梅里修士后，我问他为何来到福索斯地牢，他说他是来寻找关于太阳神拉洛斯和月亮神拉努尔的知识。

english: After numerous references to my supposed cat habit, I have managed to ship Fenkenstrain over to Mos Le'Harmless, where he will be picked up by Brother Tranquility.
translation: 在多次被提及我所谓的养猫习惯后，我成功将芬肯斯特兰运送到了莫斯勒哈姆斯岛，他将在那里被宁静修士接走。

english: After slaying the Prince, the Mother Mallum appeared and announced her plans for world domination. Thankfully, Savant removed me to safety. However, the Sea Slug Queen has escaped. I wonder what her next action will be.
translation: 杀死王子后，马勒姆母亲出现并宣布了她统治世界的计划。幸好学者将我转移到了安全的地方。然而，海蛞蝓女王逃走了。不知道她下一步会做什么。

english: After that Fairy Nuff asked me to mix up a potion of Magic Essence, which I gave to the Fairy Queen.
translation: 之后，仙子纳夫让我调配一瓶魔法精华药水，我把它交给了仙子女王。

english: Aldo gives you some Antique lamps for Scurrius' spines.
translation: 奥尔多用斯库里乌斯的脊柱换给你一些古董灯。

english: Allows access to Temple of Ikov.
translation: 允许进入伊科夫神殿。

english: Along with Baxtorian, I confronted Lord Iorwerth and Arianwyn in the Temple of Light. We managed to convince Arianwyn to turn on Lord Iorwerth. However, just as Arianwyn attacked him, he managed to free the Fragment of Seren.
translation: 我和巴克斯托里安一起，在光之殿堂与伊尔沃斯领主和阿里安温对峙。我们成功说服阿里安温背叛伊尔沃斯领主。然而，就在阿里安温攻击他时，他设法释放了塞伦碎片。

english: Alternative cost: Facility bottle (full) x 1 (Containing this facility)
translation: 替代费用: 设施瓶 (满) x 1 (包含此设施)

english: Although the Kourend Council was unable to help, Mori suggested that Lord Trobin Arceuus might be able to. She asked me to speak to him within the Tower of Magic.
translation: 尽管库兰德议会无法提供帮助，但莫里建议托宾.阿西乌斯领主或许可以。她让我去魔法塔内与他交谈。

english: Although we learnt a lot from Ranis' memories, they still didn't reveal how Verzik gained her unique abilities. With no other options available, we had to enter the Theatre of Blood to extract some of Verzik's own memories instead.
translation: 虽然我们从拉尼斯的记忆中了解了很多，但仍未揭示维兹克是如何获得她独特能力的。别无选择，我们只能进入血腥剧场来提取维兹克自己的记忆。

english: Anna betrayed me! She and her brother plotted to use me to free Anna and then lured me into Camelot. Then Morgan Le Faye showed up and threw me in her dungeon.
translation: 安娜背叛了我！她和她的兄弟密谋利用我来解救安娜，然后把我引诱到卡美洛。接着摩根.勒菲出现，把我扔进了她的地牢。

english: Anti-dragon shield or DFS
translation: 防龙盾或 DFS

english: Anyway, after talking to a few more characters I found that I should follow the sequence of sickle symbols in order to find the Myreque hideout. In the end, it was pretty difficult to find, but I managed it. I talked to a someone in there called Vertida. He was so pleased that I had come, it was amazing. He asked me to get a message back through to Veliaf. I felt that I couldn't really refuse so I headed back to Burgh de Rott.
translation: 总之，在和其他几个角色交谈后，我发现应该按照镰刀符号的顺序来寻找迈雷克藏身处。最后，虽然很难找，但我还是找到了。我和里面一个叫维蒂达的人谈了话。他对我到来非常高兴，这太棒了。他让我带个口信回去给维利亚夫。我觉得无法拒绝，于是返回了伯格德罗特镇。

english: Archaeologist Camp: Bank booth Fossil cleaning benches Loom Cooking range Spinning wheel Water well
translation: 考古学家营地: 银行柜台 化石清洁台 织布机 烹饪炉灶 纺车 水井

english: Arianwyn informed me that elves in service to Lord Iorwerth had gained access to West Ardougne by disguising themselves as Mourners.
translation: 阿里安温告诉我，为伊尔沃斯领主效力的精灵们通过伪装成哀悼者进入了西阿多尼城。

english: Arsen the Thief told me he had been exploring a cave to the west of the cove. In there, he found fearsome ogres. He quickly stole an artefact from them, and fled. When the curse began, Arsen thought the ogres had cursed him for stealing a sacred relic from them.
translation: 盗贼阿森告诉我，他一直在探索海湾西边的一个洞穴。在那里，他发现了可怕的食人魔。他迅速从他们那里偷走了一件文物，然后逃走了。诅咒开始时，阿森以为是食人魔因为他偷了他们的神圣遗物而诅咒了他。

english: As I said before, my hope is that I can convince this Nylocas Queen to willingly join with us. However, it is very possible she will resist... at least at first.
translation: 正如我之前所说，我希望我能说服这只尼洛卡斯蛛后自愿加入我们。不过，她很有可能会反抗……至少一开始会。

english: As I traveled further into the caves, I started to hear a Mysterious Voice calling out to me. I came across some Doors which led into a great cavern.
translation: 当我深入洞穴时，开始听到一个神秘声音在呼唤我。我遇到了一些门，通向一个巨大的洞穴。

english: As soon as I found him in Brimhaven, My Arm rushed off into the jungle by himself. I found him again just outside Tai Bwo Wannai Village. My Arm told me that Burntmeat was planning to give me some burnt meat as a reward for all my help - this didn't sound good! I told My Arm what I thought of burnt meat as a quest reward, and he said he'd try to think of something better to give me.
translation: 我一在布尔哈文镇找到他，“我的手臂”就独自冲进了丛林。我在泰博瓦纳村外再次找到了他。“我的手臂”告诉我，烧肉打算给我一些烧焦的肉作为我所有帮助的奖励——这听起来可不太好！我告诉“我的手臂”我对烧焦的肉作为任务奖励的看法，他说他会试着想点更好的东西给我。

english: Aside from acting very strangely, Brother Maledict has informed me that the ritual to restore the Mother Mallum's prison is contained within his holy book. However, the relevant pages have been stolen. I should go looking for them.
translation: 除了行为非常古怪外，马勒迪克特修士还告诉我，恢复马勒姆母亲监狱的仪式记载在他的圣典中。然而，相关的书页被偷了。我应该去寻找它们。

english: At the Excavation, one of the Guards we defeated revealed to us that he, along with everyone else there, had been hypnotised by the Devourer, the Menaphite Goddess of Destruction. Apparently, she was using the citizens to find an Ancient Tomb. She had already entered this Tomb before we arrived, but the entrance had been blocked again. The Guard also mentioned that Pharaoh Kemesis of Menaphos was somehow involved, along with some Scabarites from some Ruins to the north east of the Necropolis.
translation: 在挖掘场，我们击败的一名守卫向我们透露，他和那里的其他人一样，都被吞噬者——梅纳菲特的毁灭女神——催眠了。显然，她利用市民来寻找一座古代坟墓。在我们到达之前，她已经进入了这座坟墓，但入口又被堵住了。守卫还提到，梅纳菲特的法老凯米西斯也以某种方式参与了进来，还有一些来自大墓地东北部废墟的斯卡巴教徒。

english: At the Legless Faun Pub, I found another Panel with a Riddle behind it. As I found the Riddle, Martin was arrested by Tomas Lawry.
translation: 在瘸腿牧神酒馆，我发现了另一块镶板，后面藏着一个谜语。当我找到谜语时，马丁被托马斯.劳里逮捕了。

english: At the Shack, I found Rose in a comatose state being looked after by Councillor Orson. Upon confronting him, he admitted that the Kourend Council was responsible for the death of King Kharedst IV. He also confessed that they poisoned Rose after she found out, leading to her current state. I reported this to Commander Fullore and she came to see for herself.
translation: 在小屋里，我发现玫瑰处于昏迷状态，由奥森议员照顾。与他对质时，他承认库兰德议会对卡雷德斯四世国王的死负有责任。他还供认，在玫瑰发现真相后，他们毒害了她，导致她现在的状况。我将此事报告给了富洛尔指挥官，她亲自前来查看。

english: At the meeting, Pharaoh Kemesis himself arrived to announce the end of the Menaphos quarantine. However, he said it would take some time for the city to be reopened. With our work done, Maisa returned to the Necropolis to prepare for the confrontation with the Devourer.
translation: 会议上，法老凯米西斯亲自宣布解除美纳菲斯的隔离。不过他说城市重新开放还需要一些时间。任务完成后，麦莎返回大墓地准备对抗吞噬者。

english: B: Farming Guild
translation: B: 农业公会

english: Barb Plant Pot Smashing
translation: 野蛮人花盆砸碎

english: Barbarian Assault Reward Shop
translation: 野蛮人突袭奖励商店

english: Based on what we found, we determined that the Underwater Temple we discovered was once called the Temple of the Eye and was used to house a powerful artefact known as The Eye.
translation: 根据我们的发现，我们确定发现的水下神殿曾被称为眼之神殿，用于存放一件名为'眼'的强大文物。

english: Before I could help him, I was attacked by three Strange Creatures, but I was able to fight them off. With them dealt with, I helped Antos get back to Auburnvale.
translation: 在我能帮他之前，我遭到了三个奇怪生物的袭击，但我成功击退了它们。解决它们后，我帮助安托斯回到了奥本维尔。

english: Before we could inspect it, we were interrupted by the arrival of Dr Banikan. He revealed himself to actually be Azzanadra, a Zarosian Mahjarrat. He also revealed the Horn to be a powerful artefact known as the Elder Horn. We were then interrupted once more by the arrival of Hazeel, Enakhra and Akthanakos. Sensing another presence in the room, Enakhra cast a spell, revealing Asgarnia to actually be Sliske, another Mahjarrat. Sliske revealed he'd been manipulating me into helping him claim the Elder Horn, and that Wizard Persten, Ketla, Kasonde and the Assassin were all in fact him in disguise.
translation: 我们还没来得及检查，就被巴尼坎博士的到来打断了。他透露自己实际上是阿扎纳德拉，一位扎罗西亚的玛哈加特。他还透露号角是一件名为'长老号角'的强大文物。接着我们再次被打断，哈兹尔、伊纳克拉和阿克塔纳科斯到来。伊纳克拉察觉到房间里有另一个存在，施法揭露阿斯加尼亚实际上是斯利斯克，另一位玛哈加特。斯利斯克透露他一直操纵我帮他夺取长老号角，而魔法师佩尔斯滕、凯特拉、卡松德和刺客其实都是他假扮的。

english: Before you is Safalaan Hallow, son of Efaritay Hallow. Her icyene blood runs through his veins. That blood contains the power to take us home.
translation: 你面前的是萨法兰.哈洛，埃法里泰.哈洛之子。冰精灵的血脉在他血管中流淌。那血液蕴含着带我们回家的力量。

english: Blasidar the sculptor asked me to get several things for his model, so that he can start on the rebuilding of the statue.
translation: 雕塑家布拉西达让我为他的模型找几样东西，这样他就能开始重建雕像了。

english: Bob was unable to remember anything from his life as Robert the Strong and The Sphinx could not assist us. However, the Oneiromancer of Lunar Isle suggested that we could use a shared dream to unlock Bob's memories.
translation: 鲍勃记不起任何作为强者罗伯特时的往事，斯芬克斯也无法帮助我们。不过月亮岛的梦境法师建议我们可以用共享梦境来解锁鲍勃的记忆。

english: Both Jorral and Savant reckon that this threat is very, very old. Savant has been able to research the Mother Mallum and will let me know some more information in due time.
translation: 乔拉尔和学者都认为这个威胁非常非常古老。学者已经能研究马勒姆母亲，并会在适当时候告诉我更多信息。

english: Bought: Camphor hull parts
translation: 已购买: 樟木船体部件

english: Brother Brace taught me about the Prayer skill. It can provide a number of benefits to my regular activities, but costs prayer points which can be restored at any altar or holy site. I can train it by burying bones and scattering ashes.
translation: 布雷斯修士教会了我祈祷技能。它能为我的日常活动提供多种增益，但会消耗祈祷点数，可在任何祭坛或圣地恢复。我可以通过埋葬骨头和撒播灰烬来训练它。

english: Brother Kojo was grateful for all my help and rewarded me.
translation: 科乔修士感谢我的帮助并奖励了我。

english: Brother Maledict.
translation: 马勒迪克特修士。

english: Brother Omad asked me to recover a child's blanket. I found the secret cave and gave back the blanket.
translation: 奥马德修士让我找回一条儿童毯。我找到了秘密洞穴并归还了毯子。

english: Burntmeat asked me to escort My Arm to Weiss, by sea, to teach the Weiss trolls about the inventions of the Stronghold trolls.
translation: 烧肉让我护送'我的手臂'经海路前往韦斯，教韦斯的巨魔们要塞巨魔的发明。

english: Burntmeat wanted me to teach My Arm to farm. He promised me that if I could teach My Arm to grow goutweed in the Troll Stronghold, he'd never cook another human in his life. It sounded like a tough job, but since I'd apparently got the chance to save countless helpless victims from his cooking pot, I simply had to try it!
translation: 烧肉想让我教'我的手臂'种地。他承诺如果我能教会'我的手臂'在巨魔要塞种痛风草，他这辈子再也不烹饪人类了。听起来是个艰巨的任务，但既然有机会拯救无数无辜受害者免于他的烹饪锅，我非得试试不可！

english: Buying: Black boater
translation: 求购: 黑色船工帽

english: Cabin Boy Colin thought the curse might have come because he offended a mermaid he saw through Ithoi's telescope.
translation: 船舱侍应科林认为诅咒可能是因为他冒犯了通过伊索伊望远镜看到的美人鱼。

english: Captain Braindeath has given me a Wrench and told me to sort it out. I should check amongst the Brewers to see which of them can bless it for me.
translation: 脑死亡酿酒厂厂长给了我一把扳手，让我去处理。我应该检查一下酿酒师们，看谁能帮我祝福它。

english: Captain Braindeath has told me to fish with a Fishbowl and Big Net in the Squid Fishing Spot. Whatever 5 Sea Creatures I dredge up are to be put into a barrel and pressurised.
translation: 脑死亡酿酒厂厂长让我用鱼缸和大网在鱿鱼钓鱼点钓鱼。捞上来的5种海洋生物要放进木桶加压。

english: Captured wind mote x 1 (Not consumed)
translation: 被捕获的风力微粒 x 1 (未消耗)

english: Commander Fullore and I travelled to Councillor Hughes' home in Kingstown to search for evidence on where she might have gone. Tomas Lawry, a bureaucrat for the Kourend Council, was already there conducting his own investigation.
translation: 富洛尔指挥官和我前往金斯敦的休斯议员的家中，寻找她可能去向的证据。库兰德王国的官僚托马斯.劳里已经在那里进行自己的调查。

english: Commander Fullore rejoined me at Port Piscarilius. Together, we waited for Councillor Hughes to show up. Soon enough, Councillor Hughes arrived to board Veos' ship. As we confronted her, she made some interesting claims about the Kourend Council and the things they did to a man and a girl.
translation: 富洛尔指挥官在皮斯卡里琉斯港与我汇合。我们一起等待休斯议员现身。不久，休斯议员到达准备登上维奥斯的船。我们对峙时，她说了些关于库兰德议会以及他们对一个男人和一个女孩所做的事的有趣言论。

english: Concerned about Councillor Hughes' last words, Commander Fullore asked me to meet her south of the castle. There, she asked me to investigate what was said, believing that Councillor Hughes may have been referring to King Kharedst IV, the last King of Great Kourend, and his daughter, Rose.
translation: 富洛尔指挥官对休斯议员的遗言感到担忧，让我在城堡南边见她。在那里，她让我调查那些话，认为休斯议员可能指的是大库兰德的末代国王卡雷斯特四世和他的女儿玫瑰。

english: Cupronickel bar x 2
translation: 白铜锭 x 2

english: Cyrisus told me to go speak with the Oneiromancer. If I remember correctly, she's on the south side of Lunar Isle, next to the Astral Altar.
translation: 西里苏斯让我去找梦境法师谈谈。如果我没记错，她在月亮岛南侧，星界祭坛旁边。

english: D: Ranging Guild
translation: D: 射手公会

english: Death's Coffer: Empty
translation: 死神的保险箱: 空

english: Deposited 1 dose of Divine super combat potion(1).
translation: 存入1剂神圣超级战斗药水 (1)。

english: Deposited 2 doses of Stamina potion(1).
translation: 存入2剂耐力药水 (1)。

english: Do you think the Nylocas Queen's help will be enough?
translation: 你觉得尼洛卡斯蛛后的帮助够吗？

english: Drezel, a priest of Saradomin, asked me to look for the druid Filliman Tarlock in the swamps of Mort Myre. However Filliman had been slain and appeared as a ghost. After pesuading Filliman that he was in fact dead I helped him to make a transformation into a Nature Spirit.
translation: 萨拉多明的祭司德雷泽尔让我去莫特梅尔沼泽寻找德鲁伊菲利曼.塔洛克。但菲利曼已被杀害，以幽灵形态出现。在说服菲利曼他已经死了之后，我帮助他转变成了自然之灵。

english: Dusty key, or another way to get into the deep Taverley Dungeon
translation: 布满灰尘的钥匙，或者进入塔韦利地牢深处的其他方法

english: Even before considering the Nylocas Queen, we very much have the numbers on our side.
translation: 即使不考虑尼洛卡斯蛛后，我们在数量上也占很大优势。

english: Eventually, Sugadinti and the Nylocas Queen emerged, revealing they had made a deal that would see her join us in the fight against Drakan. At that moment, we were informed that the others had found Vanescula and Safalaan at a Ruined Building north east of Burgh de Rott.
translation: 最终，苏加丁提和尼洛卡斯蛛后出现，透露他们达成了一项协议，她会加入我们对抗德拉肯的战斗。就在这时，我们得知其他人在伯格德罗特镇东北的一座废墟建筑中找到了瓦内斯库拉和萨法兰。

english: Eventually, Sugadinti and the Nylocas Queen emerged, revealing they had made a deal that would see her join us in the fight against Drakan. At that moment, we were informed that the others had found Vanescula and Safalaan at a Ruined Building north east of Burgh de Rott. I should head over there right away.
translation: 最终，苏加丁提和尼洛卡斯蛛后出现，透露他们达成了一项协议，她会加入我们对抗德拉肯的战斗。就在这时，我们得知其他人在伯格德罗特镇东北的一座废墟建筑中找到了瓦内斯库拉和萨法兰。我应该立刻赶过去。

english: F: Mining Guild
translation: F: 采矿公会

english: Father Aereck asked me to help him deal with the Ghost in the graveyard next to the church.
translation: 艾瑞克神父让我帮他处理教堂旁墓地的幽灵。

english: Father Aereck told Zanik about the gods. The Dorgeshuun fear and hate the gods but Zanik is trying to keep an open mind.
translation: 艾瑞克神父向扎尼克讲述了众神的事。多格舒恩族恐惧并憎恨众神，但扎尼克试图保持开放的心态。

english: Fine. I need to make some arrangements here first, but then I'll head over there. If we end up getting separated, I've left a fair bit of equipment with Old Man Ral upstairs. Speak to him if you need anything.
translation: 好吧。我得先在这里做些安排，然后就去那边。如果我们走散了，我在楼上老人拉尔那里留了不少装备。需要什么就去找他。

english: Following the execution of King Lathas, Elena and I were kidnapped by Lord Iorwerth. However, before he could have us killed, Arianwyn managed to free us. During our escape, Lord Iorwerth claimed that the Dark Lord was a lie. Instead, he told us that they were trying to summon a fragment of Seren, the elven goddess.
translation: 拉萨斯国王被处决后，我和埃琳娜被伊尔沃斯领主绑架了。但在他要处决我们之前，阿里安温设法救了我们。逃跑时，伊尔沃斯领主声称黑暗领主是个谎言。他反而告诉我们，他们试图召唤精灵女神塞伦的一块碎片。

english: For my first adventure on my new Raft, Junior Jim suggested I pick up some Cargo from Port Sarim for him.
translation: 为了我的新木筏的第一次冒险，小吉姆建议我去沙林港帮他取些货物。

english: Fox explained to me that he was attacked whilst on route to trade with Atza in Outer Fortis. He asked me to go to her on his behalf while he recovered from his injuries. He gave me the Fur Sample that he took from Kiko's Bed to give to her.
translation: 狐狸告诉我，他在前往福蒂斯外围与阿特扎交易的路上遭到了袭击。他请我代他去见她，而他则养伤。他给了我他从奇科的床上取来的毛皮样本，让我交给她。

english: Gawain told me it was the work of Morgan Le Faye.
translation: 高文告诉我这是摩根.勒菲干的。

english: Gnocci the Cook thought the curse might have come because he awakened a possessed doll he found while fishing. He buried the doll in the sand but was afraid that its possessor might have cursed them.
translation: 厨师格诺基认为诅咒可能是因为他唤醒了钓鱼时发现的一个被附身的玩偶。他把玩偶埋在了沙子里，但担心附身者可能诅咒了他们。

english: Gnocci the Cook told me that the Ithoi had prepared the meal that the crew ate immediately before becoming sick, though Ithoi himself did not eat that meal.
translation: 厨师格诺基告诉我，伊索伊准备了船员们生病前吃的那顿饭，但伊索伊自己没吃。

english: Grand Exchange: Finished selling 1 x Anguish ornament kit.
translation: 大交易所: 已完成出售 1 个痛苦装饰套件。

english: H: Cooking Guild
translation: H: 厨师公会

english: Hallowed marks. The old currency of Hallowvale. When Sugadinti and I first managed to send one of his disciples to my former home, I made sure that gathering these was their first priority.
translation: 圣印。哈洛维尔过去的货币。当苏加丁蒂和我第一次成功将他的一名弟子送到我以前的家乡时，我确保收集这些是他们的首要任务。

english: Having met Terrova, I was instructed to cast Wind Strike on one of his chickens. Fortunately, my magical prowess allowed me to successfully achieve this.
translation: 见过特罗瓦后，我奉命对他的其中一只鸡施放风弹术。幸运的是，我的魔法造诣让我成功做到了。

english: Having reobtained the Orb of Light, Lord Iorwerth had everything he needed to to enter the Temple of Light and free the Fragment of Seren. In a final attempt to stop him, it was decided that we would mount a defence at the Dwarf Camp in the Underground Pass.
translation: 重新获得光宝珠后，伊尔沃斯领主拥有了进入光之神殿并释放塞伦碎片所需的一切。为了做最后的阻止，我们决定在地下通道的矮人营地组织防御。

english: Having spoken to Olaf Hradson, I have agreed to help him convince his family that he is a good navigator.
translation: 与奥拉夫.赫拉德森交谈后，我同意帮助他说服家人他是个好航海家。

english: Hazeel suspected that half of this Crest was stolen from the Carnillean Mansion when Ceril Carnillean was killed. Hazeel then told me that the other half was in possession of a Mahjarrat who he believed could be hidden nearby.
translation: 哈兹尔怀疑这枚徽章的一半是在塞里尔.卡尼利安被杀时从卡尼利安庄园偷走的。哈兹尔随后告诉我，另一半在一个玛哈加特手中，他相信此人可能藏在附近。

english: Hazelmere took the bark sample and gave me a message that I translated and passed on to King Narnode. It seems that Daconia rocks are killing the Grand Tree!
translation: 黑兹尔米尔拿走了树皮样本，给了我一条信息，我翻译后转交给了纳诺德国王。看来达科尼亚石正在杀死大树家园！

english: He accepted me as a part of the Shadow Realm because I was dressed in my ghostly outfit and I could talk to ghosts, but he said he couldn't trust me without an endorsement from the Sin Seer.
translation: 他接纳我成为阴影领域的一员，因为我穿着幽灵装束，还能和幽灵说话，但他说没有罪孽先知的认可，他无法信任我。

english: He asked me to go to Draynor Village and fetch the Wise Old Man to fight off the trolls.
translation: 他让我去德雷诺村请老智者来击退巨魔。

english: He said Old Man Yarlo lived in the south-east of Varrock, west of Aubury's Rune Shop.
translation: 他说老人亚洛住在维洛克城东南部，奥布里符石店的西边。

english: He told me he'd got an assistant called My Arm!
translation: 他告诉我他有个叫'我的手臂'的助手！

english: He told me that the Fairy Queen had lost her magical essence and that I would have to kill the Tanglefoot to get it back.
translation: 他告诉我仙子女王失去了她的魔法精华，我必须杀死缠足怪才能夺回来。

english: Herman Caranos and the Wise Old Man were very impressed by my defeat of the Sea Troll Queen.
translation: 赫尔曼.卡拉诺斯和老智者对我击败海巨魔女王印象深刻。

english: Herman Caranos told me that the Piscatoris Fishing Colony is under attack from sea trolls. I was feeling kind, so I offered to help save the Colony.
translation: 赫尔曼.卡拉诺斯告诉我皮斯卡托里斯渔村正遭受海巨魔的攻击。我心存善意，主动提出帮助拯救渔村。

english: Herman and the Wise Old Man had developed a plan that required an army! They sent me to Yanille to ask Wizard Frumscone if he could lend us his magic zombies.
translation: 赫尔曼和老智者制定了一个需要军队的计划！他们派我去亚尼勒城，请法师弗鲁姆斯科恩把他的魔法僵尸借给我们。

english: Herman took the pot of bone seeds. The Wise Old Man wasn't happy when he heard we were using bone seeds, but they were the best chance we had.
translation: 赫尔曼拿走了那罐骨头种子。老智者听说我们要用骨头种子时很不高兴，但这是我们最好的机会了。

english: High Priest Bighead told me more about Yu'biusk. However, he couldn't tell me how to get there. He suggested that his predecessor, Snothead, might know.
translation: 大头大祭司告诉我更多关于尤比斯克的事。但他也不知道怎么去那里。他建议他的前任斯诺黑德可能知道。

english: However, a vampyre guard called Desmodus Lasiurus stopped me. He agreed to grant me access if I found out what happened to some slaves that were being delivered to him.
translation: 但一个叫德斯莫杜斯.拉西乌鲁斯的吸血鬼守卫拦住了我。他同意让我通行，前提是我要查明一些本该送到他那里的奴隶发生了什么。

english: However, he vowed to kill me himself to avenge Bouncer. I defeated him, but was unable to kill him. I then returned to Lady Servil and she thanked me for saving her family.
translation: 但他发誓要亲手杀了我为保镖报仇。我击败了他，但没能杀死他。然后我回到塞尔维尔夫人那里，她感谢我救了她的家人。

english: However, while explaining it to me, his mother, Queen Zyanyi Arkan, arrived and admonished him for failing to stop the attack on the Teomat. Itzla then directed me to meet with a Contact of his in Quetzacalli Gorge.
translation: 然而，在他向我解释时，他的母亲齐安伊.阿坎女王赶到，斥责他未能阻止对特奥马特修道院的袭击。伊茨拉随后让我去克察卡利峡谷见他的一个联系人。

english: I agreed to assist Tomas Lawry in his hunt for the Saviours of Kourend and their mysterious leader, the Queen of Thieves.
translation: 我同意协助托马斯.劳里追捕库兰德救世主及其神秘领袖盗贼女王。

english: I agreed to help Kangai Mau on Brimhaven recover the tribal totem stolen from his village by Lord Handelmort.
translation: 我同意帮助布尔哈文镇的康盖.毛找回被汉德尔莫特领主从他村庄偷走的部落图腾。

english: I agreed to help the Tasakaal by freeing a Trapped Soul. I found the Ancient Grave that the Soul was contained in.
translation: 我同意帮助塔斯卡阿尔族释放一个被困的灵魂。我找到了那个灵魂所在的古代坟墓。

english: I asked for both and the Odd Old Man kindly obliged.
translation: 我两样都要，怪异的老人欣然答应了。

english: I asked the Apothecary for a suitable potion for the Wise Old Man. This required some cadava berries.
translation: 我向药剂师要一种适合老智者的药水。这需要一些卡达瓦莓。

english: I asked the Wise Old Man if he'd save the Colony. He said he'd do it, but this would be his last great adventure - his 'swan song'. He then made me fetch him a load of expensive runes.
translation: 我问老智者是否愿意拯救殖民地。他说他会做，但这将是他最后一次伟大的冒险——他的'天鹅之歌'。然后他让我去给他弄一堆昂贵的符文。

english: I built the coffin in the Wise Old Man's house.
translation: 我在老智者的房子里造好了棺材。

english: I can now get access to all the features of Shilo Village.
translation: 我现在可以使用希洛村的所有功能了。

english: I can start this quest by inspecting the fallen man, in the mines on the north of Lunar Isle. There should be a tunnel leading to him.
translation: 我可以通过在月亮岛北部的矿井里检查那个堕落者来开始这个任务。应该有一条隧道通向那里。

english: I can start this quest by talking to Sarius Guile in the Icyene Graveyard.
translation: 我可以通过在冰原墓地与萨里乌斯.盖尔交谈来开始这个任务。

english: I can take my Seal of Passage to Lokar so I can head to Lunar Isle.
translation: 我可以把我的通行印章带给洛卡尔，这样我就能前往月亮岛了。

english: I confronted Evelot and asked her what she knew about Ceril Carnillean's murder. She admitted to being at the Carnillean Mansion, but claimed to know nothing about his death.
translation: 我质问埃韦洛特，问她关于塞里尔.卡尼利安谋杀案知道些什么。她承认当时在卡尼利安庄园，但声称对他的死一无所知。

english: I confronted and distracted all three of the Moons of Peril, allowing Eyatlalli to complete the ritual. With the Moons of Peril contained, Cam Torum is now safe. However, Eyatlalli promised me further rewards if I assist her in keeping them imprisoned.
translation: 我面对并分散了所有三个灾厄之月的注意力，让埃亚特拉利完成了仪式。灾厄之月被封印后，卡姆托鲁姆现在安全了。不过，埃亚特拉利承诺如果我帮她继续囚禁它们，还会有更多奖励。

english: I confronted the Queen of Thieves who revealed herself to actually be the ruler of Port Piscarilius, Lady Shauna Piscarilius. She revealed that she created the Saviours of Kourend to fight against the corruption of Kourend's ruling class. She asked me to break into the home of Councillor Hughes and steal some incriminating documents.
translation: 我面对了盗贼女王，她透露自己实际上是皮斯卡里琉斯港的统治者皮斯卡里琉斯夫人肖娜。她透露她创建库兰德救世主是为了对抗库兰德统治阶级的腐败。她让我闯入议员休斯的家，偷走一些罪证文件。

english: I defeated the Black Knight Titan with Excalibur's power.Once past the Titan I entered the Grail Castle.
translation: 我用圣剑的力量击败了黑骑士泰坦。穿过泰坦后，我进入了圣杯城堡。

english: I didn't let that get to me, though. I soldiered on and met with King Roald, asking if he could help support the Myreque in their fight against Drakan. Unfortunately, his new advisor reminded him of some Guthixian edicts which meant that all King Roald could do was enact a 'mercenary protocol'. Oh well, it might get some more sword-hands into Morytania and that can't be a bad thing.
translation: 不过我没让那事影响我。我继续前进，见到了罗尔德国王，问他能否支持迈雷克对抗德雷坎。不幸的是，他的新顾问提醒他一些古辛教令，这意味着罗尔德国王只能启动'雇佣兵协议'。唉，至少能给莫利塔尼亚带来更多剑手，这总不是坏事。

english: I discovered that the Fairy Queen was missing. The Fairy Godfather told me that she was extremely sick.
translation: 我发现仙子女王失踪了。仙子教父告诉我她病得很重。

english: I encountered Sarius Guile, the former servant of Vanescula Drakan, in the Icyene Graveyard. She told me that Lowerniel Drakan had both Vanescula and Safalaan Hallow as his prisoners, and that he had ordered all vampyres to attend a gathering outside Castle Drakan.
translation: 我在冰原墓地遇到了范尼斯库拉.德雷坎的前仆从萨里乌斯.盖尔。她告诉我洛厄尼尔.德雷坎把范尼斯库拉和萨法兰.哈洛都囚禁了，并且他命令所有吸血鬼到德雷坎城堡外集合。

english: I encountered Sarius Guile, the former servant of Vanescula Drakan, in the Icyene Graveyard. She told me that Lowerniel Drakan has both Vanescula and Safalaan Hallow as his prisoners, and that he has ordered all vampyres to attend a gathering outside Castle Drakan. I should head for the Myreque Hideout below Old Man Ral's home in Meiyerditch and discuss this with Ivan Strom.
translation: 我在冰原墓地遇到了范尼斯库拉.德雷坎的前仆从萨里乌斯.盖尔。她告诉我洛厄尼尔.德雷坎把范尼斯库拉和萨法兰.哈洛都囚禁了，并且他命令所有吸血鬼到德雷坎城堡外集合。我应该前往迈尔迪奇老人拉尔家下方的迈雷克藏身处，与伊万.斯特罗姆讨论此事。

english: I entered Draynor Manor and found Count Draynor in the basement. However, I was able to use the Stake that Dr Harlow gave me to kill him for good.
translation: 我进入了德雷诺庄园，在地下室找到了德雷诺伯爵。不过，我用哈洛博士给我的木桩彻底杀死了他。

english: I entered The Warrens and discovered the headquarters of the Saviours of Kourend. However, I was been denied access by Devan Rutter. He agreed to grant me entry into the headquarters if I could prove my loyalty to the Saviours of Kourend by killing Conrad King, a rival gang member.
translation: 我进入沃伦斯，发现了库兰德救世主的总部。但德文.拉特拒绝让我进入。他同意让我进入总部，前提是我能通过杀死敌对帮派成员康拉德.金来证明我对库兰德救世主的忠诚。

english: I entered a set of caves east of Land's End and found Artur Hosidius. Together, we recovered the Royal Accord of Twill.
translation: 我进入兰兹角村以东的一组洞穴，找到了阿图尔.霍西迪乌斯。我们一起找回了特威尔皇家协议。

english: I entered the Abyss and threw a Bucket of Water over the Dark Mage like the Mage of Zamorak requested.
translation: 我进入深渊，按照扎莫拉克法师的要求，把一桶水泼向黑暗法师。

english: I entered the Upper Chamber of the Tomb and found the High Priest of Scabaras under the Devourer's control. He called upon the Champion of Scabaras to attack me, but I defeated them. I then freed the High Priest.
translation: 我进入坟墓的上层密室，发现斯卡巴拉斯大祭司被吞噬者控制。他召唤斯卡巴拉斯冠军勇士攻击我，但我击败了他们。然后我解放了大祭司。

english: I escorted the Wise Old Man into the Colony and introduced him to Herman.
translation: 我护送老智者进入殖民地，把他介绍给赫尔曼。

english: I explored the Ancient Ruin and was able to add some missing Translations to the Translation List. I then used them to decipher some of the writing on the Stone Tablet.
translation: 我探索了古代遗迹，并在翻译清单上添加了一些缺失的翻译。然后我用它们破译了石板上的一些文字。

english: I explored the Ancient Temple and found the Stone of Jas.
translation: 我探索了古代神殿，找到了贾斯之石。

english: I explored the Ruin and was able to add some more missing Translations to the Translation List. I then used them to decipher some of the writing on the third Stone Tablet.
translation: 我探索了遗迹，并在翻译清单上添加了更多缺失的翻译。然后我用它们破译了第三块石板上的一些文字。

english: I fixed the cannon and got a mould for Captain Lawgof.
translation: 我修好了大炮，并为劳戈夫船长弄到了一个模具。

english: I fought alongside the armies of Gielinor and together we managed to defeat Zorgoth and Galvek. However, Bob was killed by Galvek during the battle. I returned to Alec Kincade who granted me full access to the Myths' Guild.
translation: 我与吉列诺的军队并肩作战，我们共同击败了佐戈斯和加尔维克。但鲍勃在战斗中被加尔维克杀死。我回到亚历克.金凯德那里，他授予我神话公会的完全访问权限。

english: I fought and defeated the Judge of Yama.
translation: 我战斗并击败了阎魔法官。

english: I found Avan by some gold rocks North of Al Kharid.
translation: 我在阿尔卡里德城北边的金矿石附近找到了阿凡。

english: I found Maria Gadderanks and her son Ron, the slaves meant for Desmodus, in a prison owned by Alexei Jovkai. I confronted Alexei in the prison but he refused to let Desmodus have them. However, at that point, Vanstrom showed up to investigate the disturbance. He forced Alexei to give the slaves to Desmodus but he nearly discovered my identity in the process.
translation: 我在阿列克谢.约夫凯的监狱里找到了玛丽亚.加德兰克斯和她的儿子罗恩，他们就是本该送给德斯莫杜斯的奴隶。我在监狱里质问阿列克谢，但他拒绝让德斯莫杜斯带走他们。然而，就在这时，范斯特罗姆出现调查骚乱。他强迫阿列克谢把奴隶交给德斯莫杜斯，但在这个过程中他差点发现我的身份。

english: I found Ysgawyn meeting with Iestin Edern of the Iorwerth Clan. Upon confronting him, I discovered that Ysgawyn had been using Iestin as an informant and that he was still loyal to the rebels. However, Iestin informed us that someone else had betrayed us by revealing the location of Lletya to Lord Iorwerth.
translation: 我发现伊斯卡温正在与伊尔沃斯家族的伊斯廷.埃德恩会面。质问后，我发现伊斯卡温一直把伊斯廷当作线人，而且他仍然忠于叛军。但伊斯廷告诉我们，另有他人背叛了我们，向伊尔沃斯领主泄露了莱蒂亚村的位置。

english: I found a Tome of the Moon within The Forthos Dungeon with 4 missing pages.
translation: 我在福索斯地牢里找到了一本月亮典籍，缺了4页。

english: I found a Tome of the Temple within The Forthos Dungeon with 4 missing pages.
translation: 我在福索斯地牢里找到了一本神殿典籍，缺了4页。

english: I found a book in the nearby tourist office. The book detailed the sad story of Baxtorian and Glarial, two elves that once ruled the area around Baxtorian Falls. According to the book, Baxtorian and Glarial were the only ones able to enter the waterfall but Baxtorian sealed himself inside after Glarial's apparent death. The book also mentioned that Glarial herself is buried near the waterfall, and that the key to her tomb, Glarial's Pebble, was taken by gnomes and hidden beneath Tree Gnome Village.
translation: 我在附近的游客中心找到了一本书。书中详细讲述了巴克斯托里安和格拉利尔的悲惨故事，这对精灵曾统治巴克斯托里安瀑布周边地区。据记载，只有他们俩能进入瀑布，但格拉利尔死后巴克斯托里安将自己封在了里面。书中还提到格拉利尔就葬在瀑布附近，而开启她坟墓的钥匙——格拉利尔的鹅卵石——被地精夺走，藏在了地精村庄地下。

english: I found a package due for delivery to Lord Handelmort at the G.P.D.T. depot, and swapped the label for the Wizard Cromperty's experimental teleport block.
translation: 我在G.P.D.T.仓库找到了一个要送给汉德尔莫特勋爵的包裹，把标签换成了法师克伦珀蒂的实验性传送阻断器。

english: I found a secret message on the back of Fairy Nuff's certificate and used it to get to the fairies' hideout, where I found Fairy Nuff and the Fairy Queen.
translation: 我在仙子纳夫的证书背面发现了一条秘密信息，并借此找到了仙子的藏身处，在那里见到了仙子纳夫和仙子女王。

english: I found an Ancient Vault north east of Nardah. I used Ancient Magicks to open the door, but I was followed inside by Asgarnia Smith. He explained that he'd been trying to gain access to the Vault for some time, believing it to contain valuable treasure.
translation: 我在那尔达城东北方发现了一座远古金库。我用上古魔法打开了门，但阿斯加尼亚.史密斯跟着我进来了。他说他一直在想办法进入金库，认为里面藏有珍贵的宝藏。

english: I found pages of a diary in some fires, and made them into a complete book. It seems that someone's been trying to trick King Vargas and Queen Sigrid into war.
translation: 我在几堆火里找到了日记的书页，把它们拼成了一本完整的书。看来有人一直在试图挑拨瓦加斯国王和西格里德女王开战。

english: I found some evidence at Councillor Hughes' home to suggest she might have gone to The Deeper Lode in Lovakengj. I went there and spoke to Fuggy but we were interupted by an Earthquake. Upon speaking to him again, he told me that a woman who may have been Councillor Hughes left for Port Piscarilius to board Veos' ship.
translation: 我在休斯议员的家里找到了一些证据，表明她可能去了洛瓦肯吉城的深矿脉。我赶到那里和富吉交谈，但被一场地震打断了。再次和他说话时，他告诉我一个可能是休斯议员的女人已经动身前往皮斯卡里琉斯港，准备登上维奥斯的船。

english: I found some treasure in the Gnome Stronghold.
translation: 我在地精要塞找到了一些宝藏。

english: I found some treasure north of Al Kharid.
translation: 我在阿尔卡里德城北边找到了一些宝藏。

english: I found the entrance to Tarn's Lair in a vast dungeon filled with undead creatures in the Haunted Mine. When I entered his lair, Tarn attacked me.
translation: 我在闹鬼矿场一个充满亡灵生物的广阔地牢里找到了塔恩巢穴的入口。我一进入巢穴，塔恩就向我发起了攻击。

english: I gained access to the Tower of Magic and helped deal with some Tormented Souls that had escaped.
translation: 我进入了魔法塔，并帮助处理了一些逃脱的被折磨的灵魂。

english: I gathered a Large Chicken Egg, a Dragon Egg and a Jaguar Egg. We concluded that of the three, the Jaguar Egg was the best replacement. However, all three Eggs then fell and broke.
translation: 我收集了一个大鸡蛋、一个龙蛋和一个美洲豹蛋。我们得出结论，三个蛋中美洲豹蛋是最好的替代品。然而，三个蛋随后都掉在地上摔碎了。

english: I gave Dinh's Hammer to Undor who used it to repair the Doors of Dinh. I returned to Lady Lovakengj and Councillor Unkar who thanked me for my help and rewarded me.
translation: 我把丁的锤交给了昂多尔，他用它修好了丁之门。我回到洛瓦肯吉女士和昂卡尔议员那里，他们感谢我的帮助并给了我奖励。

english: I gave General Wartface and General Bentnoze some of their original Brown Goblin Mail, and it turned out to be their favourite. They're clearly not the smartest, but that's goblins for you.
translation: 我把一些原本的棕色哥布林链甲给了疣脸将军和弯鼻将军，结果发现这是他们最喜欢的。他们显然不是最聪明的，但哥布林就是这样。

english: I got back the Fairy Queen's Enchanted Secateurs and returned them to the Fairy Godfather.
translation: 我找回了仙子女王附魔的修枝剪，并把它还给了仙子教父。

english: I grew a garden for King Roald, and I brought him to see it. He seemed very pleased with it - well, at least, after Queen Ellamaria had a little 'chat' with him.
translation: 我为罗尔德国王建了一座花园，并带他去参观。他看起来非常满意——嗯，至少是在埃拉玛利亚女王和他'聊了聊'之后。

english: I had to fight the Sea Troll Queen by myself.
translation: 我不得不独自与海巨魔女王战斗。

english: I had to help a depressed fisherman, betray another, assist in destroying an insurmountable beast and do unspeakable things to Jogre bones.
translation: 我不得不帮助一个沮丧的渔夫，背叛另一个渔夫，协助摧毁一头不可战胜的巨兽，并对乔格雷食人魔骨头做了不可描述的事情。

english: I have a splitting headache. Captain Braindeath has explained the situation to me, and I have agreed to help brew up a batch of 'rum'.
translation: 我头痛欲裂。脑死亡酿酒厂厂长向我解释了情况，我同意帮忙酿造一批'朗姆酒'。

english: I have added the Blindweed to the hopper. I should ask Captain Braindeath what he wants me to do next.
translation: 我已经把盲草加进了料斗。我应该问问脑死亡酿酒厂厂长接下来要我做什么。

english: I have agreed to help Brother Tranquility and the other monks with the dastardly zombie pirates. I will have to equip my diving gear to pass through the now flooded underground passage to get to the secret room.
translation: 我同意帮助宁静修士和其他僧侣对付那些卑鄙的僵尸海盗。我必须装备好潜水装备，穿过现在已被淹没的地下通道，才能到达密室。

english: I have agreed to investigate King Awowogei's recent activities.
translation: 我同意调查阿沃盖国王近期的活动。

english: I have banished the Evil Spirit. Captain Braindeath told me there is one more ingredient left. I should ask him what this is.
translation: 我已经驱逐了恶灵。脑死亡酿酒厂厂长告诉我还差一种材料。我应该问问他这是什么。

english: I have been given instructions by the Odd Old Man on which bones to collect and how to prepare them. I must find whole, unbroken bones and put them into a pot of vinegar. I must then take some logs and use them on the pot-boiler. I must then put the pot into the pot-boiler, and light the logs. This will clean the bone.
translation: 怪异的老人给了我指示，告诉我该收集哪些骨头以及如何准备它们。我必须找到完整无缺的骨头，把它们放进一罐醋里。然后我必须拿些原木，用在煮锅上。接着我必须把罐子放进煮锅，并点燃原木。这样就能把骨头清理干净。

english: I have been given some Blindweed Seeds, and told to grow them in the Herb Patch outside. Captain Braindeath recommended that I try and intimidate the Swabs guarding the Herb Patch if I want them to stop attacking me.
translation: 我得到了一些盲草种子，被告知要种在外面的草药种植地里。脑死亡酿酒厂厂长建议我，如果想让守卫草药种植地的清洁工停止攻击我，就试着吓唬他们。

english: I have brewed my very own Kelda stout!
translation: 我酿造了我自己的凯尔达黑啤酒！

english: I have completed making a Neitiznot shield.
translation: 我已经完成了奈提兹诺盾的制作。

english: I have created a Fire of Unseasonal Warmth near the God Wars Dungeon, to ward off the effects of the cold weather there.
translation: 我在神战地牢附近生起了一堆驱寒之火，以抵御那里的寒冷天气。

english: I have defeated the Bandit Leader's champion.
translation: 我已经击败了强盗首领的冠军。

english: I have delivered King Gjuki Sorvott IV's decree to Mawnis Burowgar of Neitiznot.
translation: 我已经将国王古基.索沃特四世的法令送达给了奈提兹诺镇的莫尼斯.布罗加。

english: I have endeavoured to resolve the feud that exists between the Menaphites and the bandits in order to earn their trust and some information concerning Ali Morrisane's nephew.
translation: 我努力调解梅纳菲特人和强盗之间的世仇，以赢得他们的信任，并获取关于阿里.莫里桑侄子的信息。

english: I have found Rupert the Beard in the tower, north-east of Taverley. I should use the drainpipe to speak to him.
translation: 我在塔韦利村东北方的塔里找到了胡子鲁伯特。我应该用排水管和他说话。

english: I have found a battered book in a house in Seers' Village.
translation: 我在先知村的一间房子里找到了一本破烂的书。

english: I have found that the 10th squad were indeed blown off course and never reached the shipyard. I am currently on a mission for King Narnode Shareen to investigate their whereabouts.
translation: 我发现第十小队确实被吹离了航线，从未到达造船厂。我目前正奉纳罗德.沙林国王之命执行任务，调查他们的下落。

english: I have given Dunstan the certificate to prove that his son has been signed up for the Imperial Guard. Dunstan made me the Spiked boots.
translation: 我把证明他儿子已报名参加帝国卫队的证书交给了邓斯坦。邓斯坦为我做了钉鞋。

english: I have given the drunken dwarf his Kelda stout.
translation: 我已经把凯尔达黑啤酒给了那个醉酒的矮人。

english: I have given the last of the bones to the Odd Old Man. I am sure he will reward me.
translation: 我已经把最后一块骨头交给了怪异的老人。我相信他会奖励我的。

english: I have gone to the ship and spoken to Bill Teach again. He is ready to set off as soon as I give the word.
translation: 我去了船上，再次和比尔.蒂奇交谈。只要我一声令下，他就准备出发。

english: I have grown some Blindweed, I should show it to Captain Braindeath so that he can tell me what to do with it.
translation: 我已经种出了一些盲草，应该拿给脑死亡酿酒厂厂长看看，这样他就能告诉我该怎么处理了。

english: I have killed the avatar of the Arzinian Being of Bordanzan, banishing it from the rock.
translation: 我杀死了博尔丹赞的阿兹尼亚的化身，将其从岩石上驱逐了出去。

english: I have seen Lunar Isle for the first time! Time to explore!
translation: 我第一次见到月亮岛！该去探索了！

english: I have shot holes in the enemy ship, and we have sailed triumphantly into Mos Le'Harmless. Bill has given me the Little Book o' Piracy, which I will need to be able to speak to some of the pirates in town, and he has told me to speak to him if I need to go back to the mainland.
translation: 我在敌船上射了几个洞，然后我们胜利驶入莫斯勒哈姆斯岛。比尔给了我《海盗之书》，我需要用它来和镇上的海盗交谈，他还告诉我如果需要回大陆就找他。

english: I have spoken to Bill Teach and agreed to help him sail his ship to a place called Mos Le'Harmless. We are likely to be attacked by enemy pirates on the way. Bill is ready, all I have to do is board the Adventurous, and we can set off.
translation: 我和比尔.蒂奇谈过，同意帮他驾船去一个叫莫斯勒哈姆斯岛的地方。路上可能会遭到敌方海盗袭击。比尔准备好了，我只需登上冒险号，我们就能出发。

english: I have spoken to Brother Tranquility and I have been rewarded for all my hard work. Now all I need to do is find something to settle my stomach after watching that operation...
translation: 我和宁静修士谈过，他奖励了我所有的辛勤工作。现在我需要找点东西来安抚看完那场手术后的胃……

english: I have spoken to Captain Braindeath, who has decided to stay on the island and keep the Zombie Pirates drunk! Despite claiming he has never heard of Rabid Jack he was more than happy with my performance, and rewarded me with Farming, Fishing and Prayer experience, as well as the Blessed Wrench.
translation: 我和脑死亡酿酒厂厂长谈过，他决定留在岛上让僵尸海盗们一直醉醺醺的！尽管他声称从未听说过狂犬杰克，但他对我的表现非常满意，奖励了我农业、钓鱼和祈祷经验，以及祝福扳手。

english: I have spoken to Captain Donnie, and have found out the name of his boss, Rabid Jack. I should tell Captain Braindeath about this.
translation: 我和唐尼船长谈过，得知了他老板的名字——狂犬杰克。我应该把这事告诉脑死亡酿酒厂厂长。

english: I have spoken to Wizard Mizgog.
translation: 我和魔法师米兹戈格谈过。

english: I have spoken to the Guard Captain.
translation: 我和守卫长谈过。

english: I have spoken to the Odd Old Man, and I have agreed to go help him complete his collection of bones. I should check to find out which ones he needs.
translation: 我和怪异的老人谈过，同意去帮他完成骨头收藏。我应该去查查他需要哪些骨头。

english: I have spoken to the Spirits of the Elid.
translation: 我和埃利德之灵谈过。

english: I have spoken with Velorina, who has told me the sad history of the ghosts of Port Phasmatys. She has asked me to plead with Necrovarus in the Phasmatyan Temple to let any ghost who so wishes pass over into the next world.
translation: 我和韦洛里娜谈过，她告诉了我法斯提斯港幽灵的悲惨历史。她让我去法斯提斯神庙恳求尼克罗瓦鲁斯，让任何愿意的幽灵都能进入来世。

english: I have started the fire. I should talk to Olaf Hradson to see if he will give me my reward now.
translation: 我点燃了火。我应该和奥拉夫.赫拉德森谈谈，看他现在是否愿意给我奖励。

english: I have still to claim the money that Bill Teach owes me.
translation: 我还没去领取比尔.蒂奇欠我的钱。

english: I have taken the carvings to Olaf Hradson's wife, Ingrid, and his son, Volf.
translation: 我把雕刻品带给了奥拉夫.赫拉德森的妻子英格丽德和他的儿子沃尔夫。

english: I have taken the logs from the windswept tree to Olaf Hradson.
translation: 我把风吹树的原木带给了奥拉夫.赫拉德森。

english: I investigated the disturbance at the Sandpit. While conducting my investigation, I was attacked by a Basilisk Youngling which I managed to defeat. I also found some interesting items.
translation: 我调查了沙坑的骚乱。调查中，我被一只石化蜥蜴幼崽袭击，但我成功击败了它。我还发现了一些有趣的物品。

english: I joined Sergeant Tobyn at the cell on the Palace Roof to interrogate one of the Bandits. However, Prince Itzla Arkan of Varlamore was waiting for us, having heard about the commotion. He joined the interrogation and was able to convince the Bandit to talk. The Bandit revealed that they were paid by someone from Varlamore to assassinate the Teokan of Ralos.
translation: 我和托宾中士在宫殿屋顶的牢房里审问一名强盗。然而，瓦拉莫尔的伊茨拉.阿坎王子听到动静后正在等我们。他加入了审问，并成功说服强盗开口。强盗透露，他们是受瓦拉莫尔某人雇佣来刺杀拉洛斯的特奥坎。

english: I just saw Mayor Hobb coming from the church. This doesn't bode well at all.
translation: 我刚看到霍布市长从教堂出来。这可不是好兆头。

english: I managed to defeat the Ancient Guardian. With Willow gone, I claimed my reward from a bag she left behind. Now that no one else is trying to kill me, I can explore the Ancient Ruins at my leisure.
translation: 我成功击败了古代守护者。威洛死后，我从她留下的袋子里领取了奖励。现在没人想杀我了，我可以悠闲地探索古代废墟。

english: I managed to find Ivan in the Haunted Woods south of Fenkenstrain's Castle. Along with Veliaf, we spied on a meeting between Damien and some werewolves. The werewolves presented Damien with some humans they'd captured on the other side of the River Salve. However, he wasn't impressed and demanded they bring more. After the meeting ended, we were ambushed by none other than Vanescula Drakan herself. We initially believed that she was there to kill us, but instead she claimed that she wanted to talk. She invited us to meet her in the Icyene Graveyard south east of Meiyerditch. She made it clear that it wasn't an offer we could decline.
translation: 我在芬肯斯坦城堡南边的闹鬼森林里找到了伊万。和维利亚夫一起，我们偷看了达米安和一些狼人的会面。狼人给达米安带来了他们在萨尔维河对岸抓到的几个人类。但他并不满意，要求他们带更多人来。会面结束后，我们遭到了范尼斯库拉.德雷坎本人的伏击。我们原以为她是来杀我们的，但她却声称想谈谈。她邀请我们去迈尔迪奇东南的冰恩墓地见她。她明确表示这不是我们能拒绝的提议。

english: I managed to herd all of the Diseased Sheep into a pen. I then safely disposed of them. I returned to Councillor Halgrive who thanked me for my help.
translation: 我成功把所有病羊赶进了围栏，然后安全处理了它们。我回到哈尔格里夫议员那里，他感谢了我的帮助。

english: I managed to track down the Trapped Soul to some bushes near the Farming Guild.
translation: 我在农业公会附近的灌木丛中找到了被困的灵魂。

english: I met Brynna, the Survival Expert. She taught me how to catch shrimp with a fishing net, and then how to cook those shrimp on a fire made from logs I had cut myself.
translation: 我遇到了生存专家布琳娜。她教我如何用渔网捕虾，然后如何用我自己砍的原木生火烤虾。

english: I met Juna the serpent in a deep chasm beneath the Lumbridge Swamp Caves. I made a bowl out of magical stone in order to catch the Tears of Guthix.
translation: 我在仑桥镇沼泽洞穴深处的深渊中遇到了蛇女朱娜。我用魔法石做了一个碗来接古斯之泪。

english: I met the Corsair Captain at the crossroads north of Port Sarim. He wanted help with a curse that was afflicting his crew.
translation: 我在沙林港北边的十字路口遇到了海盗船长。他想让我帮忙解除困扰他船员的诅咒。

english: I met with Ali Morrisane, who asked me to travel to Pollnivneach, a small town to the south of Al Kharid and look for his nephew.
translation: 我遇到了阿里.莫里桑，他让我去阿尔卡里德城以南的小镇波尼尼镇找他的侄子。

english: I met with Captain Vibia at the Cultist Safe House in south western Civitas illa Fortis. While she kept watch, I found a Window for us to use to get into the House, distracted a Dog on the other side, and then unlocked a Door leading to the rest of the House.
translation: 我在福蒂斯城西南的邪教徒安全屋见到了维比娅船长。她放哨时，我找到了一个窗户可以进入房屋，引开了另一边的狗，然后打开了一扇通往房屋其他部分的门。

english: I met with Elena at the Rehnison Household in West Ardougne. I learnt that together with Councillor Halgrive and some other close allies, she had set up the Ardougne Resistance to oppose King Lathas and the Mourners.
translation: 我在西阿多尼城的雷尼森家见到了埃琳娜。我得知她和哈尔格里夫议员以及其他一些亲密盟友一起建立了阿多尼抵抗组织，以对抗拉萨斯国王和哀悼者。

english: I met with Hazeel and General Khazard at Weiss. At their request, I spoke to Snowflake and My Arm and they told me a Strange Shadow was seen down in the Salt Mine.
translation: 我在韦斯见到了哈兹尔和卡扎德将军。应他们的要求，我和雪花以及'我的手臂'谈了谈，他们告诉我盐矿里出现了一个奇怪的影子。

english: I met with Ivan and Veliaf at the Burgh de Rott boathouse.
translation: 我在伯格德罗特镇的船库见到了伊万和维利亚夫。

english: I met with Lord Iorwerth at his camp. He offered me his support in my endeavour and told me to meet with one of his Trackers.
translation: 我在伊尔沃斯领主的营地见到了他。他支持我的行动，并让我去找他的一名追踪者。
